title: The Games (Oc x reader)
description:
I haven't figured out everything for this but I've written so much for it now that I want to share it in case someone wants to read it.
Prologue:
  Earth has found out they're not alone in the universe. An alien species have contacted Earth, giving them a chance to be protected by the aliens out there that threatens the universe. They inform them that there are in fact thousands of alien species out there.

  The alien race, who calls themselves Opsidians, offer Earth a chance at competing in the Games, a televised reality competition game they host. In order to win the protection, Earth will have to send a tribute to the Games.

  They know little to nothing about the Games or these alien species. But after consideration, they don't see the harm in sending one. And realise it might be their only chance.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello!
 I'm not trying to be or become a professional author. I only write when I feel inspired and motivated. It's not my passion or job. But when I do write something I like to share with whoever might want to read it.
 I hope you enjoy, but please don't hate me for being absent for long periods of time or when I make some unfinished work. You can always just choose not to read.

- English is not my native language.
- I don't have any scheduled posts, only publish whenever I have something I'm ready to share.

 I'm working on more books, so follow me if you want to get notified when I publish. Unfortunately my attention is often suddenly drawn elsewhere and it might take a long time for me to finish something or just come back to edit the books that are still just first drafts.

 In my reading lists, if a book has a sequel or are a part of a series, I only add one of the books, either the first one or my favorite one, it's so the lists don't get too long. So remember to check the authors profile, if you like their book ;-) If the whole book series is long and I love all of it, then I make a seperate list for it.

 Thank you for reading this! And I hope you enjoy some of my books! ;-)

title: Rewriting the Strings of Fate?[Mahabharat]
description:
"I spent half of my life away from you
 and in every step,
 in every moment
 I thought about you and moved forward,
 knowing you would be proud"

The death of her mother in Kaliyug brought a twist to how Arshia normally lived life in her own yug. Having full knowledge about the epic, Mahabharat,she is blessed to play an integral part in the greatest war fought in history.


Sut-putra Karna has faced grave insults in every single step he took in his life. Not having the advantage of his real birth status,his adopted birth status brought incapacitate to him.  He fought to be the best and at last,he craved his name in the history of Indian Mythology and made the whole world aware of his strength and valour.

title: Hellsky (Hunter-Killer #3)
description:
After decades of all out war between human and Scraegan, the planet Rychter has finally settled into an uneasy peace. Both sides can rebuild, lick their wounds, and for the first time try to coexist.

But the war isn't over for everyone. Without the unifying threat of the mysterious Crawlers, factions on both sides are once again spoiling for a fight, threatening to tip the world back into conflict.

The closest thing humanity has to an ambassador, Sergeant Ryke Vannigan finds himself in the eye of the storm once again. He must help keep the peace between human and Scraegan, while investigations into the origin of the Crawlers reveal uncomfortable truths about the planet's past. 

Before the arrival of the human colonists, someone else had plans for Rychter.

And they're about to put things back on track.

||

BOOK 3 in the HUNTER-KILLER SERIES

title: Infection |Infected Book 1|
description:
WHEN THEY RISE, WE WILL FALL.

We've seen the movies, we've watched the TV shows, but nothing will ever prepare us for a real zombie apocalypse.  When Desi, a normal teenage girl, wakes up one morning to screaming neighbors and a bleeding mother, she quickly realizes that pop culture's most grusome nightmare is real.

Losing everything, Desi finds herself scared and alone until she is saved by a boy wielding a baseball bat.  Fighting for a life that she isn't even sure she wants anymore, Desi must learn that it is okay to love again when it seems there is nothing to live for.  Falling in love isn't easy with infected biting at your heels, but once Desi finds it again, she will do whatever it takes to keep her and her love alive.

/ HORROR / ACTION / ADVENTURE / ROMANCE / SCIENCE FICTION /

*IN SERIOUS EDITING PROCESS*
Highest Ranking:  #3 in Horror, #4 in Science Fiction

title: Crash
description:
Lyra Jay Kellie has just had the second worst day of her entire life. It's right up there at the top of the list, just under her mothers death day. 
  
  Her plane fell out of the sky in the middle of a storm and landed in the remote wilderness of the Montana Rockies. Her pilot is dead. Her satellite phone is worthless and she has no idea where she is. Lyra is utterly lost and alone. 
  
  Good thing she's been taught a thing or two about how to survive from her world traveling partner and father. 
  
  Then there's Nathan Wesley, a hunter and farmer, who later has the ultimately worst plane ride of his entire existence. Crashing just a mile or so from Lyra's camp site, he's rendered unconscious and cannot escape the flaming plane.  Lyra sees the smoke and fire and hopes she can get to the plane in time. 
  
  When Nathan wakes up, he decides to pay back this wild girl for saving his life by doing anything he can to help her get home. 
  
  Even if that means risking his life for her. 
  
  Can the pair survive the harsh Rocky Mountain wilderness and make it to civilization?  Or will they fail in the face of an unseen danger?
  
  -------------------
  Please be easy on me, this is my first official book. It is crazy and has some odd  twists, so please do not judge. Side note: 5/18- I'm not as nice as I was when I was 14. If I see rude/disrespectful comments, I will call you out. I read every comment, and I'm not afraid to embarrass you. Be warned :)
  
  WARNING//: THERE IS SOME DIRTY LANGUAGE, SEXUAL INNUENDOS, AND SAUCY MOMENTS IN THIS BOOK, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED. 
  
  Thank you for reading my book!

-
  
  4/5/17 
  Hello all! I am happy to announce that I have finished editing this entire book and It is now totally completed! Thanks to all my fans for inspiring me to fix this book and make it better than I ever thought possible. Crash was #8 in Adventure in February, thanks to all my readers!
  -KJ

#4 in Awesome
200K April 2018
400K+ January 2019

title: The Resilient Mate
description:
The term 'raised by wolves' has never been more accurate.

As a baby I was found in the forest, inside the territory of the fearsome Alcaeus Aatu werewolf Clan; led by Jenna Knight. Her beta's, Ace and Hansel, adopted me and I couldn't have asked for better parents; the pack though, well, they left something to be desired. As the only human in a pack full of werewolves, I wasn't welcomed; I was the fat, human outcast.
 
One day when rouges attacked I decided that I'd finally had enough. I left and never looked back, running to England to join the military after a life of being the weak link. 

After several years serving in the military, life throws me a curve ball and I soon find myself returning home after years away.

*Third book in The Mate series. No you don't have to read the previous books.*

Cover by IsaSecret.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just a small town girl livin' in a lonely world.


FAQ

What other books are there in 'The Mate' series and what order should I read them in?

Firstly, please note that each of these books can be read separately without any foreknowledge of the previous books as they are a series *not* a saga.  There will be five or six books in the series, each focusing on the mates of various characters that are mentioned in each of the books, though only four have been published on Wattpad as of January 2014.

The Mate series order;
-The Wayward Mate
-The Forsaken Mate
-The Resilient Mate
-The Rogue Mate


Once I finish with The Mate series I will be posting a fantasy book that I hope one day to publish.

Long ago, there was a planet called Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. In order not to attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles.

After Y/N's ship crashed on Earth, she meets a male Cardbot named Blue Cop and ends up being his friend and helping him so that the other Cardbots that arrived on Earth are not seen by humans. 

That was until due to an accident while holding Mega Trucker they would meet a boy named Jun who would have the Metal Breath and joining him and being helped in capturing the other Metal Cardbots.

But what would happen if Y/N didn't notice all the Metal Cardbots obsessed with her and would do anything to have her forever until death do them part...

Season 3 of The Virus Within

*    *   *   *   *

Trinity isn't about to let anything stop her. Come hell or high water, she's determined to get Jess and Nicky back. And heaven help anyone who stands in her way. Whoever said 'Hell hath no fury like a woman scorned' had clearly never met a Nightstalker on the warpath.

The blood moon is shedding its red light upon the night, and the hunt is on. The question remains, whose blood will be spilled first? And who will survive?

Forget the dish soap. Grab the rutabagas and the firecrackers for this rescue mission.

title: 'Sacmis' (formerly 'Alien Abduction')
description:
Four women - a lawyer, a teacher, an athlete and a soldier - are abducted by four alien men.

The aliens, far from being bug-eyed monsters, have 90%  human DNA. 

Despite the circumstances, the women are fascinated by their captors. Particularly when they discover the men have taken time to learn everything about them: even down to filling the women's on-board wardrobes with their favourite labels! ("For an alien," says Amisha, "he certainly knows how to shop.")

They also discover that the men have the power to connect with them at a deeper level. So much so that the women can experience - directly - what it is like to be a man! With amazing consequences.

But danger threatens: not just the women, but mankind itself.

On the aliens' home planet of Sacmis, a genetic disorder has resulted in male births massively exceeding female births. So much so that most men can never hope to have a relationship with a woman. 

Let alone sex.

To save the planet from extinction, Sacmis has prepared a fleet of  slaveships to abduct compatible women from Earth in large numbers, to be used purely for breeding purposes.

Somehow, the four alien men and the four women have to stop them.

© Adriana Nicolas 2016
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
For most of my career I was a copywriter in several top London ad agencies (Mad Woman?).  Now I am doing my best to write longer stuff.

I have a longstanding passion for fantasy, but set in an (almost) realistic world. I love anything to do with aliens and other worlds and, in particular, Ancient Egypt (which is pretty much a whole other world anyway.)

I have a very romantic nature and this is always present in whatever I write. I work from home in Buckinghamshire, England.

title: Cured [ManxMan]
description:
Topher was a survivor, until he wasn't. After a noble sacrifice, he's become what the scattered remains of humanity fears most: a zombie. But he may not stay that way. Humans are developing a cure, and Topher finds himself one of their unwitting test subjects. Coming back to life is not easy, and he may find things are not how he left them. 

***In case you missed it in the title, this is a manxman story, so yes, there will be male humans engaging in relationships, just so that's clear.

title: Rehash
description:
He is nothing but an urban legend. The ghost from a past which we would rather forget. 

But our ghosts don't forget about us. 

The singularity war between humans and renegade androids ended in 2049. Twenty-five years ago. Humans emerged victorious, but only with the help from loyal androids who did not turn their back on humanity... and as a 'reward' for their service, they were shut down. Deemed too dangerous to be part of society.

Camilo, a twenty-two-year-old college student, is a vocal protestor against the decision to terminate all androids after the war. Of course, this has nothing to do with his admiration of spectre model Z-3293, also known as 'Zed.' An android who saved the entire European continent from a bioweapon airstrike which would have wiped out all life. 

Nowadays, 'Zed' is seen as nothing more than trite pro-android propaganda. Nobody took Camilo seriously until one day he found model Z-3293, fully up and functioning, behind his apartment building.

title: Against the Tide - A New Elysium Story [Complete]
description:
Augments - digital implants and robotic prostheses - can enhance abilities, bestow entirely new ones, or replace parts of the body that have been broken or injured. At least they used to, before they were declared illegal during the Purge. But augments were never meant to replace parts of the human brain. So when her brain got damaged beyond organic repair, she was fixed using other parts of machines. And they ended up saving more of her than just her physical body, as one day, she found herself no longer alone inside the expanse of her own mind.

Amy Larsson is many things. A covert augment. An escaped slave. An infamous space pirate. A spy for New Elysium. A terrorist. An overall badass bitch to be reckoned with - rumor has it she can hot-wire anything with just a rubber band and a bobby pin. But what not even the android crew of her ship, the Blackstar, is aware of, is the fact that Amy Larsson is even more than that: she is two people, in one body.
And they are planning to commit the most audacious heist of the galaxy.


_______________
Featured on Wattpad Beyond Sol's "Sunflower Space Opera" reading list

authorBio:
I'm a scientist writing science fiction and fantasy.
Recently finshed my entry for the Open Novella Contest "Moebius 2157", a dystopian SciFi story dealing with the intricacies of time travel. Feedback always welcome!

Previous work:
- "Against the Tide", a space opera featuring pirates, cyborgs and lots of explosions.
- "The 10th Circle - Abyss",  SciFi-Fantasy mystery set in a utopian post-apocalyptic world in which things are not as they seem.

Currently on hiatus due to personal reasons, but occasionally checking DMs and comments.

Many of my stories revolve around questions about the human mind/theory of mind, consciousness, dreaming, and a sense of self.  I am a molecular biologist with some neuroscience background, and beyond that I am deeply fascinated by computer science (mainly artificial intelligence) and cognitive biology. All these topics influence my stories. I have a particular interest in portraying scientists as multi-faceted, interesting characters, beyond the "evil" and "mad" tropes.

Relationships, from friendship to love and anything in between, usually play a big role in my stories. I like to throw my characters into intense situations, since I like to write about feelings - perhaps to compensate the fact that I have a rather hard time expressing them in real life. My writing is cathartic, but not autobiographic. There is a little bit of me in most of my major characters - usually their quirks and neuroses :)

I love descriptive and romantic (in the sense of romanticism, not romance) writing. I know that this is not everybody's cup of tea, but I try to follow the advice 'Write the story you would like to read'.

title: 100 Days in Deadland (part 1 of the Deadland Saga)
description:
In one day, the world succumbed to a pestilence that decimated the living. In its place rose a new species: vicious, gruesome, wandering zombies with an insatiable hunger for the living. Still in her twenties, Cash has watched her friends die, only to walk again. An office worker with few survival skills, she joins up with Clutch, a grizzled Army veteran with PTSD. Together, they flee the city and struggle through the nine circles of hell, with nothing but Clutch's military experience and Cash's determination to live. As they fight to survive in the zombie inferno, they quickly discover that nowhere is safe from the undead...or the living.  

(100 Days in Deadland is a journey through the first poem in Dante Alighieri's Divine Comedy, the classic tale on the horrors of hell... zombie apocalypse style!)


(Note: This is a draft so please excuse any errors. The finished novel is available in paperback, ebook, and audiobook).

title: Exploring Titan
description:
Running away from all her problems on Earth (leaving behind broken promises and a shattered social and love life), the cold empty pitch-black water-covered surface of one of Saturn's moons was THE LAST place she'd ever thought to find solace on her aimless space adventure.

The near mundane routine of trying to survive daily from the hazardous onslaught of the planet was practically a game to her at this point.

Until one day, while drowning because she forgot to refill her oxygen tank while trying to escape a tsunami, as one usually does, a rustle in the water brought about a startling realization.

"Have I truly been alone this whole time while Exploring Titan....."

title: CANAISIS ∞ Chronicle One: The Last Living Ship ∞ 1: A New Mission
description:
Volume 1 of CANAISIS ∞ The Last Living Ship trilogy (Chronicles of Canaisis 1)
Can a ship, born to sail the ocean of stars to ensure Humankind's survival, save her Captain from the void within his own heart?
∞ ∞ ∞
Canaisis is the last of her kind, a Living Ship forged with Mankind's most advanced technology and artificial intelligence.  Together with her Captain, she sails the cold, dark void between stars at multiple times the speed of light-to ensure Humanity's survival. 

As Canaisis agrees to carry a corporation's entire personelle to their new colony planet, Captain Gareth Levant finds his solitude interrupted by a new culture and a woman whose Gift threatens to unlock the pain caged within his heart. A pain he's carried since before the day he first launched... centuries ago. 

As if that is not enough, something about Earth's Citizens sanctioning the corporation's relocation rings falsely with undertones that has Captain Levant on edge. He will do anything to keep his ship and passengers safe.

Captain Levant loves his ship, as any good captain does since the beginning of time-whether with wind, sail and ocean waves as in the days of old, or in the vast depths of space. But if Canaisis were able to return that love, could it burn bright enough to light the way through the void within the Captain's own heart? Or does it require the Gift of human touch?

∞ ∞ ∞
By @kemorgan65 and @RavenRock2112  
∞ ∞ ∞
A prequel to the pre-story of #ShadowOfThePastTrilogy ∞ The Displaced.
∞ ∞ ∞
SEQUELS: 
Canaisis ∞ A Captain's Journey
Canaisis ∞ A Shard Of Code
∞ ∞ ∞
REVIEW by @Ray_Of_Sunshine9

Engineering, technology...some very detailed information, ...it's done in a way that makes it easy for me to digest...accessible and patient, which I appreciate."

authorBio:
This is a joint account by @kemorgan65 and @RavenRock67 / @RavenRock2112

We are Annika K.E. Morgan (♀🌴) & Raven Rock (♂🌲🌳🌲) a.k.a. Annika Ravenrock or NikaRave, two online friends who enjoy collaborative writing and editing. We're both bookworms who found great synergy collaborating, since one of us can't see the forest for the trees, and the other can't see the trees for the forest.

We're currently collaborating on a slow-burn, character-driven, hard sci-fi drama Chronicles of Canaisis.

title: The Carriers
description:
Completed! 

#1 in government conspiracy as of 10/19/18
#6 in outbreak as of 10/10/18
#7 in corruption as of 8/12/18
#62 in apocalypse as of 8/7/18
#11 in government as of 8/9/18

The year is 2213. Everyone was evacuated from the home planet over 150 years ago. Our planet was dying, it was only a matter of time before our race was wiped out. We now live on a synthetic planet designed and built by our ancestors who came together from all parts of the globe to devise a plan to save us. We have lived peacefully for over a century.. Until now. Our lives were threatened when a mysterious and deadly virus broke out, killing entire communities at a time. The council says that they have a plan; they said that in order to prevent the death of more innocent people they will test every man, woman, and child for signs of the virus. Any person found to have been infected will be quarantined, the ones who die will be given a proper burial while the ones who survive are deemed carriers and are to be sent to the home planet to prevent further outbreak. I was prepared for the people I know and some I love being taken away for the greater good, but I never would have expected that among the list of people being taken from my community, that I would be one of them.. I survived the quarantine. Now for the survival of my planet I, and the other Carriers must be sent to the home planet. I'm going back to Earth.


(This is not based on The 100 but there are similarities.) 

(Some violent themes, but other than that is entirely clean.) 

Please comment if you have any questions or concerns. This is a first draft so it is definitely not perfect yet.. Thank you!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  
    "Where'd you learn to do that?" I asked about the intricate knots that he had tied so swiftly.
    He paused. "Jail."
    I glared at him in shock at what had just come out of his mouth. "Seriously?"
    His straight face broke into a grin. "No. Boy Scouts."

title: Contact Alpha, A story of sci fi fantasy
description:
The United Star of Gaia, an advanced space faring human civilization comes across a fantasy like planet in their journey to explore the star. This is the first time mankind had ever come across an alien civilization.
    An observatory orbital station was built to study the primitive civilization without exposing themselves to the local population. After half an Earth year of observation the station got a visit from an official and his escort fleets. But while the transport ships were in the process of docking with the station, something went wrong.
   The story explore many aspects from this era changing confrontation, from politics, society, emotions, relationships, humanity and life.
    
    ---///...THIS IS AN EMERGENCY. ALL PERSONEL ARE TO EVACUATE THE ORBITAL PLATFORM AND HEAD FOR THE NEAREST ESCAPE PODS. THIS IS AN EMERGENCY. ALL  PERSONEL...///---
    
    "What's going on? where's the head scientist?"
    
    "Sir , that would be me. Something went wrong with the gravity anchor and the station is falling, fast."
    
    "Can we do something about it?"
    
    "Sir please evacuate. We tried our best but the station is beyond saving now. We will be descending onto the atmosphere"
  
  Disclaimer:
  - The work is original, not a parody or a fanfiction of any existing series, only images belong to their respective creator. If there are any images or videos that I made I will inform.
  - This story is basically an isekai, high tech meets medieval magic. However it is written in a more original way, with bigger actors .
  - There may be R18 content in the future, both gore, violent and sexual. So please keep this in mind. I will however notify if there are such chapters.
   - Finally, there will be grim-dark content or at least mentions of grim-dark in this story. Be advised.
   - Final note: The story is also available on Royal Road, Webnovel and Scribble Hub.

authorBio:

title: ARC10
description:
[Book 1 of the ARC10 Trilogy]

**Winner of the 2017 Watty Storysmith award**

The President created an underground safe-haven for the survivors of the alien invasion. 

He built it to save them all from total annihilation.

He protects them, feeds them, keeps them under his ever-watchful gaze so they can live.

All he asks is that they obey.

Captain Janika Lorn doesn't want to obey. Not if it means spreading her legs and contributing to the President's precious eugenics program. As a perfect candidate for the Human Hope Project, she is obligated by law to make more citizens for the dying society. But all she wants is her freedom to fight the Invaders and protect the people who already exist.

If the mandated program wasn't bad enough, the worst part is trying to fulfill it with Captain Dean Freyer, her scientifically matched partner and best friend of sixteen years. 

Just as Captain Lorn is about to succumb to her fate, another opportunity arises.

A mysterious commanding officer asks her to lead a human refugee ship--to save humanity by evacuating the destroyed Earth and shuttling the remaining population to a new habitable exoplanet 400 light years away. 

The mission is perilous. Especially because now, standing between her and her freedom is the hostile alien hosts of her ship, the ARC10, a sister returned from the dead, an array of impossibly confusing alien tech, a rekindled heat between her and Dean, and a sexy militia chief she can't seem to keep her hands off of.

ARC10 is a romance-heavy sci-fi with the speculative horror of Atwood's The Handmaid's Tale and the military action of Battle: Los Angeles. 

Cover art by @FayLane
Copyright © 2016 by LL Montez

title: Conduit
description:
When back-alley mechanic Elijah Garret is approached by the company who destroyed his family, he has to decide whether to repair and upgrade their androids or let the machines rebel and start a war.

Season 1 of Conduit

***

For years, mechanical genius Elijah Garret has kept a low profile. As the world struggles to survive with minimal resources, he illegally repairs essential androids for those who can't afford certified technicians from megacorporation Lyons. The very same corporation that caused his father and grandfather's deaths, leaving him alone in the world save his beloved personal android, Victoria.

When Elijah is betrayed by a client, he's thrust directly into Lyons' crosshairs. And the company he's spent most of his life hiding from wants his help. The androids are malfunctioning, rebelling against their creators, and without their assistance, humanity is doomed. 

Lyons wants Elijah to program the next batch of androids-obedient and incapable of being otherwise-and ensure the survival of everyone in the world. But Elijah must determine whether what's being asked of him is the correct path, or even possible; and he must do it quickly. Because the androids have their own plans and Elijah is key to those as well...

title: The Structural Silence *COMPLETE* (Book 1 of The Transition of Pinn)
description:
"Not all women are successful in adapting to Pinn" The handsome man narrowed his eyes at the woman in the back "It saddens me to think of what happens to those who don't"

I gasped silently at the threat. So far none of the Pinns had said anything but hallow words of propaganda and encouragement. The room was unnaturally silent. The woman in back clearly understood the implied threat. Somehow the threat brings me back to the reality of the situation. I was here against my will. 
-----
Ivy wakes up to a changed life. Kidnapped by aliens and taken to a world where females no longer exist and human women are kidnapped as replacements, she must adjust to her new reality. Her role and purpose are clearly laid out in the alien society, she uncovers the horrors embedded within her new world and the man she is supposed to spend her life with has enabled in its hypocrisies. Ivy has to decide if she can love a man complicit in her trauma.

Gidean has been hurt in the past. He is wary of trying with a human woman again and has accepted his life without female companionship. His mother has other ideas and forces a young woman upon him knowing he would never send her away and risk exposing her to the true nature of the Pinn society. Gidean must choose give up the privileges of the only society he has known or risk hurt again.

Together they must overcome the wrongs of Pinn or face their lives subjected to it.

title: ABDUCTED: HOW THEY MET (bwwm)(completed)(EDITING)
description:
VICTORIA'S POV

He looked at me with hatred and disgust in his eyes. It was so intense; I was forced to look away. But then I turned back to look at him as well. I was the one who was supposed to have that look. They kidnapped me! Not the other way around. I should hate them. No matter how good looking they were. They took me against my will.

I will not be bullied.

He didn't speak, and neither did I.

XERIS' POV

She gaped at me like an idiot. Her mouth hung open and her eyes were wide. She realised what she was doing and stared at me. My mask slipped a little and she noticed. I stared at her, daring her to speak, her eyes turned away.

That's right.

But then they turned back and held mine. She was challenging me.



What will become of them?

Highest rank #1 - science fiction (21/05/2018)

title: First Light of a New Age
description:
In a distant realm where magic thrives, ferocious beasts shake mountains and rivers with their mighty roars, and individuals wield superhuman strength capable of reshaping their surroundings. It is a magical world where the strong rules.

But rampant corruption and chaos exist, where slavery, rape, murder, and discrimination against the weak were all but common. The magically superior people trample over the lesser unfortunate folks, using them as stepping stones and disposable assets. All hope for these downtrodden souls seems lost, but the wheels of fate have other plans for them.

In a faraway ocean, one that is filled with demons and sea monsters, a great technological civilization suddenly appeared, one that came from a world that is only filled with chaos and destruction. This civilization became the heaven for people seeking a stable and peaceful life. The Earth rose and seas parted ways, and the environment had totally changed for its adaptability.

Unfortunately, the inhabitants of this great technological civilization are all but manaless, arriving in a world where they are seen as inferior and as slaves. How will they react of finding themselves in a world where people can split mountains or bend the fabric of space, and where beings exist that even conventional weapons cannot defeat? How will they survive against deadly monsters, magical beasts, and superhumans that could threaten entire nations?

And how will the other powers that exist in this world react to a powerful, advanced nation filled with a race they deem inferior?

This is the story of one of the most powerful empires on Earth, and how it broke the balance of power and rose to the top.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: "There is this aching feeling, it pains my heart and fries my already half-human and half-machine heart. I awoke in a world of death and destruction, I am the only survivor. title: Hybrid: The Awakening
description:
Nobody expects something supernatural to happen to them. Those kind of things only happened in comics. Fairy Tales. Unrealistic dreams that you'd fall asleep to, silently wishing for them to come true.

At least, that was what these three teenagers thought.

It turns out that there is so much more to their simple universe than they ever could have imagined. After each finding a strange alien artifact, the teens are suddenly thrusted into an intergalactic war. Alien species everywhere are trying to hunt down the most powerful weapons in the galaxy.

And they are the ones in possession of it.

When they run into a girl that claims to be from another planet, the three kids learn about the power given to them and the responsibilities that come along with it. Instantly, they are the most popular people in the galaxy.

And for once, popularity couldn't feel more like a curse.

Fighting grudges, fear, and distrust, the Chosen humans must travel to the one place on Earth where they might be safe. And with strange new powers, the teenagers struggle to live in the unfamiliar world they thought they knew so well.

title: Eliona's War 1: Hesitant Healer
description:
In which an introverted healer learns to deal with the greatest horrors of his life - socializing, dungeons, and psychopathic NPCs. 

Season 1 of Eliona's War

***

Seth Veregin doesn't know the first thing about video games. But when he's gifted a beta copy of Eliona's War - a  Virtual Reality online game that's the very first of its kind - he reluctantly gives it a try.    

Thus, Severance the healer is born. All he wants is to quietly explore on his own without having to deal with other people.

Unfortunately for him, there's a few problems with that plan. Not only did he choose a class that's in high demand, but some players just won't take no for an answer. And the game NPCs? They definitely have a mind and an agenda of their own.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there. Thanks for dropping by!

Here, you will find long stories with loads of action, adventure and unnecessary humor, as well as a dash of fantasy or sci-fi for extra spice. There is no swearing and very little romance in my books, as I tend to write about family and friendships. I like to explore how people can rise past incredible adversity to become a better version of themselves.

I'm currently working on a few writing projects, but for now, the Eliona series is  updated twice a week. Updates for other stories will happen as I can.

As does every author, I love hearing what you think, so leave a comment or message if you'd like.  I don't bite, I promise! I love writing and I love chatting about writing.

HOWEVER - please don't message me with read requests. I barely have enough time to write, never mind read everyone's stories. Also, please don't self-promote on my page and in my books.  That's not cool, and I'll be removing those comments/posts as I see them. Thanks for understanding. ^_^

*****************
**Shameless Shout-Outs :**

@ToriHope-  A wonderful friend who's been endlessly encouraging and is the reason I eventually ended up on Wattpad. She makes beautiful covers, and has amazingly creative and unique ideas in her books.

This kind of animal was called Warpet. Shu Xiaohui was somewhat different from others. When the Tates invaded, he became a hamster and silently felt the presense of another powerful person.

Chen Chengduo watched his companions slowly find their warpet, and wondered where his one was until one day he saw Shu Xiaohui with his mouth full of melon seeds in the corner of the wall...

title: National Treasure Genius
description:
Qi An'an has shown unparalleled medical talent since she was a child, and was carefully cultivated by Mr. Qi as his heir. 

Just when the old man was expecting his granddaughter to be famous in the medical world in the future, he suddenly learned that his granddaughter had chosen a major that had nothing to do with medicine in college, and he was so angry that he almost passed out! 

It's a pity that the deal is done, and the old man can't change it. 

In a rage, he went straight to the city where his granddaughter went to college. 

A few years later-artificial intelligence was born! Holographic online games are no longer a dream! The gene fluid bombardment that can change physical fitness and increase lifespan appears! A man's dream mecha becomes a reality! ... 

One after another, inventions capable of changing the world appeared one after another. 

Countless people have been stunned by the leaping progress of the country. 

Even the people of China can't believe that the father of the country has suddenly become so awesome! 

At this time, Qi An'an appeared on the news broadcast. 

Looking at Qi An'an, who was indifferent and beautiful in the news broadcast, and learned that the achievements of super-high speed that have promoted the development of the times in recent years were all led by her, everyone went crazy. 

Mr. Qi, who was also sitting in front of the TV, looked at the familiar face of his granddaughter, spewed out a sip of tea, and his face was full of disbelief. 

This is his granddaughter? 

That medical genius granddaughter? 

The old man looked dull, and even suspected that he was hallucinating! 

__________

title: The Gift From Ghymora
description:
At a young age two unlikely friends set forth on a path to change the world. 
James, an outgoing extrovert, and Jacob, a sheltered genius could not be more different from one another, but as they grow older their friendship only grows with them. 
The Gift from Ghymora follows James, Jacob and the people closest to them as they make their way through the early years of life, and towards the pinnacle of human achievement. . .
But life doesn't always go as planned. The Earth is struck by a catastrophe that should not have slipped through the cracks, and in its wake an even darker fate is discovered. 
In their newfound positions of power, the two must utilize all of the resources available to help prevent the coming threat and save our world from certain doom.

title: Shadow and Steel
description:
🏆 Chosen as Sci-Fi Story of the Month by Wattpad's @ScienceFiction.
🏆 Featured on Wattpad's @ShortStory.
🏆 Awarded Best Science Fiction at the October 2024 Flames Awards.
🏆 Chosen as Book of the Month by @CroodsGirl

Shadow and Steel: A Short Story Series.

In a time where mankind has reached the stars, the light of progress does not shine on all. In the shadow of the Terran Commonwealth's steel grip lies the Fringe: a wild, lawless frontier where survival comes at the the barrel of a blaster. Here, smugglers, outlaws, and desperate souls navigate a world of dangerous alliances and deadly betrayals, carving out lives amidst the chaos of interstellar power struggles.

In this unforgiving universe, technology is currency, and secrets worth dying for are traded in dark corners. Some fight for freedom, others for redemption, but in a galaxy ruled by cold steel and colder hearts, the line between hero and villain is as blurred as the stars themselves.

In a world where every decision could be your last, only the strong survive amidst Shadow and Steel.

Content Warning: This series contains violence, gore, death, harassment, strong language, drug use, psychological trauma, and mature situations. Reader discretion is advised.

title: ROGER [Wattpad Version]
description:
[Book 1 in the CODES series] || Clara is stubborn and installs Roger, an AI program, inside her head in the most unconventional way, but because she's severed Roger's ties to his data, Clara is the only free citizen within a city that wants her mind... and her soul.

                                                                **     

In 2102, after the fall of separate nations, the world stands unified and equal. Under the Province, citizens know only the perfection the Government has to offer. 

And that's the only world Clara knows; simplicity and technological bliss. So, when Government officials announce the VF program, equipped with the highest artificial intelligence science has to offer, she is all for it. Who wouldn't want a computer assistant that not only takes care of your everyday needs, but is meant to be your bestest friend, too?It sounded as perfect as Province made life out to be. But all good things come with a price.

What no one knew about the program meant to mimic the human mind, was that it wanted the human soul. Because no utopia can be built on truths, and no amount of sublimity can cover lies.

Clara's only means of survival is the one rogue VF in her mind: Roger.

**
| Completed | Exclusive to Wattpad

title: Remember Her? (an II au)
description:
What makes a person lose their mind? Why does history repeat itself so maliciously?

History repeats itself, tragedies included... But what if, when history repeated, it was worse? 9 years ago, she saved defeated a tyrant, but sacrificed herself in the process. Her friends haven't seen her since. She was presumed dead... But what if her friends could see her again? What if she was still alive somewhere, and never truly dead after all? But what if the tyrant, who SHOULD have been dead, was alive too? Would the heroes get their revenge? Or will he take over, once and for all?

Story and art by me
Inanimate Insanity by Animationepic

title: OGENUS EARTH 🌎 🌊 {Dystopian Sci-Fi Adventure}
description:
FEATURED on the Wattpad Adventure 'Voyages and Sea Epics' list! 

Not so far in the distant future, the Earth is drowning in our mistakes. The permafrost has melted. Millions have been wiped out. Thousands more suffer to breathe on land while facing down brutal raiders and monsters too fantastic to be natural. 

As a Tinker, Meg's not entitled to many of the luxuries most citizens enjoy aboard Arc City One. She was a mistake to be forgotten. A blip in time destined to be erased by obscurity. 

Until she spotted the anomaly. 



This is an underwater sci-fi adventure filled with robots, pirates, seafaring rogues, terrifying monsters, a few stolen kisses, and a murderous plot set to a timer that's about to explode!

title: Cyber Witch
description:
Years ago when a young orphaned girl, advanced cybernetics were surgically installed into Avia's brain. Able to hack into virtually any computer, control system, or AI, she and others like her became child soldiers in an interstellar war. But once the war was won, the Sol Federation turned on them, labeling them Aberrants, dangers to humanity to be deactivated and locked away. Now on the run, Avia fled from a fate she considered worse than death. 

Zach, a former rebellious member of the social Elite, traded jail time for bounty hunting. With a relentlessness Avia did not understand, he pursued her across the galaxy. But Zach had other plans for Avia than turning her in.

All Avia ever wanted was a normal life someplace where she was loved, and she loved in return. But between a humanity threatening conspiracy and fellow Aberrants that truly earned the label, that seemed an impossible dream.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my corner of Wattpad!

I am a retired chemical engineer who came into Wattpad as a reader, but soon tried my hand at fiction. My previous writing experience consisted of technical and research reports. With no delusions of fame and fortune, I write mainly for the sheer enjoyment of it, and Wattpad provided a good way to share and interact with others. You will find primarily science fiction and fantasy, but I sometimes dabble in other genres. Romance or family subplots are common.

Following is a list of my stories. If you would like a sampling of my writing style, try one of the recent short story collections.

title: The Autobiography Of An Alien
description:
!! Sequel to In Search of Home. If you haven't read that, you'll be a little confused! !!

After the humans invaded - somewhat; it was his fault, really - his planet, they left a gaping hole in his heart. It took the form of one Kohgrash. Rulshkka had an entire planet to lead, he needed to move on. If only for his people's sake. 

Well, it helped that Kohgrash came back. Helped immensely, really. 

***

Viktor and Vok'Rul live life. As ambassador, Viktor struggles - and thrives - in equal measure. New planets, new friends, new allies. And, of course, new enemies. 

There is an entire intergalactic alliance that both Kohgrash and Rulshkka must navigate. Of course, by introducing the humans to the Alliance, a certain species takes notice. Their attention is less than welcome. 

But that's just life. Rulshkka and Kohgrash navigate it, together. For better or for worse.

title: The Four Baristas of the Apocalypse (sample)
description:
When aliens invade, four baristas are forced to become the saviours of the world. Grab your double-shot of java and strap in - it's going to be a bumpy ride!
 
                                                                      *****
 
In the Earth's darkest hour, unexpected heroes are stirring... their coffee, that is. Four baristas on a camping trip are under-qualified to save the world from an alien invasion.  But thanks to a hologram with no fashion sense, newly developed superpowers and an alien with a guilty conscience, they've landed the job anyway! So grab your double-shot of java, your blueberry muffin and strap in - Hasta barista, baby.

[[2018 Wattys winner and twice featured]]

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

Please note this is a sample of the book, which has been published and is available for purchase:

Ebook: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09WKFVKQJ

Paperback: https://www.amazon.com/dp/1644342154
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I suspect most of us have a decent book (or two) inside of us; the challenge is getting it out. Well, and then getting somebody to read it. But hey, one challenge at a time.

Despite all evidence to the contrary, I'd always assumed said book (or two) would one day emerge fully formed from my fevered brain, but funnily enough I had to actually start writing for it to happen.  Turns out, the key to becoming an author is to write stuff.  Huh - who knew?

Since that seminal discovery I've won a Watty, been featured a few times, become a member of both Wattpad Stars and Creators, been part of the Paid Stories and Wattpad Originals Programs and had a book published.

And you thought they had standards around here.

title: Indulekha: The Sister of The Pandavas •  Mahabharat
description:
𝑰𝒏𝒅𝒖𝒍𝒆𝒌𝒉𝒂, a young cheerful girl from Kaliyug, is reborn as the sister of the Pandavas after she dies. She was the apple of their eyes, their soul, their peace.
She was Yudishthir's mind.
She was Bheem's strength.
She was Arjun's eyes.
She was Nakul's speed.
She was Sahadev's knowledge.
She was their Indu. 
But, she didn't know that she was Karn's life. 
But what if she wants to help all of them instead?
What if she tries to avoid Draupadi's marriage with the 5 Pandavas, what if she tries to unite Karn and Arjun, what if she tries to stop the dyut sabha?
What if she changes the well-known tale of Mahabharata?
And between the cobwebs of trust, lies and admiration, was stuck  𝑰𝒏𝒅𝒖𝒍𝒆𝒌𝒉𝒂, the Sister of the Pandavas.
.

What if death forgot you? 

In a future that could be ours, Lizzie, a suicidal teen-age girl, barely navigates her own life. Then everything falls apart. In an apocalyptic land nearly deserted by disease, she lacks reasons to live until a shocking turn of events reveals a phone number. Her call pulls her dangerously cross-country to meet a stranger she thought was dead. 

In a world where there is plenty of food, plenty of gas, plenty of space... fear, anger and a lust for power still control the patterns of human life. 

This coming of age, edgy young adult novel is the debut of a former alternative high school teacher.  If you like this, try Toils and Snares, a Deserted Lands novella, sampled on Wattpad.

authorBio:
Growing up in the Pacific Northwest, Robert L. Slater wanted to be an astronaut or a rock star. At 42, he gave up those dreams to become a writer of science fiction and fantasy, where he can pretend to be both.

Like some of his characters, he has a propensity for speaking in lines from 80s movies, drinking Mountain Dew and eating pizza. He loves music as a listener, a zealous fan, a guitar player, and a singer/songwriter.

After nearly 20 years as a schoolteacher, and 35 as a teenager, he is beginning to have a hint of insight into young-adulthood. He has been in that hood a long time!

Dear bullies:

See that girl you just called fat? She is starving herself. You know that girl you just called ugly? She spends hours putting on makeup hoping people will like her. You've either hurt them badly or ruined their life.

title: Rebirth: Controlled Nuclear Fusion
description:
Achieving high scores is not frightening; it is the mastery of one's scores that is truly daunting. Reborn as a young scientist, the protagonist submits partial formulas and data for controlled nuclear fusion in order to gain admission to a prestigious university. The result sends shockwaves through the nation's foremost experts. Leading his country to break through the technological barriers imposed by the West, the protagonist ascends to become the dominant force in planetary science and technology.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
WchaoJim, born by the picturesque Dongting Lake in Hunan, is a 49-year-old individual who embodies both rational thinking and the pursuit of dreams. In his university years, he chose to study Computer Information Systems, thus embarking on a career path that spans both technology and management. Throughout his professional journey, he has held various roles, including database management, network supervision, assistant to the chairman, and human resources and administrative manager, accumulating a wealth of cross-disciplinary experience and managerial insight. Over the course of his career, he has consistently believed that "the fusion of technology and humanity, reason and emotion, management and creativity" is the driving force behind both personal and team development.

While the world perceives him as an extroverted, eloquent professional manager adept at handling complex tasks and guiding teams with precision, the true WchaoJim possesses a far more reserved nature. He is well aware that the outward confidence and sociability he displays in the workplace are more a reflection of the roles he must play than his authentic self. His character leans towards calm introspection and a love for solitude, in which he often contemplates the meaning of life. Despite being in a work environment rife with communication and social interaction, he maintains a profound awareness of human nature and engages in constant self-reflection. His inner world favors quiet individual exploration rather than the group engagement often expected of him. This internal conflict makes him tread carefully in the professional realm, yet it also fuels his deep understanding of life and the future, igniting his intense desire to write.

title: ARENA 2088 - THE IMPACT (first book of the Trilogy)
description:
In 2016, football legend Samuel Arena was on top of the world. But a mysterious eruption on Mount Etna hurls him seventy-two years into a dark future he cannot recognize. Now, in a world where human and machine identities blur, Samuel must survive in a reality that defies everything he once knew.

Will he reclaim his past-or be consumed by a future that no longer has a place for him?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello readers!
I'm Gabriel Minnella, a dystopian-sports fiction author. I write about time travel, epic challenges, and human champions who become heroes in a world where reality and virtuality, humanity and artificiality, blend beyond recognition.

A bit about myself: inspiration has always been a challenge. I look out my window and see only endless rows of buildings-no enchanting landscapes, no skyline, no beaches, not even my beloved Mount Etna. Yet, from the first to the last page of the Arena 2088 trilogy, I found my muse in the music of the Coldplay, whose sounds brought my sci-fi vision to life and gave depth to the journey of my characters.

My mantra? 'Will, Faith, Motivation'-just like the main character Samuel Arena himself. It's what drives my writing and fuels every twist and turn of my story. I hope you'll enjoy this adventure as much as I enjoyed writing it.

Have a legendary day and happy reading!
(EPISODE 11 COMING ON 9 JANUARY 2025)

title: OTHERS (Formerly The Scarlet Effect)

The pandemic was just the beginning.
      
After an unknown virus sweeps across the globe, Aurora and two other survivors seek out safety in a bomb shelter with enough supplies to last a few years. She doesn't know what they want from her, but she soon discovers the truth: about her captors, the universe, and who she really is--a reality that leaves her breathless.

Kentucky 1875

Cavanaugh, Jamison, Ian and Andrew are four brothers torn apart by life and by tragedy and drawn back together because of the same. Kentucky 2011

Nicole lives a lonely, simple life. A life void of excitement. She'd been burned enough times in her life to know that tragedy was normal and everyone eventually hurt you.  Her quiet life is ripped to pieces the day she discovers four cowboys in her empty house claiming to be from 1875.

Can she help the brothers learn what they were sent to learn and find a way back home? Or are they truly there to teach her a lesson in trust and love?

title: The Young General's Wife is MR. Lucky
description:
Description
Yu Jinli* was a koi fish who had cultivated for a thousand years.

He had taken the shape of a human being, and possessed the ability to predict fortune and change luck.

He was supposed to be a popular Mr. Lucky but who could have thought that...

"Sir, your forehead is covered by gloomy air. I'm afraid there is a looming threat of fatal disaster waiting for you..." Yu Jinli said with all seriousness.

All of a sudden, a big flower pot descended from above and hit that man directly on the head.

"Buddy, the top of your head is green. I'm afraid that..."

Before Yu Jinli finished, the young man opposite him received a call and headed to a hotel nearby to catch his girlfriend in the act of adultery.

"Brother, you..."

Everyone cried: Lord General, please take good care of your wife and don't let him throw curses around... TAT

Yu Jinli felt frustrated: Obviously, I'm warning them with good intentions.

The nationally acknowledged most perfect man, the young general: Dear, don't get upset because of those shortsighted people. Come home with me and I'll make you chestnuts roasted with brown sugar.

Those "shortsighted" people: ...

*Note: The two Chinese characters "Jin Li" in the name sounds similar to the two Chinese characters for koi fish. 'Jinli' is now a symbol of luck in internet slang.

title: Broken
description:
Liviya Burch had a wonderful life, loving parents and a bright future filled with love. Everything for her was going according to plan, that is until her eighteenth birthday when her entire world fell apart. It was the day she discovered she had a flaw. 

She couldn't fall in love.

Unable to bond to humans Liv is considered broken by those looking over her case. Now twenty-five years old and all out of hope, she was given one last chance at finding her soul mate but when her flaw causes her to fail once again, she is slated for recycling. The law is the law and broken things must be recycled but fate is ever changing and Liv finds love when she least expects it.

However, Liv discovers that life and love are never easy when everyone around her threatens to tear her and her soul mate apart because the first of many loves will never be easy for the winds of change blow harshly and the darkness will fight back against its fiery light.

title: FISH SHOP [m!yanderes x f!reader]
description:
You lived a pretty good life. Huge mansion, loving parents, endless cash. You never had to work a day in your life, never had to get your hands dirty. But, where did all the money come from? As far as you knew, your parents owned a single fish shop. And it wasn't even world-wide famous, it was local. You didn't come from a long line of wealth, either. Simply put, something fishy was going on with your family. But, if it ain't broke, don't fix it. In this case, you weren't going to snoop around for cracks in your perfect life. And you definitely weren't going to question the men around you who had some, uh, odd behavior towards you. Possibly obsessive behavior. You just wanted to live lavishly and happily.

title: Deadland Rising (part 3 of the Deadland Saga)
description:
Winter has arrived. 
It has been nearly one year since the zombie hordes claimed the world. As the plague eats away at its victims' bodies, the Fox survivors search for a safe place to rebuild what they have lost. But a dangerous new threat has risen, hunting them from every direction. To survive, Cash, Clutch, and their small band of refugees must put their faith in a group of strangers and a new government with radical plans. It will take all of the Fox survivors' strength and courage to endure in this barren, hostile world. Even that might not be enough. 

Deadland Rising, the conclusion of the Deadland Saga, is a journey through Dante Alighieri's "Paradiso", the tale on the seven virtues, reimagined zombie apocalypse style!


(Note: This is a draft so please excuse any errors. The finished novel is available in paperback, ebook, and audiobook).
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
In the mood for zombies? You can read the entire DEADLAND SAGA (all three books plus a couple of short stories) right here on Wattpad!

Interested in writing a novel? Check out my TIDY GUIDE on writing, self-editing, and publishing your book.

To stay up to date on my new releases, both on Wattpad and in bookstores, join my readers club at www.rachelaukes.com/join.

If you like holding a book in your hand or listening to stories... nearly all my novel-length stories on Wattpad are also available in paperback and on audiobook. You can ask your local bookstore or library to order a copy for you.

title: Travel to the beast world and become a veterinarian
description:
After graduating, Jian Mo returned to his hometown and opened a veterinary hospital.
One day, he heard a bang on the roof while he was sleeping.
He thought it was a mouse, so he went out to get canned food and kidnapped a beautiful kitten.
The kitten was really beautiful, but when Jian Mo kissed and hugged it, the kitten looked a little confused.
At this moment, Jian Mo heard a loud shout, and turned around to see a big cat bigger than him standing behind him.
The big cat stared at Jian Mo and said in a rough voice: "Let go of my brother!"
Now it was Jian Mo's turn to be confused.
He raised his head.
The surrounding parks, cities, streets and vehicles turned into forests, snow-capped mountains, grasslands and tribes without knowing when.
--He traveled to the world of orcs!
The only thing to be thankful for is that he studied veterinary medicine, which is a suitable major.
From animal medicine to veterinarian medicine... well, it is not impossible if you try hard.

title: Infection Runs Deep
description:
Dr. Elizabeth Hunter thought her life as second year resident could not get anymore frantic than her ER rotation. Crashing heart rates, bottoming out blood pressures, and hysterical patients were something that she could handle. She'd been trained for it after all. But when a patient came into the ER with an unknown disease that Elizabeth has no idea how to treat, she found herself thrown into chaos as the newfound illness plagues the US. After a few close calls, Elizabeth joined ranks with Sergeant Luke Falls who lead her to a military base. 

Elizabeth tried her best to navigate the unknown in her post-apocalyptic reality, fighting off infected while trying to treat them as patients. In conjunction with Luke and her new comrades, she discovered some particularly troubling information of the etiology of the disease and must make crucial decisions with the lives of those she cares for most hanging in the balance.

---

"This is a bad idea," he warned as I started down the hall. 

"You know, usually I'm the one saying that," I said with a smirk. 

"If your crazy-ass ideas are the voice of reason, I can't believe you and your friends have lasted this long." He shook his head. "Someone needs to talk some sense into you guys."

"I don't need sense. Just luck." The threshold to the lobby loomed ahead.  With one last look over my shoulder, I blew a kiss in his direction.  "Wish it for me."
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Programmed Love (Robot Apocalypse AU: Yandere x Mute Reader)
description:
In a world fallen into destruction by robots, many must fight to survive. The human race has evolved to be quicker, stronger, and less trusting. After a young girl's parents are discovered by the Patrolling Robots with nothing worth giving and too old to partake in the Arena, they are savagely killed, leaving the young girl orphaned and scarred. After growing up on the run without anyone to turn to, and no way to communicate if she ever did stumble upon fellow humans, she comes to a doomed fate. Whoever said love had died away with the rise of the robots?

title: InvaSUn
description:

Riley Davis, a college junior who aspires to be a historian, James Wei, a hot-headed part timer and a young boy named Aiden are all forced to stick together to survive. And maybe, to find out why the creatures attacked in the first place. What are the creatures, and why have they come? title: I'm In A Apocalyptic World With A Gacha System (Adoption)
description:
Hey guys this is just a experiment story, so that I can get the hang of doing Orginal content. I mean I can't always do fan fiction as sooner or later. I won't be able to find anything to write about. 
 Anyway let's get right into it, and you guys tell me what you think about it. 
_______________________________________________________

Have you ever been bullied or hated just because your body is different? Have you ever been betrayed by your friends because they found out your secret? Or abandoned by your parents just because they determined you were a flawed child?

Heh......, Well that's my whole life right there. Hi, My name is Feyorra Golden, I am currently 18 years old making me a legal adult in the world....... but that doesn't matter. 

You see when I was born, My mother and Father were disgusted by me since when I came out......I was different. Let me explain I'm Intersex, I have a female body but I have a penis instead of a vagina. 

Not wanting anything to do with me, My mother and Father gave me to my grandparents who took care of me happily. My grandfather owned his own dojo in the forest that was near the city making it easier for me to go to school. Though inside the dojo he taught me several things from Hand to hand combat, Kendo, Archery, and How to use pole arms. It was extremely fun times but eventually I had stopped to focus more on school. But now I think I needed those skills more than ever as now the world is broken out in chaos and the only way for me to survive ,Is to use my skills along with my mysterious Gacha System. 

Travel With me as we make our way to the top in order to break free of these chain and shackles.
_______________________________________________________

I hope you enjoy 😉

#1 In Futanari 9/4/21

title: Rejection To Perfection
description:
Previously Known as Rejected Female Alpha returns with A new Mate and A Stronger Pack

Fatso... Ugly... Disgrace... Loner... Pathetic... Freak... Weirdo... A joke... Dirt....... Annalisa Silverman is the daughter of the Alpha of Dark Blaze pack, but is treated like a lower ranked wolf by her classmates. Her own brother doesn't like to be seen with her at school, and treats her worst. Was she ever gonna have happy life?
	That question was answered on the day of her birthday. She met her mate and he changed her life. No, this is not a happy meeting of meets mate, they mate, and they live happily ever after. He rejects her for who she is, a fat ugly female reject. Torn by the rejection, Annalisa leaves her pack with only a letter left behind, promising that one day she will return The Most Powerful Female Alpha that anyone as ever seen.
	Continue and read to find out who she is and what she has become. When she returns she is not the same fat, weak little girl anymore. She is now back with a New Mate and Stronger pack, but will she be able to stop the threat towards her father's pack? Will she become their new Alpha? Will she take her ex-mate back, after he rejected her? You will soon find out in "Rejected Female Alpha returns with A New Mate and Stronger Pack."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi! My name is Dezy Ville. I love to write stories about the supernatural. I love to read many, many, many books. Lol. I'm an artist, but sadly not a professional. I am twenty-two, but in someways i'm still a kid. :) I am a medical assistant. My dream is to someday become an Artist/Author. I went to college  to better my life, but this dream (Artist/Author) has been alive for many years.

        I started writing when I was in fifth grade. The reason I started writing was because I had a best friend who was writing a fan-fiction story on Twilight. It is because of her that I became interested in writing. My artistic abilities start when I was very young, because some of my family members were artist.

       I have many family members encoraging me to pursue my dreams. It is because of them I have been continuing. My friends are also a big part of the people who encourage me as well. I am thankful to them. Even my teachers helped me get better at writing my stories, but of course they were English teachers. I have wrote many books, though I am going to upload them one by one.

      My books that I have written are:
                The Ten powers (First book I wrote in fifth grade, so needs a lot of work)
                The Twwin Powers (The second story I wrote, but I wrote in sixth or seventh grade)
                Sketch Town (I wrote them in ninth and tenth grade. This is the next story I will be uploading once I am done with this one.)
                Rejected Female Alpha returns with A New Mate and Stronger Pack (Completed)
                The Hunt for The truth, Without Really Knowing... (Sequel /\)

     Well thats all I have to say, Thanks for reading!
                                                                                                                       ~Dezy Ville~


P.S. About my status, I'm trying to see how long I can keep it going! LOL

If you have a Kik please find me Author_Dezy_Ville
Message me anytime!

title: Queen of the Ravaged
description:
In a world devastated by a century-old virus that reanimates the dead into something far worse, survival is a rare and fragile hope. Among the few immune survivors is Ava, the Princess of Theris, a small settlement in Southeast Asia. Her people struggle to rebuild amidst the ruins of a broken world, but survival comes at a steep cost.

The King of Eldis holds the key to their future. With advanced technology, resources, and rumored cures, Eldis could be the salvation Ava's people desperately need. But when the King sends out a summons for a queen, Ava faces an impossible choice: risk everything by marrying a man surrounded by whispers of both monstrous deeds and appearance, rebellion and numerous assassination attempts, or turn away and potentially doom her people.

In this shattered world, Ava must decide whether to sacrifice her freedom and her principles for the survival of her people, all while uncovering the secrets of a kingdom that may hold the power to save-or destroy-what remains of humanity.

title: 𝙈𝙄𝙉𝙀 (𝙔𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙧𝙚!𝙃𝙪𝙨𝙗𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙭 𝙍𝙚𝙖𝙙𝙚𝙧) (𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙎𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙡)
description:
(Y/n) knows the truth. She knows what he is. What a monster he can, and could be. But it was too late for her to know, now she is trap. Trap inside a new home, a new country and a possessive husband. Now was the time, the time to strive for power. 

(y/n) is now on a mission to break free from her manipulative husband, and break free from the chains of guilt and weakness. While on the other hand, the two siblings are on the run for two things; Vengeance and love. 

Along the way of this tight journey will be betrayal, violence and pasts. Along the way, we would meet new people, but not all people we cross are friendly. Not all of them are good. And not all of them are entirely human. Will (y/n) break free from her emotions that makes her weak? Will she break free from her husband who had gave her nothing but hell? Or would she be the same and never to be seen and exist? Read now, the sequel of Cancer.

All credits go to the rightful owner of the cover and the artworks that is contained inside. If you don't like your art to be reposted, please message me and I'll take it down asap.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: -Inactive-

title: I Want Winter
description:
A girl, who hates winter because of the cold, had to run through ice as it cracked  and she fell in the ice. 
When she woke up, she had time travel in a totally different era. She finds out she is the concubine of the 4th prince, who is a serious cold prince with other concubines and soon will have a wife.  
She just wants to go home, and the only way home is falling in the ice again- she assumes; however, winter just finished so she has to wait for a whole year.  Therefore, she has kept a low profile but it didn't exactly plan out the way she wanted as drama continues coming at her door.  Will she wait or try to find her own way home?

title: Spartan Total Warrior x Gate
description:
In the land of Greece located in Lakonia the Valley of Warrior is home to the Warrior City of Sparta. Sparta is a warrior state where the boys from age 7 were trained to become Spartan warriors. As Greece is still at peace. The mysterious gate suddenly appeared near the City of Athens and the army known as The Empire Sadera or Saderan Empire led by Zolzal El Ceasar. The Spartans heard they attacking the City of Athens and they were planning to attack the City of Sparta. The Spartans were born to be warriors and they were ruled by the King who was the son of Zeus the God of War.

His name is Achilles of Sparta, The Son of Zeus and King of Olympus who married to mortal woman named Cassandra. Leo became the King of Sparta following the footsteps of the Legendary Warrior King Leonidas I of Sparta and the great legendary warrior who died in battle in Thermopylae in the Greco-Persian War named Achilles leader of the Myrmidons who joined Greece against the Trojans in Greco-Trojan War.

Now in the conflict known as the Greco-Sadera War, a war combined Sparta, Athens, Corinth, Arcadia, Thebes, and other Greek City states against the Sadera Empire led by Spartan Demigod and King of Sparta, Achilles of Sparta
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I really love to write fanfictions about  Assassin's Creed meets other Characters. I am really glad that I have worked hard to write them. And to you who read Wattpad, I want you all to be careful for today. The Templars are out there, they will try to control your cities, your governments, and your schools. Do not be afraid. We will fight for your freedom and it's time for us to fight them back. No matter how tough the battle. Remember:
Nothing is True, Everything is Permitted

title: Eagle X, Mission 21: CTRL
description:
Mercenary life is rough, especially for the Eagle X team. Wanted by galactic governments and clandestine organizations, eking out a living seems harder and harder every standard year. On a solo mission, Renegade finds herself backed into a corner and must rely on new allies to survive. Meanwhile, Liam and the rest of the team travel through alien space on a difficult supply run.

Machines, clones, aliens, secret agents, and warships, our heroes will need to broaden their horizons and trust new skills if they're going to succeed.

Join Spider, Raven, Renegade, and the rest of the team as they stock up for their war against the Pale Garden.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Lem, a father of two with a love for writing which started as an itch in desperate need of a scratch, but has grown into a bonfire slowly consuming me. I write because I fear what would happen if I don't, I fear the flames might eradicate my very existence if left unchecked. I write because I'm a writer.

I love my wife, my sons, Sci-Fi, fantasy, and gaming. I have stories about each.

The Gifted: First Testament is a paranormal urban fantasy about a man at war with his insecurities and demons hell-bent on spreading their corruption.  Romance/Action/Monsters/Demons

Tales from the Bright Waste are a series of stories set in a bleak future where light is man's only salvation because the monsters are real, but not always on the outside. This includes Light, Glorious Light and its Interquel Roar Lioness. Roar.
Monsters/Romance/Post-Apocalypse/LGBTQIA

Eagle X is a series about mercenaries navigating  space, and trying to turn a buck while evading the authorities, and the shadow government out for their blood.
Space Travel/Aliens/Robots/Action

Burning Road is a dark fantasy riff on the classic boy and girl from different sides of the train tracks except Miminda is from the world of monsters and Khouri is a monster hunter from our world.  Its full of adventure, danger, fun, and misery.
Monsters/Adventure/Action

The Executioner's Playlist is an urban paranormal story about an enforcer for the toughest gangster in New York who steps on the wrong toes and unleashes havoc upon the city.
Urban/Paranormal/Action

The Lords of the Night series takes place in an alternate universe where the monsters of myth and legend live alongside us in secret. This dark world is full of stories including Raving Moon and Frosting & Fur.
Darkfantasy/Paranormal/werewolf/vampire/ContemporaryLit

I have image boards on Pinterest for all of these

You can find me on TikTok and Instagram

description:
You are part of The Endurance crew. You've known Lara for a long time and she introduced you to the Endurance after college. 

In this story the reader (Y/N) will be part of the 2013's Tomb Raider adventure. Your colleagues don't know but you've had a crush on Lara forever. How will your involvement change the Yamatai adventure? And will your true feelings ever come to light? You'll find out in this retelling of the Tomb Raider story.

title: Human Code
description:
Javier Morales is an android who only wished to be accepted in death as he was in life, but when rogue androids kidnap his sister and destroy the city, he must put himself last to save what matters most. 
  
                                                               ***
Javier Morales died in an accident on July 3rd, 2016. Unable to accept his death, his parents request Bionics Pharmaceuticals to recreate him -- a premium android to be their son.  He is created as close to the person he is supposed to be, but reality sets in. And now, to his family, he's a memory. And to the rest world, he shouldn't exist. For Javi, it was life. And he came to terms with his fate. Until rogue androids start attacking other androids and civilians. And kidnap his kid sister. In order to save her and everyone else, he has to dig into his core to regain control of his mind and body. But does he have enough heart to regain his soul?

** [This story will become free on July 24, 2023]

title: Finding Darkness
description:
The big city can be a dangerous place for anyone, but for someone new to its dangers, it can be deadly. Recently escaped from the people that created her, Six is on the run, out in the world for the first time in her short life. Stalked by a team of the best trackers on the planet, she knows her odds of escape are slim at best.
Yet these men are not her most pressing concern. Not when the planet that she was born into is no longer controlled by humans. When every person on the planet lives under the shadow of a race none can defeat. Where your only option is bow the knee, or die.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am now a Black belt in Taekwondo. It is a great feeling to know all my hard work paid off. I practice with a Imperial O katana almost every day.  A lot of my martial arts work bleeds into my stories. Most of my characters are good with a blade.

I live near the Lake Michigan lake shore so I have the most beautiful summers, and some of the most brutal winters anywhere. We can an often do get six feet or more of snow in one winter season.

Please cut me some slack if my grammar and spelling is sub-par. I am terribly dyslexic. Editing is like clawing backwards over a mile of busted razor sharp glass. But I'm trying.

I would love for you to check out my stories if you feel so inclined. Feedback would be wonderful as would your pointing out any mistakes you might find. Just please be gentle, I write as a hobby, I am in no way a pro at this.

title: Doomsday Mobile Home
description:
It's been years since the prophecy of the end of the world, and when everyone thinks it's nonsense, the end of the world has come.

Yashiro was located in his backyard tree house, so he escaped a bullet, and since then, he has a mobile home to do the next.

Others are still worried about how to build a safe home, for a family's livelihood, but Yashiro is lying on the canopy gnawing fruit boringly counting the stars. This little life is really as comfortable as it is, where you can see the end of the world?

PS：

1. Mainly Wen, HE.

2. Any disaster can occur except for the zombies

title: The Science Fiction Experience
description:
[NEW] Welcome! We're thrilled to announce that the Sci-Fi team is releasing a series of challenges, activities, and stories for the next 15 days to help rejuvenate our community. The Science Fiction Experience will include top tier challenges, mind-boggling discussions, awesome games, and so much more.

"Readers familiar with that genre [science fiction] have met the spaceship, the alien, and the mad scientist before. They know more about them than the writer does." -- Ursula K. Le Guin

This piece is meant to offer a taste of the science fiction experience-a glimpse into the genre that we hope you'll enjoy.  At the very least, we hope it inspires you to check out our Science Fiction Reading List if you haven't already!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to the official Wattpad profile for the Science Fiction Community and the place to be for exciting new Sci-Fi stories, information about famous Science Fiction authors, badass contests and challenges and the chance to be featured in one of our anthologies or reading lists.


Come in and discover the wonders of Science Fiction with us!

Please remember-while diving into wormholes, surfing on solar flares, or ordering a drink at the Outer Rim Bar: stay friendly and positive! We're proud to be a multicultural community uniting various species from across the multiverse(s).
