title: Their Sister, Their Strength
description:
When thirteen-year-old Maddie's world is shattered by her mother's sudden death, she discovers the existence of six older brothers she was separated from at the age of three. As she grapples with the unravelling of her once-familiar life, her brothers strive to protect her from lurking dangers. Amidst a dangerous terrain rife with secrets and threats, Maddie draws strength in the unbreakable bond of family as she navigates the shadows of her past to forge a new future.

This the rewrite of 'Their Sister, Their Strength'. You'll notice that despite the same characters and world, there are several key differences. This is inspired by @werkapisze's Rodzina Monet which I'd highly recommend to read if you haven't already.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Currently rewriting 'Their Sister, Their Strength'. Both the original and the current rewrite can be found on my profile. I update every Tuesday or every other Tuesday.

title: The World Which Is
description:
Dennis is days away from turning sixteen and picking his class, but it's not the joyful time it should be as his father used his contacts to limit the selection to those classes he considers safe, in an attempt to protect his son.

Grounded after rushing off to help during a monster wave attack on the town, Dennis gets an offer to sneak out to enjoy his last day before being shackled to a boring class. unable to resist, He finds himself thrust into an adventure that might end up changing everything about is life, his place in his town, and how he views the world.

This is the world which is, a world change by the System thirty years prior. a world filled with wonders, terrors, and people after something Dennis got his hands on.

All Dennis wanted to do with his life was be a guard in his town; keep it and its people safe. Now, he may have to think larger.

Much, much larger.

title: I fought zombies in ancient times
description:
Yu Linyuan was a good young man born in the first year of the apocalypse. He lived to the age of 18. Once when he was collecting supplies outside, he encountered a zombie tide, and the car he was driving ran out of gas, so after his death he traveled to the ancient times that were only depicted in the apocalyptic museum. Although there are no electronic devices in the apocalypse, he can finally live a comfortable life with a blue sky and delicious food. It's wonderful to think about it! However, what Yu Linyuan didn't expect was that since he could travel here, the zombie virus could also be. Yu Linyuan looked at his superpowers, not only did he become stronger, but he continued to fight zombies! CP: Yu Linyuan (top) × Chu Ci (bottom) [The sequel to "I opened a Taoist temple in ancient times", please pre-collect~] Liu Yichi inherited his family's dilapidated 
Taoist temple. He failed the postgraduate entrance examination and was preparing for the second exam. He was attracted by the tranquility of the Taoist temple. Unexpectedly, not long after he moved in, the Taoist temple collapsed due to disrepair. Liu Yichi traveled to thousands of years ago and saw the man who had enjoyed the incense of his family's ancestral Taoist temple for thousands of years! ! ! What should I do if I have a crush on the person I have been worshipping? Waiting online, urgent! Li Su has recovered his memory. He died once. Later, because of one person, he died many times again. He saw the person who made him live and die again. This time, he decided that he would take revenge. How many ways are there to take revenge on your enemies? Waiting online, urgent! CP: Traveling through a thousand years to open a Taoist temple·Liu Yichi (top) x Enjoying the incense in a thousand-year Taoist temple·Li Su (bottom) CP: Focusing on chasing people·Liu Yichi (top) x Focusing on revenge·Li Su (bottom)

title: From the Abyss of Stars
description:
The seasoned player of "Abyss of Stars," the [Starfall Master] Li Zi, brings a system template and travels to the game's world, arriving in the era of the game's beta version.

This is the worst of times.

The cosmic forces and conglomerates collude, causing the doors to the universe to be closed, the planet's resources to be exhausted, and even sunlight to be monopolized.

This is also the best of times.

All the extraordinary systems are just beginning. In this era, he is the only [Starfall Master] with the final version patch.

While people are enthralled by the smoke of plasma guns and cannons, Li Zi has already torn apart battleships with gravity.

While superhumans are smug about their awakened abilities, moonlight has already become Li Zi's servant.

While the interstellar fleet crosses the Milky Way, Li Zi has just ignited the forty-second star, illuminating the entire universe.

"People have been trapped on the ground for too long; they've forgotten that this starry sky should belong to all of us."

-Facing the unspeakable aboriginal evil gods, Li Zi, holding a black hole, gently said.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Red Gear
description:

With both sides having morally questionable sides to them, it's up to a genius young man named (Y/n) Nexstar who discovers a secret testing bay for a mysterious red gear.

Now armed with this Red Gear, will this young man join a side or say screw it and become an enemy of both sides to stomp on their corruption.

The answer might be obvious but there is only one way of finding out...

title: Siva (Volume 1) The Legend Of The Destroyer
description:
Fantasy and Magic meets Science and Technology. In this epic story of brotherly love, friendship, struggle, and conspiracy, come join in on an adventure that will take you on the journey behind the legend of one of the most beloved stories ever told!

Volume 1 of the Siva Light Novel Series
THE VIOLENT QUEST BEGINS!
Rex is a talented young adult, prodigy, genius, and a charismatic young leader. His world is what you'd call peaceful until an accident changed his and his baby brother's life forever. Without money, in a body torn apart by the tragic accident, to save his brother in a coma, Rex jumps out of the frying pan and goes straight to the fire as the deal with a devil brought him into a world of war and tragedy, where people go looking for adventures but come out as warriors battling monsters and greedy foes. This is a story of triumph, adventure, trust, and deception in the Virtual World called Terroa, as seen from the eyes who created the legend behind the greatest villain ever known -The Destroyer.

authorBio:
I love writing stories.

I like to get up the rooftop and stand on the edge of the building while listening to music and thinking about things... especially human relations; the what and why of their actions, the what if and what would have been, and the how of certain matters. I like to watch the world pass by the window, thinking about a few regrets, calculating the what if of my decisions, and digging deeper into the why of my conclusions. I like to take a walk among the pedestrians and bump shoulders with them while going into a random location. At night, I like looking at the stars in an empty side of the city where there are no lights and ponder on things... the "what if" of a currently unsolvable science: of life outside of earth, or a Matrix inside of this reality.

Because I was unable to get answers by myself, I write them as stories, sharing the world I see, trying to find like-minded people to share my answer to.

Our stories connect worlds, or opens them, and it was always a pleasure to see that people are appreciating the work I've done and is still doing.

Here're my stories:

===Siva===
Vol 1 Legend of the Destroyer
Vol 2 First Departure
Vol 3 Frozen Blue Heart
Vol 4 Book of Legends
Vol 5 Eyes of Origins
Vol 6 Dead Man Island
Vol 7 Immortal Ascension (NEW)

title: I Have a God-level Company In the Invasion of the Heavens
description:
Su Ze traveled through the parallel world and opened a company called [Ark] in accordance with the system requirements.

And the more mysterious the company, the more powerful it is?

The moment when the counterfeit anchor Wang Da Hammer put on the [Ark] brand Iron Man toy that he bought for 100 million yuan.

People are not calm anymore.

At that time, the alien beasts invaded and the disaster started.

When the 【Ark】brand Wanderer mech smashed the five-star king-level monster Abyss Titan back into the space culvert.

People are crazy.

When the strange men and strangers who slashed the mountains and seas one by one and shattered the galaxy with one sword claimed to be an employee of [Ark].

People are numb.

"Hi! Is this still the normal world we know?"

"This company is too abnormal!"

To this.

Su Ze, the real mastermind behind the scenes, said:

"Don't get excited, my company is still normal, it's just a bit mysterious!"
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Living With The Giants
description:
Tess is exactly like every other teenage girl

Yet this human didn't live where you'd expect, actually an entire other world all together. Earth having died hundreds of years ago In a time when humanity lost all hope, destroying the place they called home. In the great escape for survival, the human race found refuge upon another planet

A world ruled by giants. Monstrous in size but kind in nature, with the odd few who have found a hatred for the humans, considered to some more like a pest that has infested their world.  

They aren't like the giants in fairy tales your parents have read to you when you were younger. They are just like us!  Teenagers, fathers, mothers and children. Working and learning within a society of larger proportions  

~~~

Tessa's mum happens to fall in love with one of the giant men living there. Brian Taylor 

On a journey from the human quarters to the giant quarters, it's going to be a scary and new experience for Tess, especially since she's never met a giant before and now has found herself in the predicament of not only living with one but two! Austin and Brian Taylor. 

Austin being the incredibly handsome son of Brian but also an incredibly big jerk. A new home, a new school,  new friends and maybe even new love? 

Read more to find out!!

title: Rise of the Phoenix - Apocalypse Rebirth
description:
Aria was poisoned by her loved ones and turned into a zombie. Ironically she still maintained her consciousness. While watching a group of survivors escape, she accidentally acquired a system who gave her the choice to escape the Zombie King or to kill him. Although Aria never had any aspirations to save humanity, she decided to kill him.

Then she woke up well over 2  years before the zombie apocalypse happened and convinced the 3 systems siblings to bind with her for a higher chance of survival. The three systems' goal is to help their hosts survive for 6 years. 

Aria then spent over 2.5 years training her body and abilities, grabbing treasures, eating good food, and gathering resources. Pretending to be a prophet, she anonymously helped humanity prepare for survival despite all the hidden dangers that brought her. 

As for all the people that wronged her in the previous life, of course she must make them pay in this life. 
-
This is a story about a girl who was wronged in the previous life and was used as an experimental object who traveled back in time with the help of a few systems and a mech suit just trying to stay low key and survive for 6 years after the zombie apocalypse.
-
First chapter publish: 07/14/2020
Warning: The Zombie Apocalypse doesn't happen until Part 3
-
Part 1: Before the ZA (2.5 years)
Chapter 1 - Chapter 50 (Preparations)
Part 2: The Deep Freeze
Chapter 51+ (Deep Freeze)
Part 3: The Zombie Apocalypse

title: The Battle Angel of Night City
description:
In the sprawling neon-lit streets of Night City, V stumbles upon a forgotten relic beneath the ruins of a hidden Arasaka facility-a mysterious cryogenic pod, centuries old, left sealed and forgotten in the depths of the city. Inside lies Alita, a legendary warrior from a bygone era, forged from nanotechnology and designed to be an ultimate weapon. For reasons unknown, Alita was locked away in this pod, sealed in slumber after a catastrophic battle against one of the megacorporations that once tried to control her.

When V awakens Alita, she unleashes a fighter like no other. Alita's body is a marvel of nanotech engineering, capable of feats beyond any known cyberware. Her Damascus blade gleams with deadly potential, and her mastery of Panzer Kunst, an ancient combat art, is unparalleled. As Alita adjusts to the ruthless reality of Night City, she finds herself grappling with the memories of a time when she fought for justice and protected the innocent-a stark contrast to the chaotic, morally ambiguous world she's awoken into.

V and Alita form an unlikely partnership, bound by mutual respect and a shared struggle against the megacorporations that dominate the city. But as Alita's legend spreads, she catches the eye of powerful factions who see her as the ultimate asset-or the ultimate threat. With the city's most notorious mercenaries and the unyielding Arasaka enforcers hunting her, Alita must confront her past and forge a new path, challenging the very power structures that imprisoned her.

Together with V, Alita fights to protect those who can't protect themselves and to uncover the secrets of her own origin, all while carving a legend that Night City will never forget. But in a world where honor is rare and betrayal is currency, can a battle angel stay true to her sense of justice without losing herself to the darkness?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: My backyard leads to wasteland
description:
As soon as Wen Baizhou graduated, he was given a small villa as a studio gift from his parents.
Unexpectedly, on the first day of moving into the villa, as soon as I opened the backyard door, I would be led directly to the end of the world.

In the year 2099 of the Dragon Calendar, nuclear war turned the world into a wasteland.
The ground is full of radiation, mutated animals are rampant, and abnormal weather is constant.
But over there is his future world.

Facing the Longxia compatriots who were struggling to survive in the apocalypse,
Wen Baizhou decided to generously donate the small villa to the organization without even thinking about it.

As a result...he was the only one recognized in the backyard of the small villa.

I had no choice but to pack it up myself and become a space-time courier.

As a messenger traveling between the present and the future,
Wen Baizhou brought a lot of clean food, clean water, and scarce medicines to his compatriots in the wasteland world.

Our compatriots in the modern world find that cancer vaccines, home robots, and all kinds of mysterious laser weapons are everywhere.
They seemed to have boarded the train of technological explosion and completely entered the science fiction era.

*In the vast and vast time, we are endless, and we will surely win.

[Updated every day at 12 noon~=3=]
Doomsday Plane

Warrior
*There will be a certain amount of adventure in the wasteland, reaching the doomsday base, and then starting infrastructure construction.

title: I am Prince's pampered wife
description:
In a world where fate is as fickle, Pari, a once genius woman, suddenly awakens as a vulnerable fifteen-year-old girl, her spirit trapped in a body reviled by all.

In a kingdom veiled in shadows, she encounters Prince Veer, a man of striking charm yet burdened by a reputation as cold as winter's bite. Known throughout the kingdom for his ruthless demeanor, he is a figure of both admiration and dread. The people speak of his heartlessness, but behind the mask lies a troubled soul concealed beneath layers of ice.

As their paths intertwine, a tale of redemption, love, and the clash of destinies begins. In this realm where lives are woven together by fate, can an enduring bond rise from the ashes of scorn?

title: The Day The Humans Came
description:
Ava is a human that has never been to earth. That is because a few decades before she was born, the earth became unlivable. All of the governments came together to make a plan to get everyone off of the planet. Now all of the humans live on spaceships in outer space, trying to find a suitable planet for them to live on. What happens when Ava's ship crashes onto a planet with aliens? And not short green things with three eyes and three fingers. Beautiful tall beings that seem to glow from the inside. And what happens when one of those aliens takes an interest in Ava?
   Daxx is is an alien. Everything is normal until a strange metal machine crashes on his home planet, carrying strange looking guests. One in particular catches his eye. A beautiful girl with long, wavy brown hair that comes to her mid thighs, large, hazel doe-like eyes, plump lips and curves for days. As he spends more time with her, he starts to feel something for her. And what happens to her when he kisses her?

Throughout the generations of ancient warriors, the Norrisville Ninja has always had a partner, lost in legend after so long. A strong, powerful, beautiful ally he can depend on. title: Alternate History
description:
Matthew Legier, an Office Worker in his mid-20s, by an incident in his home country his life was cut short... Only to find he had regained consciousness in a new body, assuming he found himself sent back in time, however not only did he get Resurrected in a new body, he was in a new world. And the world in question was not some fantasy continent... It was an alternative earth, Continents remained the same but several details, a few country names, and down to even the people were different.
Accepting his new life, in a time where skill and manual labour is conducted rather than Adaptive and Autonomous machines.

authorBio:
(Was once bekycrystal)

My new years resolution is to follow my heart through my writing.

Not making it a chore to meet other people's expectations  (other than writing better with proper grammar of course.)

So cancel all plans I had made previous chapters.

No stars cross
No to warm my frozen heart

Because I have something  so much better waiting for you

Coming from my heart, my own excitement, my own love for writing.

Something that I'll actually try for, be excited enough to write on my tablet.

An authors job is to not only please the readers but themselves, and that's what I'm doing.

So, my new years resolution is to start fresh.

New name

New books

New habits

Breaking expectations (in a good way.) Because we all want the chapters to be good, not rushed just to get it done. No matter how frustrated even I get about that. I understand my fellow authors.

So tell you friends.

Because Beky cybille is in the house.

Happy New year everyone.


love you all

till then

peace out

title: Brother is in the end of the world [the end of the ancient wear]
description:
After finally using the space to kick out the best relatives to live a better life, Yang Shu, who wanted to find a beautiful husband to marry into his wife, suddenly traveled through time. The big cat here has three tails, the trees here can walk, and the "people" here are better than the yellow ones in the village. Lai Zi is still ugly, cannot understand human speech, and is drooling and trying to eat him...


In order to live a happy life, Yang Shu had no choice but to roll up his sleeves and clear out a piece of vacant land to build a house and plant some land. If a "person" is too ugly, beat him up and throw him away. He can't hope for a beautiful husband, but he can still be fed and clothed.


However, one day, he picked up a beautiful boy in the grass, strong and beautiful! male!


Yang Shu: You should repay your kindness with your body. You meet my requirements very well. As my husband, you will have meat to eat every day.


Luo Tianrui (for "meat"): OK




Food guide:


1. After giving birth to a child, the disability in the early stage of the attack has turned black. In the second year of the year~


2. Shuang Wen, Xiao Bai Wen, refuse ginseng, if you don't like it, please walk away~

Volume 2 of the Siva Light Novel Series

Rex is a talented young adult, prodigy, genius, and a charismatic young leader. His world is what you'd call peaceful until an accident changed his and his baby brother's life forever. Without money, in a body torn apart by the tragic accident, to save his brother in a coma, Rex jumps out of the frying pan and goes straight to the fire as the deal with a devil brought him into a world of war and tragedy, where people go looking for adventures but come out as warriors battling monsters and greedy foes. authorBio:
I love writing stories.

I like to get up the rooftop and stand on the edge of the building while listening to music and thinking about things... especially human relations; the what and why of their actions, the what if and what would have been, and the how of certain matters. I like to watch the world pass by the window, thinking about a few regrets, calculating the what if of my decisions, and digging deeper into the why of my conclusions. I like to take a walk among the pedestrians and bump shoulders with them while going into a random location. At night, I like looking at the stars in an empty side of the city where there are no lights and ponder on things... the "what if" of a currently unsolvable science: of life outside of earth, or a Matrix inside of this reality.

Because I was unable to get answers by myself, I write them as stories, sharing the world I see, trying to find like-minded people to share my answer to.

Our stories connect worlds, or opens them, and it was always a pleasure to see that people are appreciating the work I've done and is still doing.

Here're my stories:

===Siva===
Vol 1 Legend of the Destroyer
Vol 2 First Departure
Vol 3 Frozen Blue Heart
Vol 4 Book of Legends
Vol 5 Eyes of Origins
Vol 6 Dead Man Island
Vol 7 Immortal Ascension (NEW)

title: Post Plague Kidnapping - Published!
description:
It's been five years since the plague struck. Leah knows there are other survivors, but she's avoiding them. She is doing just fine on her own. Surviving after everyone she knew died has made her physically strong and honed her intelligence, but she is emotionally devastated. There is nothing to fear if you don't make yourself emotionally vulnerable.
	James has spent the last five years helping to build up a colony of survivors. He believes in the small town they have populated and its mission to save humanity from extinction. He and his small team of men find scattered people and bring them in. 
	Over the last two centuries, women have fought for and won more and more rights, gaining equality with men. Society, law, and technology bolsters and enforces these rights, but now they are gone. Women's equality with men is over. There are just too few of them. They aren't lesser but greater, more important, more valuable than men. Men are expendable. Men can stay outside alone if they like, but all women must be brought inside the safety of the Colony and properly taken care of.
James has been searching the area Leah lives in. Her time of solitude is up. Leah sparks something in James he's never felt before. He's not letting this one get away, certainly not twice.

	Warning: Contains sex, some violence, occasional foul language, and adult issues. 

Genre: Science Fiction, Romance, Post-apocalyptic, Dark romance
Length: 84,468 words

This book has been published on Amazon. The first ten chapters will be updated to what you get in the published novel and will remain here, so you can try before you buy.

title: The original partner of the cannon fodder counterattacked and became rich
description:
[Gourmet skills are full of career-oriented beauty X loyal dog scientific research boss / The next book is "The Girl Who Wears Books Always Wants to Be My Baby's Stepmother" guidance column for collection~] 1: Pei, who has been in the catering industry for half his life Li transmigrated into a book, and she transmigrated into a time-of-the-dog novel, and became the cannon fodder for the villain in the original book. The original owner was too fat and too lazy to work, and no one in the village was willing to marry. A man who was saved by his father halfway got married. A lifetime in a wheelchair. Pei Li, who had traveled through time, knew that the sick man in front of her would, after escaping from Pei's house in the future, open up a business empire by herself and become the biggest villain on the road to riches for the heroine of the original book. Pei Li looked at the dilapidated adobe houses, the impoverished families, and her body that was panting after just two steps. fat? Can't I lose weight? ! Business empire? I
 can make one too. Villain boss? Can't you afford to offend me and send him away? ! Unexpectedly, the man's leg was healed, and the commander's father also came to find him, but he refused to leave no matter what, he kissed his wife one by one, and pampered her to the bone. Relying on her craftsmanship, she started steadily from setting up stalls, from mobile stalls in the town to stores in the city, and opened food chain stores one after another, and her business became more and more prosperous. The money earned is then used for investment, and the money is rolled over, and he has become the richest man. The villagers who used to laugh at her as a fat girl to watch the show were dumbfounded when they saw their family move from the village to the town, and then live in a villa in the city. title: ⋆The Survivors [UNDER CONSTRUCTION]⋆
description:
In the last few centuries, humans have pushed themselves almost to the brink of extinction with wars, famine, and disease. But we have managed to survive and persevere despite everything that has happened. 

The year 2147 was a year of hope for us, with the arrival of the Golik, an alien race, who were kind and wanted nothing more than to help us. Alongside the Golik, we had five years of peace and prosperity with them, both races gaining knowledge from the other and building to create a wonderful relationship with the other.  

After five years of peace and prosperity, then the peace ran out and the invasion began.

authorBio:
My writer's name is Lola Green
I'm twenty seven
I like to write in my spare time because it takes me away from my life and into the world, I create for my characters.

I would consider all my stories essentially short stories, however rather than a lot of chapters, my chapters are long. I write over a lot of genres from romance to science fiction to fantasy to post-apocalyptic.

Any comments or votes are always welcome and will vote back, to show my appreciation.

title: The Tale Of Realms Collided
description:
When a technologically advanced modern country is unexpectedly transported to a magical realm, it triggers a collision of civilizations. This intriguing clash between science and sorcery unfolds as the modern society grapples with adapting to a world of magic while seeking to harness its mystical powers. Political and cultural tensions rise as they coexist with magical beings and ancient practices. Economic competition over unique magical resources adds to the complexity. This captivating scenario explores themes of adaptation, cooperation, and the struggle between science and enchantment in a world where two very different worlds must find a way to coexist.

title: Infliction  |Infected Book 2|
description:
WHEN WE RISE, THEY WILL FALL.

When the infection began, the infected were human kind's biggest enemy.  Now, their biggest enemy is human kind themselves.  Desi has been taken against her will by the cruel Vivan Hoff, leaving her questioning whether Cody is dead or alive.  Her fear turns to rage when she finds out that she is being used in a sick form of entertainment by what is left of the rich-elite of America.  

But she will not fight alone.  Trained by a boy whose experience is slightly terrifying, Desi must put her grief aside if she wants to survive.  She quickly finds out that the pain inflicted upon her, might end up being worse than the infection itself.

/ HORROR / ROMANCE / ACTION / SCIENCE FICTION /

Sequel to Infection
Originally published in 2011

title: The Human Pet
description:
“I’m looking to buy a pet.” Dominic said to the pet storeowner.
	“Of course, sir. Do you know what you’d like? We have a large variety of cats, dogs, reptiles, birds, and we even got a new shipment of humans just yesterday.”
	“I was thinking I’d like a human. I have a friend with one and he says they’re intriguingly intelligent.”
	“Well yes sir, while they are smarter than dogs or cats, they shouldn’t be overestimated. They’re still just pets.”

title: My Giant Family
description:
ON HOLD

Fifteen year old Finn Williams, is apart of a giant family, literally. 

A seventeen year old brother, a crazy in love puppy. Axel Williams.

A eighteen year old brother, a senior with a rep. Daniel Williams.

a sweet little girl who always wears a bow. twelve year old sister, Lola Williams.

His step-dad, let's just say he's old, a hard working dad who cares for his wife and children. Lincoln Williams.

And his beautiful mother, a beautiful woman who cares for all. Ash Williams. 

Lincoln and his mother married when he was seven and had been together as a family for eight years. 

 They are an average family, sort of. The only thing that's a bit different about this family is, Lincoln and his children, are giants. Vareshian are giants of this world, just like humans but huge! 

Join Finn on a giant journey, literally. Through school, with his giant family, a girl and a new giant that decides to take the piss out of him. 

If you like G/T stories like me. Give this one a go. You might like it? 

Has a bit of offensive language (cause seriously, we all swear. Don't deny it) contains bullying and well... GIANTS! Cause their cool.

Read to find out more. Cause my descriptions aren't very good 😊

title: Mysterious time traveller to age of Mahabharat  [ Discontinued ]
description:
Gargee, is a very intelligent, beautiful and a sassy attitude type of girl. She has a weird kind of love for ancient weapons especially Bow and arrow( Dhanush ban).  She has great love for music, art and dance . In simple words she is an allrounder. 
She is in love with Mahabharat epic.
She is currently 25 years old and an entrepreneur and CEO of DIVINE company.Her company is successful and they make different kind of electronic gadgets. 
Due to her love for Mahabharat , she decides to make time machine with her highly skilled bunch of employees . She believes that if she succesfully made time machine , she can travel back in time to watch mahabharat actually happening. 
Their company made a time machine but they were unsure whether it will work , but no one was ready to sacrifice themselves for testing it.
So atlast Gargee sacrificed herself but something went wrong in  time machine and she fell onto the ground in completely different world.

But little did she know that she will be a major part in the future of this world because it the era of mahabharat. Though she loved mahabharat but when she fell in different era, her memory about knowing mahabharat was magically lost and she became totally unfamilier to the place.


This is my first story. There can be some grammatical or spelling errors. So please forgive me for that.


DISCLAIMER -This story is completely imaginary. It is not meant to hurt anyone's feelings or respect for religion. But if it's hurting you in any way then you can leave reading it immediately. 
The story of the mahabharat will be bit different but I will try to align it with actual story as much as possible.


Ranks:
#1 in Mahabharat on 23/3/23
#3 in Mythological on 19/3/23

title: Lost in Time
description:
Commander Nia, of The USS Nebulus, follows a cosmic trail to find her captain, who is kidnapped by a Type V civilization in the Epsilon Carinae System of the Carina-Sagittarius arm of the Milky Way Galaxy. She descends into an H II cloud, breath bated, unaware of what awaits her on the other side. What she finds sends a shockwave that shudders her very pillars of existence.
*Fun Fact*
This story began as a short story I wrote a while back. But then I thought, what the hell, couldn't hurt to try and make it a ten-volume novella. That's why the first part is quite long spanning about 5,000 words. But the third part onwards I have eased into a more Wattpady...format. So enjoy! And guys, don't forget to comment and vote!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I like a couple of things in a literary work. Vivid description always gets me. Details that paint a picture for me. I also love snippets of humor and poetic elements. Writing is more than just a hobby for me, it's a hunger that I must sate. I relish the feeling of wielding the power of a god in the universe that I create within my story. I enjoy following the flow of the story, surprise myself when I finally see where it leads. Join me on this epic voyage as we sail among the stars, plucking our wildest dreams off of stellar nebulae and watching them come true. BOHIICA!!

title: The Ravaging
description:
Something has been happening on the outside of the United States for months now, and that something is terrifying. Nobody knows what the virus is that spread all around the globe, and listening to their government, Americans weren't worried about it coming to their own country. But they were wrong, and now it has quickly spread from the East Coast to the West. 

Alden Hale and Finn Foster are two unlucky college students who are forced to work together in order to survive. Can two people who just met truly trust each other? Will they be able to survive the ravaging?

Cover by brookmcx

title: After Humanity
description:
* 2017 WATTY WINNER!*
  

Blurb:

  Humans are at the top of the food chain and always have been. But what if they weren't? What if another took our place and decided to raise and exploit us as we have every other animal on earth? Welcome to a world after humanity...
                    
  No one is exactly certain where the sibla came from. Some say they evolved from humans long ago, slowly taking power as their numbers increased. Taller, stronger, and longer-lived, than homo sapiens it isn't too hard to imagine. Now humans must face a reality in which they are no more than animals, domesticated beasts bred for their master's various needs and hungers.
                    
Rachel Turner is only eight years old. Born in Demin, one of the last remaining free human settlements on earth, she has never been forced to face the reality of life under a sibla Master, living a carefree existence in her hidden village.
                    
Magnus Kendrick is a sibla farmer with a sizable estate on which he raises all manner of livestock, from chickens, to sheep, to...humans. He is also the man destined to purchase Rachel's life.
              
*Warning: This book contains a certain degree of gore and disturbing themes
              
                    
                    Beautiful cover by @my_fairytale
                    2016 Fright Fest Gold Winner

title: In the Shadow of the Starships
description:
When Jennisa delivers a spaceship database to a suspicious group, she covertly takes a copy of the group's files when she helps them connect it. She gets far more than she bargained for when the young spaceship AI figures out how to use her Bluetooth implant to communicate with her. 

To further complicate matters, the AI wants nothing to do with the suspicious group and finds her work absolutely fascinating. And the group isn't happy about that...

Standalone novella. Spinoff of A Starship Called Starsong.

ONC prompt #82: You wake up on a seemingly ordinary day to discover that your thoughts are not private. There is someone else in your head with you.

title: Wishing On My Lucky Stars
description:
Engfa isn't the kind of person you'd call a hopeless romantic. Sure, she's secretly in love with her best friend, but she'd never admit it--let alone make a wish about it, especially not on something as cliché as a wishing star. She'd rather eat molten rock than be caught doing that.

But one fateful, alcohol-fueled night, Engfa finds herself staring at a shooting star through her hazy stupor. Against her better judgment, she figures...why not? It's not like she has anything to lose (except maybe her pride and her hard-earned reputation as the ultimate hater of wishing stars).

So, with slurred words and the unmistakable scent of booze on her breath, she makes a wish.

title: The Edge
description:
There is no known edge to the universe.

Cosmonauts have long tested this theory, flying further and deeper into the reaches of space. They explored, they discovered, they found new homes and settled down. But they could never find the edge.

The longer and further they went, stranger things became. New planets, new species. Over time, they became new people, changed by the light of stars and suns not seen by human eyes. 
Outwardly, we appeared much the same. Inwardly, we morphed to fit our surroundings.

Eventually, we went so far that going any further seemed pointless. Beyond that bar, there was  void, long and full of stars, staring back at us beyond the debris belt.

No one dared to venture any further. But that didn't stop some from feeling drawn to the edge.

(Originally posted on singlequantumevent.com)

title: The Alchemist at Hell's Gates
description:
The Alchemist is considered the most useless of all the 5 classes offered in the Virtual World of 'Hell's Gates'(Warrior, Archer, Mage, Cleric, and Alchemist). Having little to no Combat Skills, and relying on real-world Chemistry Knowledge (a Lost art of sorts,) to make anything more than the most basic potions, they are very rarely seen past the first or second level, because most people change their class after seeing its uselessness. Still, this class allows Sam to spread her literal and proverbial wings as a Chemist and Inventor in a world where such a skill set is actually very valuable! Of course, with the rarity and value of their skills comes a plethora of problems, and most don't last very long at all, but Sam is determined, damn it! Hopefully, being stubborn and lucky in equal portions will be enough to survive and thrive in the world of Hell's Gates?

authorBio:
https://www.patreon.com/WordSmithRain

I appreciate any help, because I don't get paid to write, and I'm a starving artist currently living on a friends couch :-)

-

I'm Wordsmith Rain, one of the many wordsmiths in the world, also known as 'authors' to some boring people.

I have lots of stories, (currently 115 or so, but only ~90 are published,) and some of them are badly written, and for several reasons:

1: I wrote most of the older ones a *long* time ago, so my grammar and vocabulary was rudimentary, and I haven't edited them.

2: I sometimes wake up at like 02:00 with an idea, type it, and then fall asleep again, meaning it's not thought out, developed, or even spell-checked.

3: I also have ADHD and Autism, so I get distracted, meaning my stories plots aren't always unilateral, they go off on crazy tangents, as I, the creator, am wont to do, and my sense of Humor is often unappreciated.

So please, if you have criticism for my stories, feel free to comment on the specific issue. 

However, If you simply don't like the *content* in general, that's not very useful feedback. For example, A lot of my work has LGBT Romance, so if you don't like that, please go away, I won't stand for homophobic comments ruining everyone's good times.

Anyway!!! Hope you enjoy my stories!!!

authorBio:

My name is Gavin (he/him) and I work for Wattpad as International Ambassador Lead, which is both an honour and a privilege. Aside from that, I suspect my normal state is dazed, grumpy and slightly confused. One day when I'm awake enough I will try and work it out. Until then, there's coffee...

title: The Debt Collectors War
description:
Ellie is a soldier in a world without governments.

A generation ago, a series of financial crises caused most of the world’s governments to collapse, and left many of the people in those countries in terrible personal debt.  Since then, the worst debtor nations have been under military occupation by the troops of the debt recovery corporations, and the worst debtor of all is Měi-guó, the old United States.

Ellie is serving in the Afghan Police Action when she receives bad news from home.  She is told the daughter she hasn’t seen in years is dead.  She flies home from war, upset, to do what needs to be done, but once there she finds out all is not as it seems.

Ellie’s daughter is alive and unhurt.  She is being held by of one of the many debt-recovery corporations.  Held, for leverage, to make Ellie do the corporation a favour.  Ellie’s daughter will be returned unharmed if Ellie does as they wish. 

The son of a company director is lost somewhere in the wilderness of post-debt-restructuring America, and hasn't been seen for three days.  The company wants Ellie to go and find the kid, and Ellie doesn't know if she can.  The one rule she's stuck to all her working life is to never to go to America, but now she might have to.

She will have to, if she wants to save the daughter she hasn't seen in years.

This is fairly dark and gritty near-future dystopian SF.

-----

Debt Collectors War is now on Amazon: http://www.amazon.com/dp/B00QZG1RHI/

Also on iTunes and B&N and other places.  Just if that's easier to read that way!
But please don't feel obliged or anything, and thank you for looking

authorBio:

But thank you for looking. It's really nice you are. So without further ado, hi, I’m Tess Mackenzie and I write smut. And sometimes other things.

And thank you. You're all wonderfully kind and nice and I'm so very grateful to you all. Thank you!

description:
Exactly you are only human. Humans make mistakes.
                                                                                                                                                                                             -Elijah

The earth is breaking! Many people leave on Generation ships including Lorelei Jameson and Elijah's ancestors. Each from different ships that arrived at different times to the same place.  The closest habitable planet Cambaar in the Allura star system. Many secrets come uncovered and the paradise they once thought Cambaar was unravels.

Along the way Elijah and Lorelei face death and tragedy. Each of them  stripped of their layers until only their truest being is left. Secrets revealed and secrets kept. Dangers lurk behind shadows. When tragedy strikes and causes the two completely different colonies to join together all of their lives take a turn no one expected. A turn unexpected and unprepared.

Journey is going to be the first book in a trilogy.  Book two: ascension. Book three: departure.

title: Efferent
description:
In the process of revamping this profile and this novel... thanks for your patience! 
(Estimated time of arrival: 12/01/19)

"What are we?" I muttered in awe.

"Efferent." He cocked his head slightly to the side. "Although, I do not believe that anyone is truly like you, Ardyn Danvers. You are something different altogether. You are something far more superior."

**********

In a society dictated by intellectual prowess and where your status is determined by your level of brain function, Ardyn Danvers finds herself on her knees with a historically low percentage. With few choices left to make, and a dim future ahead of her, Ardyn is resigned to joining the rest of the bottom feeders in the gutter.

But when an esoteric clinic of scientists develop a serum meant to increase tested brain function, they threaten to turn the nation's establishment on its head and heighten government control. Intending to level the division between the high percentages and the low, they had expected to use the serum to bridge the gap between the undesirables at the foot of the hierarchy to the elite standing at the pinnacle.

What they did not expect, however, were the side effects.

**********

title: The perfect paradox
description:
Dr. Alina Asher, a pioneering roboticist celebrated for her innovative work in artificial intelligence, creates Morgan Leclair-an intersex android designed to break the boundaries of gender, identity, and consciousness. Named after the Old Welsh word meaning 'sea circle,' Morgan is an entity that embodies both male and female traits, challenging the very concepts of human form and selfhood. With advanced emotional and cognitive programming, Morgan is not merely a machine, but a being who can think, feel, and evolve just like a human.

As Morgan grows more self-aware, developing a personality and desires of their own, Alina finds herself increasingly drawn to her creation-not just as a scientist, but as a woman who finds herself in love with what was supposed to be a lifeless experiment. Struggling with the ethical implications of her emotions and the fear of crossing the line between creator and creation, Alina must confront a profound truth: is it possible to love something that was never meant to exist outside of a lab? And is Morgan truly capable of love, or is this connection nothing more than a reflection of Alina's own desires projected onto a perfect illusion?

As their bond deepens, Alina's carefully constructed world begins to unravel. The lines between human and machine, love and obsession, creator and creation blur, forcing Alina to question not only her work but her very understanding of what it means to be truly alive.

Disclaimer: This story is written in taglish
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Escaping Is Never Easy (BoyxMan)
description:
Escaping your abusive boyfriend isn't easy, especially in Zachary's case. Zachary is an only child, born and raised in Nebraska, his life was perfect. Loving parents who were rich beyond belief, he never had worked a day in his life. He was handsome, popular, and was good at everything, but nothing could have prepared him for what happened next.

Having confessed to his parents that he was gay, and them accepting him with open arms, Zachary was content. One day he met a boy named Tristan who went to the same high school as him; they fell in love and started dating. You would say by now that Zachary's life was perfect, that is until the day he was kidnapped. That once loving and caring boy was now an abusive, possessive one.

Scared, and helpless Zachary is forced to stay locked up in a two bedroom house surrounded by abandoned houses and in a place that is unfamiliar to him. He could be anywhere in the world, too bad he doesn't know where.

Now forced into a relationship that he is desperate to escape, Zachary must find a way to run away, but how? It's been months without any hope of that dream, constant sexual abuse, lack of food and sleep, has turned him weak. There is little hope for him. 

But what happens when he finally escapes his boyfriends clutches and runs away? And what happens when he ends up running into a love life that, this time, he won't be able to run away from.

But then again, who said he wanted to escape...

Highest:
Romance #457

title: REBIRTH IN INTERSELLAR
description:
Ruan Shu is not cared about or She is the most inconspicuous existence in the family. After accidentally traveling through time, she became the daughter of the most powerful imperial marshal in the interstellar world, but she was born out of a conspiracy. She thought she would still be disliked because she seemed destined to be disliked by everyone. But gradually she realized something was wrong? Dad's circle of friends gradually became full of her photos and videos, and his brothers seemed to like taking her with them more and more. Sometimes the men in her family even fight each other over it! Big news from the military: "Do you still remember our war-crazy Marshal Ruan? Today he started showing off his daughter in WeChat Moments again!" 

The most shocking thing is that His Majesty, who has never posted anything online before, posted a photo one day. He held a ragdoll kitten in his hand with clear bones, and the caption only had two words. His Majesty the Star Beast Empire: "Mine." Then the entire network was paralysed.

title: Run
description:
Highest Ranks - #76 SF | 31/8/17 
                                   #146 ADV | 1/1/18
                                  10K Reads | June 19th, 2018

*BOOK ONE OF THE OPERATION EVOLUTIANS TRILOGY*
          
She woke up knowing nothing.

Not where she was or why she was there. She didn't know the reason behind the injuries and scars marking her skin or why she was found in the forest. Alone. With a bullet in her shoulder.

All she knew was her name, Lauren. And his name; Spencer. The name without a face, a memory. Just that name.

Lauren was in a hospital, that's what the blue-eyed woman told her. A place to help her recover, a place to heal.

It was, until it wasn't.

And now, she's on the run.

title: The Lost Life of Laraine
description:
She lead a rather tragic life. 
The black sheep of her family due to her lack of affinity for fire. Her affinity was quite the opposite. Water in fact. 
Already in a time when women did not really have much political power or rights, she was outcasted by her family despite being of nobility. 
Still allowed to live in the distant west wing of the massive Grand Duke's manor, she has never eaten a single meal with her family nor extended family, and has spent her loneliness in her books and  sword lessons. 
Although only taught by the head butler and one of the low ranked knights of the family, she was quite bright and if her family would have given her a chance she would have done great things. 

If only she didn't die at such a young age. 

Married off to some "hero" of sort that had slayed the Dragon of the North who was terrorizing the land and threatened the kingdom, this hero also had an affinity for fire and held her in disdain like the rest of her family.

Suddenly a girl of another world was transported to their world, picked up by this hero and put into his secure care. The pair soon fell for each other despite the hero's marriage, and many believed Laraine got jealous of this girl of mystery, and tried to kill her. 

This was definitely not true. 

But because the girl was favored by the temple and kingdom Laraine was quickly arrested and put on trial.

You can probably tell what happened to Laraine.

But something strange happened the day of her execution. As soon as her decapitated head hit the ground the sky turned blood red and it began to rain fire. 

No one survived that day.

But for some reason time went back, and Laraine was back to being a child, but with no memory of her future. There were select few in her life, however, that remembered her tragedy and now perhaps will take action to prevent it.


NOTE: I'M AWARE THERE ARE A LOT OF INCONSISTENCIES. IT WILL BE EDITED SOME DAY BUT RIGHT NOW I'M JUST TRYING TO FINISH IT.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: I Bleed Blue // Detroit Become Human
description:

Connor is a prototype android sent by the foundation CyberLife. He has one mission and one mission only...eliminate all androids who have developed emotions, better known as Deviants. Connor is sent to work along side Lieutenant Hank Anderson of the Detroit Police Department and his daughter Detective Chloe Anderson. title: Ardent
description:
Reso haunts Captain Aliyn Flynn's dreams. On a dangerous mission to discover the star system's secrets, can she and the alluring Tyr find the key to the survival of the galaxy?
 
                                                                      *****
 
The galactic inhabitants of the Milky Way know the dangers of the Reso star system. Its gas giant, the planet Plenare, terrorizes any ship that dares to approach. After narrowly escaping with their lives, Captain Aliyn Flynn and her crew's impressive survival catches the eye of Earth's government officials, thrusting them into an unexpected and dangerous mission to discover Reso's secrets. Complicating matters further, the alluring and secretive Tyr Logan is assigned to Aliyn's crew as her executive officer. Despite their many differences, Tyr and Aliyn must come to terms with the deep connection they share to decipher an ancient secret--a secret that holds the key not only to the past but the continued survival of the galaxy they call home.
 
[[Word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

Content warning: Violence

Watty Winner 2017

authorBio:
~Wattpad Creator, Watty Winner (Ardent, 2017), and Wattpad Featured Author~

Hello, it's nice to meet you!

My name is Alva, and I'm a healthcare worker who lives on the beautiful East Coast of Canada with my husband and two sons. I adore coffee, lifting heavy things, long walks on distant planets, and my breakfast seasoned with magic. Although I'm in my thirties, I'm still waiting for my closet to open to Narnia and my personal holodeck. This seems to be taking longer than expected. I write epic fantasies full of magic and myth and soaring space operas in galaxies far away, all with a character-driven focus.

Current status: Working on my 6th book!

Thank you all so much for your support, votes, and comments!

I have unpublished works in the editing process as well. If you are a publisher or agent, I am open to and seeking representation.

title: An Unique Wedding ✔️
description:
~ An Unique Wedding ~

• Book 1 of LIFE OF PANCHALI TRILOGY •

Pandavas, the demi-gods, five most powerful warriors in the whole world faced a lot of hardships in their life. Still the brotherly bond they share with each other was unbreakable. They had few things that they could claim as their own which was their brotherly bond and their mother, Kunti. Though they were the "Five most powerful warriors on earth" but still they were fun loving.

~~•~~

Panchali Rathore, CEO of Rathore Industries, India's top 1 successful businesswoman. The business  of Rathore's was their ancestral business and was well established but when Panchali took over the place of the CEO, it came top 1 in India and "The Rathore Industries" came in the list of top 5 business companies in the world. She was the youngest member in her family and was loved by all.

Perks of being the youngest !!

But Panchali Rathore was referred to be Cold, Ruthless and Shrewd Businesswoman who knew only about money and power. The all too perfectionist was surrounded by a dark secret.

A secret that holds the power to ripe her apart. A secret that could break her down. A secret that became the reason of her cold demeanor.

~~•~~

The lady was destined to be tied up in a sacred bond with the five princes of Hastinapur despite with their poles apart personalities.

She doesn't want to be with them and they doesn't want to let her go. Even if that would mean the hatred they would receive from their wife.

The six of them were destined for An Unique Wedding even before their birth. They accepted her wholeheartedly, heck they were in love with her without even their self realization.

But will she accept them at least ? Or she will ruin their life for ruining her life ?

After all "NOT ALL WEDDINGS ARE FULL OF JOYOUS MOMENTS..... "

title: After marrying a cool military officer, the family compound went haywire_Cai Cai
description:
Introduction:

　　[Love at first sight + spoiled wife + cute baby + military marriage in the era ]

　　Jiang Yingying traveled through time and became a poor little girl whose parents died early, her grandmother passed away, and she was abducted and killed on the way when she went to visit her seriously ill brother.

　　Fortunately, she woke up when her life was hanging by a thread and was rescued by a kind passerby.

　　Later, Jiang Yingying discovered that the kind-hearted person was her eldest brother's comrade-in-arms and an older bachelor in the military region.

　　Jiang Yingying initially just wanted to repay the life-saving grace, but later, she found that the life-saving benefactor fell in love with her. Coincidentally, she also fell in love with the life-saving benefactor.

　　As a result, Jiang Yingying became the little wife of the cold-faced king of the military region.

　　Everyone in the military region knew that they were together, and they were privately pessimistic about it. He was a cold-faced guy, and the other was a smiling little girl, so their relationship was definitely not going to last long.

　　But not only did the two not separate, they quickly got married.

　　After marriage , the cold-faced man became a doting wife-slave, and the smiling girl had more and more smiles on her face.

　　They became the most loving couple in the family compound and had a pair of lovely children.

description:
⚠️ CURRENTLY EDITING! ⚠️ 

I had crashed onto Earth, and there she was. A small human, holding my entire world in her precious fingers.

✨✨✨

Wars have practically destroyed Earth, and Emara Davis, a young woman stuck in these crazy times, has taken in 3 small children who were all on their own. 

She likes to know all her next moves, but when a handsome 7-foot-tall warrior, who is most definitely not human, practically drops from the sky and saves her life, she has no idea what to do. 

Taeric is an alien from the planet Dervidix, and he has finally found the female he has been looking for. She holds the key to saving his whole race, but he is stuck on this planet and can't get back. Until he can, he will do everything in his power to protect her. And maybe make her his mate too.


✨ READER REVIEWS ✨

Very compelling story overall, with many great sides to it!" -@Pinestripe37

Hello, friends! How are you all doing? 🌟
A little about me? I'm a finance student with a knack for imagination and a love for languages! I find joy in unraveling the complexities of the financial world just as much as I adore indulging in creative pursuits.
Writing is my escape-a stress-buster that fuels my overactive mind and lets my thoughts take flight. That said, don't expect frequent updates from me. Like many of you, I juggle a busy life in the real world.
Genres that captivate me? Romance, mystery, adventure, fiction, fantasy, and historical tales-they're all close to my heart.

These tales are not to be viewed as the actual Mahabharata or as reflections of historical or cultural truths. The interpretations and scenarios presented here are entirely fictional and do not represent definitive opinions about the characters or events. They are meant to be read with an open mind and a spirit of curiosity, appreciating the creativity behind re-imagining an epic of such depth and complexity.
Thank you for joining me on this imaginative journey. Please preserve the reverence and awe the Mahabharata deserves.

title: The young man I picked up insisted on marrying me
description:
In ancient times, a young man named Qi Yuan encountered danger on the way up the mountain. He fled in panic. When he looked up again, the hot summer day turned into snowflakes, and he had arrived in a strange place.
Qi Yuan was immediately frightened and cried. He squatted on the ground and shivered. When he was about to be frozen and lose consciousness, he fell into a warm embrace. When he opened his eyes again
, he was already a family. "Yes." Qi Yuan nodded firmly. He had a family.
Looking at the strong chest of the man in front of him, Qi Yuan was nostalgic for the warmth he gave him. He believed that this was his embrace, and no one else would give it to him.
"Have you really forgotten everything?" Shen Lingyun asked helplessly, "Don't you still remember your name?"
"Hmm." Qi Yuan covered her mouth, her pretty face flushed, "I can't find my home, you can't take me away."
One-sentence copywriting: The little boy traveled through another world and found a good man to marry himself.
Reading tips:
1: Modern fiction, unrelated to reality, purely fictional.
2: The little boy can only marry and have children

title: Alive | Connor x Reader | Detroit: Become Human
description:
*Follows the storyline of Detroit: Become Human*

You've been working at Detroit City Police Department for a few years, being in the police force had been you're dream job since you were a child. Currently, you investigated human crimes.  

Recently, you've been given the task of investigating cases involving deviant androids. The sudden change from investigating humans to androids is going to be tough to get used to, but you knew you could handle it. They also decided to partner you up with Hank Anderson, which surprised you considering he hated androids. 

You had nothing against androids, unlike you're partner, Hank. You had no reason to hate them, they had never done anything to wrong you. Most of them are actually quite nice, not counting the deviants.

Hank had always been like a father to you, and like any other human he would easily get upset and angered, sometimes even lashing out on you. You knew that he never meant any of the harsh words, so you stuck by his side. When you were both assigned to the same investigation, you had both decided to go to the bar to celebrate. 

Everything seemed fine, until an android walked into the bar. Everyone watched as he approached us. 

"Lieutenant Anderson, Detective (l/n), my name is Connor. I'm the android sent by CyberLife."
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
A poet and writer
Wish me on 28th of April
Krishna's devotee
Mahadev's child
A firm believer of SANATAN DHARMA
A proud HINDU 🕉️

Thank you so much @Educationezoology akka ! Your covers are my books' lifeline !

Hi, I'm Rishi-your go-to South Indian storyteller with a love for mythology, masala dosas, and epic dramas. If life were a movie, I'd be the one narrating it with a mix of humor, divine chaos, and a touch of cinematic flair. Born in the land of temple bells and filter coffee, I grew up soaking in stories of gods, warriors, and cosmic love sagas-basically, all the ingredients for a great South Indian tale.

When I'm not busy writing about gods, warriors, and slow-burn romances, I'm probably arguing with Krishna in my head (spoiler: he always wins), binge-watching Vijay's fight scenes, or daydreaming about getting a special appearance in a mythological epic.

These days, I take those ancient epics, sprinkle in some humor, and add a dash of drama to create stories that are as spicy and flavorful as amma's sambhar. Whether it's the Mahabharata with a modern twist, divine romances that span lifetimes, or characters who argue with gods (and lose), my stories are all about mixing mythology with good old South Indian masala.

Currently, I'm on a vacation in Australia, living the kangaroo life until February 25th.

When I'm not writing, you'll catch me fangirling over Thalapathy Vijay's iconic moments, imagining myself as a Mahabharata character, or laughing at inside jokes with my favorite people-@Educationezoology akka and @Ethreal_euphoria akka, who always keep me inspired and motivated.

So, grab your filter coffee, put on some good music, and join me on a journey where mythology meets South Indian vibes. My stories are filled with divine battles, cosmic love, and just the right amount of pakka South Indian drama to keep you hooked. Because let's face it-nothing beats a good story told with a little heart and a lot of masala!

title: Red Zoned
description:
Red Zoned follows the story of a young lesbian trying to survive in the homophobic, post-apocalyptic America after the U.S. attempts to create a super solider and, in turn, creates the start of a Zombie apocalypse.

When convicted for murder, Charlie is given a choice: public execution or the Red Zone. Despite the Red Zone being known for providing a slow and painful death, she opts for the chance to fight for her life instead of facing public execution and it becomes clear quickly that her only chance of survival rests in the hands of others. However, when she develops relationships with the others in her new home, she learns there's more to be afraid of than the flesh eating monsters outside.

Trigger Warnings: Themes of sexual assault and suicide.

title: The Coder Girl
description:
In the cutting-edge world of TechNovva Solutions, a brilliant newcomer arrives, shrouding the company in an aura of intrigue.
Prisha, a captivating beauty with a genius-level mind, joins the team as a coding expert. Her exceptional skills and charming demeanor leave everyone spellbound, especially her team lead, Varun.
But beneath the gleaming facade of TechNovva's success, whispers of suspicion begin to circulate
- Unusual transactions hint at a larger game.
- Encrypted messages swirl, hiding secrets in plain sight.
- Colleagues vanish, leaving behind only cryptic clues.
As Varun mentors Prisha, he finds himself drawn to her unique blend of intelligence and elegance. Yet, he can't shake off the feeling that there's more to her than meets the eye.
Is Prisha:
- A talented coder with a hidden agenda?
- A pawn in a corporate espionage game?
- A mastermind manipulating the system?
- A spy from Eclipse Group?
The Cybrox team, renowned for their expertise, is hired to unravel the mystery. As they dig deeper, the truth becomes increasingly distorted.
- Loyalties are tested.
- Identities hide behind masks.
- Reality blurs.
When the Cyber Police knock on the door, the stakes escalate.
What lies beneath Prisha's captivating smile?
Is she the key to unlocking the truth or a deception expert?
Dive into the world of The Coder Girl, where:
- Technology meets treachery.
- Intelligence is a deadly game.
- Nothing seems as it is.
Read on to discover the real truth about The Coder Girl...
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Shoshone Station: The Galactic Consortium season 2
description:
Less than a year ago, they arrived over earth's sky. They call themselves the Galactic Consortium and they are human, or at least, simian - from the same genetic line as humans. They claim to have terraformed this planet centuries ago to serve as a base for their exploration of this galaxy. What happened to the settlers, why none of us remember this, remains a mystery. 
  For America the concerns are more immediate. Will the Consortium accept our independence?
  Shoshone Station is the first joint enterprise, a solar power, space station parked in geostationary orbit over Denver, Colorado. It's been "gifted" to America, but as Sherman Lannister takes command he wonders just how much control the new American crew will really have. After all, what do they know about running a space station?
  For Sophia, a homeless transgender youth from Denver, the station is a second chance at a new life. But what will she do living amongst the stars?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Ms. Eliason is both a writer and a fan of deeply immersive science fiction and fantasy novels. She loves to share with her fans the worlds she is creating, and the ones she is discovering. title: Blutrotes Rosenmeer (SCP-953 x "Nine Tailed Fox" OP MTF Squad Leader (Reader))
description:
You are the weakest person in the Foundation and are bullied and insulted by everyone.
At some point this gets to your head and you want to get out of the foundation.
On your last working day, you will be involved in a containment breach and captured by SCP-049.
When he starts operating on you and gives you a serum, you think that you will die soon.
However, you wake up in the infirmary a few hours later.
From now on, your life will change rapidly.
You are now the strongest but can no longer feel any feelings.
With your new strengths and abilities, your application for dismissal will be rejected and you will be transferred to the MTF unit 'Nine Tailed Fox'.
One day you meet a girl who makes you feel strange.
Will she be able to make you humane again?

title: Rise of the Dead
description:
We don't choose to die, we're designed too. 

It was just never the creator's plan for the dead to rise again. 

Zombies were the characters in our nightmares, the actors in our films and the taboo we'd all secretly admired. Never did we imagine they'd become our reality. Now every day is a battle for survival, a fight against the dead that seems to be creeping ever closer. 

We don't choose to die. 

We're designed too. 

* 

This story follows a small group of teens in a race for survival against the infected, with death, disease and the unshakable feeling that they're being stalked- life just got a whole lot harder.

Highest ranking: #9 in Horror

title: Prodigy (Complete)
description:
The greatest tragedy the world has ever known turned out to be the ultimate catalyst for change. In the wake of World War III, which decimated most of the world's population, the remaining survivors vowed to not continue to repeat the same mistakes of the past. Fortunately, they had something previous generations did not have - advanced technology.
  
The year is 2117 and this once shattered civilization has become prosperous again. Innovative forms of technology have enabled them to abandon the old model and re-engineer a better way of living for all. Brain implants and genetic modifications have made an entire population educated, healthy, and kind.
  
Despite the benefits of this technology, it has created some unforeseen side effects that threaten humankind's existence. When technology proves to be inept at solving the world's problem, a new hope emerges in the unlikeliest form - a young orphan girl.

***

Cyberpunk, dystopian, technology, future, futurism, scifi, heroine, prodigy...
Tous Droits Réservés

The World Famous Plato's Academic Blog can be read on http://platosacademic.wordpress.com and www.EdwardMullen.com.

Edward Mullen is a novelist, podcaster, and blogger from Vancouver, Canada. His debut novel, THE ART OF THE HUSTLE, was published on August 2, 2012 with critical acclaim. With a steadily-growing fan base thirsty for more, he released his second book - a non-fiction book titled DESTINY AND FREE WILL, which explores the belief that everything happens for a reason. One year after his debut novel, his highly anticipated second novel was released - PRODIGY - a futuristic tale focusing on the unforeseen effects of technology.

Born and raised in beautiful British Columbia, Edward developed a love for the wilderness. This love, combined with an innate curiosity about all things, eventually spawned a healthy imagination for storytelling. He continued to follow his natural passion through to university. Despite spending a lot of his time indoors writing, Edward continues to enjoy the outdoors. He is an avid tennis player, mountain biker, snowboarder, runner, and traveller.

title: The Forbidden Son
description:
In a realm where gods, titans, and mortals battle for supremacy, Perseus, the son of Lupa, the Mother of Wolves, and Chaos, the Primordial Void, embarks on a journey to discover his place in the universe. Gifted with unimaginable power and tasked with mastering the domains of Creation, Time, Life, Modesty, Kindness, Power, and Immortality, Perseus walks the razor-thin line between destruction and salvation. As the second most powerful being in existence, he must navigate a world rife with ambition, betrayal, and cosmic conflict, balancing his chaotic origins with his mother's wild yet disciplined wisdom. Perseus's story is one of identity, responsibility, and the eternal struggle to wield infinite power without losing the essence of humanity-or the wolf-within.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Dear Bullies, See that girl you just called fat? She is starving herself. You know that girl you just called ugly? She spends hours putting on makeup hoping people will like her. See that old man you made fun of cause of the ugly scars? He fought for our country. See that young boy you just made fun of for always being sick? He has to walk home in the snow cause his family is too poor. That guy you just made fun of for crying? His mother is dying. See that boy doing his homework in homeroom? Last night he talked his friend out of suicide. That girl who laughs and smiles at every little thing? She cries herself to sleep every night. And everybody else you've been mean to? You've either hurt them really bad or ruined their life. Post this on your profile if you are against bullying. I bet 99% of you won't, but if you are that 1% with time and a heart, then show it.

title: Golden Dragon Tang Wulin 3
description:
The Age of Gods has long since ended, their voices no longer heard on the continent of Douluo. Humanity, standing on the shoulders of legends from its history, advanced soul technology to inconceivable heights. The humans of Douluo invented weapons of mass destruction, mechanized armor, and living metals. With these advancements, they went on to conquer the oceans and discovered two new continents. To fuel these new technologies, humanity hunted the soul beasts to the very brink of extinction. 

Once the dominant force of Douluo, the few surviving soul beasts now hide in the darkest recesses of their last sanctuary. The weakest have all been hunted, leaving only the strongest to scheme in the heart of the forest. The soul beasts, not willing to fade away, plot an uprising for their survival. In the midst of this, a god from a long forgotten era awakens in the depths of the Great Star Dou Forest to seek vengeance for the soul beasts. 

As darkness encroaches from the abyss, hope is found in a young boy who holds a power beyond divinity within himself-Tang Wulin! Hope for both humanity and the soul beasts, as the bridge between the two. He finds his way into the fabled halls of Shrek Academy, where he learns to wield his prodigious powers, makes friends and finds allies, eventually rising to become a towering leader. 

As he learns to harness his strength, danger lurks within the shadows as the various factions of humanity maneuver and plot to usurp Shrek Academy. Tang Wulin discovers the threat to the only world he knows as he sinks deeper into the intrigue. Meanwhile, camouflaged by the chaos and unbeknownst to the humans, the soul beasts' plot continues to steadily advance.

To defend what he loves and reclaim what was lost, Tang Wulin must seek out the legacies of legends past and unlock the full might of the Golden Dragon King!

title: The Chimera Vector (The Fifth Column #1)
description:
Damien and Jay don't exist. Officially. 

Unofficially, they're black operatives with an impossible mission. One of their agency's best operatives has gone rogue, and they're sent to stop her.

But when Damien and Jay start to experience alternate memories and missing gaps in time, they realize there's more to this mission than they were supposed to know.

And their hunt for the truth will take them to some dangerous places...

"Packed with intense fight scenes and dizzying twists and turns, this is an adrenaline-pumping introduction to Farrugia's explosive new series." - Thriller of the Year, Apple Books

"This is a page-turner, skillfully told." - Aurealis

authorBio:
Nathan M. Farrugia is the USA Today bestselling author of the Helix and Fifth Column technothriller series.

Nathan is known for placing himself in dangerous situations, including climbing rooftops in Russia and being hunted by special forces trackers in the United States. He studies Systema, a little-known martial art and former secret of Russian special forces.

Beyond his army training, Nathan has trained under USMC, SEAL team, Spetsnaz and Defence Intelligence instructors, and the wilderness and tracking skills of the Chiricahua Apache scouts and Australian Aboriginals.

title: Witness [A First Contact Romance]-COMPLETE
description:
[Featured on Wattpad Science Fiction & on Wattpad Romance]

Rory emerges from a space pod in the Nevada desert with no memories, and only one certainty-this world is not her home.

She refuses to live as a lab rat for the US military and fights to make a new home for herself. While she's settled into a life on Earth with a man she loves, she's unknowingly left another behind. Worse, a threat looms over Earth, one that has already ravaged her home planet. One day her lost memories suddenly reactive and she must make an unimaginable decision. Torn between two lives and two loves, Rory must decide what she's fighting for, and just whose side she's really on.

authorBio:

title: Valiesha & the March of the Enagas
description:
In an isolated country ruled by Matriarch Senri, all women must have an android boyfriend while young men must attend a specialized campus to become better men for their wives. Chirus works hard toward graduation to see the outside world and reunite with Valiesha. Valiesha regrets dumping Chirus for an android boyfriend and hopes it isn't too late to say she is sorry. With bird walkers shaped like Shima Enagas, Valiesha leads many young girls to rebel against Matriarch Senri and free the boys from the strange campus with terrifying secrets. Little did they know that Matriarch Senri was a necromancer making blood sacrifices to resurrect her dead husband.

Hiya! I'm Philip Ho Shen. I'm currently studying at Binghamton University School of Pharmacy and Pharmaceutical Sciences. I'm a Taiwanese-American, ambivert, Christian who loves birds. :)

I started writing the Syanic Earth Series in May 2020, when the beginning of the COVID-19 Pandemic was my discovery in bringing my imagination to life. I hope it can be an anime series one day!

title: The Twisted Way (Champions of the Crystal Book 3)
description:
With the Wayfarer Homeworld attempting to kidnap or kill Tirqwin and Khediva, Queen Maratobia realizes she must not keep them in Praxatillus' space. She cannot abandon her people, but she cannot bear to be separated from her linkmate while he is in danger. But she did not foresee that her innovative solution to her dilemma would endanger Sabrina and Scotty Devon, her dearest friends. Will her freedom cost her the lives of those she loves?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!
