title: The Girl in the Tank: Galactic Consortium, Season 1
description:
Less than five months ago, lights appeared in the sky. Days later the ships started to arrive. They call themselves the Consortium. They are human, or at least Simian, descending from the same genetic line as humans. They terraformed this planet centuries ago, sent settlers a mere forty thousand years ago. Now they are back, ready to begin the exploration of this galaxy.
    
    For Cheyenne Walker, Chief Petty Officer aboard the Cambridge, a USS destroyer, the arrival of the Consortium is just one more obstacle to finishing her final tour of duty and getting home to her kids. The political upheaval forces the US into an uneasy alliance with the Consortium against China, and puts the Cambridge on the edge of a nuclear blast.
    
    Cheyenne wakes to find herself aboard the Corelean, a Consortium Medical Evacuation ship. Floating in a medi-tank, she wonders if they really can't repair the wreck of her body, whether these newcomers are friends or foes and most importantly, will she ever make it back to children?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Ms. Eliason is both a writer and a fan of deeply immersive science fiction and fantasy novels. She loves to share with her fans the worlds she is creating, and the ones she is discovering. She writes contemporary YA novels dealing with LGBT themes under the name Rachel Eliason and fantasy/science fiction under R. J. Eliason.

title: Fury and Flame | 3
description:
"𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐀𝐃 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐋𝐘 𝐒𝐄𝐄𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐄𝐍𝐃 𝐎𝐅 𝐖𝐀𝐑"


When Delphinium Tesla is dragged back into the poisonous clutches of the organization that turned her into a lethal killer, everything changes in the heightening conflict between Imperium and the rest of the world. Imperium is rising with no significant opposition and the world is quickly realizing how unprepared they are for such a threat. 

Just when it seems as if things can't get any worse for the team, their one ally turns against them and becomes one of their largest foes. The remaining members are forced to go on the run, all while trying to pull themselves together after the disastrous civil war that rocked their group. 

Between being pursued by the gangs of New York City, a teammate gone rogue, Imperium, and their own government, the team has never been in a darker point. How can the broken team destroy Imperium once and for all if the growing empire is nearly unstoppable? 

In this thrilling conclusion, the warfare that has been threatening to break out between Imperium and its resistance is nearing. The team knows that not everyone will survive, especially not if Imperium wins and gains unbridled control over the world. 

War is inevitable.


𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐇𝐀𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐀𝐈𝐃:

"Just because I look like a nerd doesn't mean I am going to act like one," I told him. He stopped laughing and his eyes held amusement. 

"I'm a soldier, not god" he simply told me and I rolled my eyes. I sat up from the chair and crossed my arms over my chest. 

"Such gentlemen," I mumbled 

Arden Jackson, also known as CJ is on the F.B.I's most wanted list. Her life was perfect, well, not really, but a life nonetheless. 

Nevermind. 

I forgot that hacking into the worlds most secure system and running away from the Russian Mob is not a life. Well, at least she thinks its a life. 

High School was sadly not on her bucket list but she doesn't have a choice. Preferring to go to high school then to end up dead at the side of the highway. But when she does, it makes her second guess her decision

Someone just makes her blood run cold, the bad boy.

title: Ava and Aphrodite: The First Human in 8000 Years (Featured)
description:
Thousands of years have passed since mankind's extinction, now the remaining society of Humanoid robots on Mars and Machine-like robots on Europa are at war. Ava, a stealth Mars-unit is sent on a mission to Europa to learn more about the enemy's new secret super weapon: the first biological human in 8000 years. (Now a featured Wattpad story, made it to 6 on the hot list!)
                              
    ***
                              
This story is a mix of Nier: Automata, Do Androids Dream of Electric sheep, and what I thought Saturn's Children would be until I got to the half-way point.
               
Updates are:
                
Monday: New Chapter
                
Wednesday: Poem (thoughts of featured character in the chapter) or Data File (extended info of elements brought up in previous chapter.
                
Friday: New Chapter (usually try to end these with cliffhangers ;D)
                
I haven't failed with this update schedule yet so don't worry! Keep reading and you'll have material to read for months to come! I value everyone's feedback so please vote and comment your thoughts on the themes and characters as I introduce them :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Aphrodite: I upload Monday, Wednesday and Friday, with Wednesday being a poem or data file, as of now I haven't missed a deadline, so don't worry, join the team! Don't remember to comment and vote! I'd love to hear feedback and help move A+A higher up the ranks!

Made it to #1 on Featured. Highest Rank on Hottest: #6. Let's aim for the top!

Add me on twitter @Alias_Sal if you want updates :)

Red Mary: Finished but unedited, will upload upon popular demand

Fragments of Ash: Finished and largely edited, will upload upon popular demand.


I have an outline for Ava but if you have any comments please make them known in the chapter as the story is very malleable! Does one character interest you more than another? Is the story going in a different direction than you thought? What are your opinions on each theme I bring up every chapter (I try and put at least one thing to mull on in every chapter!)? Please let your thoughts known. And don't forget to vote!

Oh and... please excuse the spotty and rushed writing style, pumping this out three times a week means I am pretty much just focusing on plot for now :) It'll be sharpened up in editing once I'm done!

title: He was Almost Absorbed by the System
description:
Paralysed from the neck down after a serious accident and unable to pay for full body restoration, Kyan was sent into an Alien Archive to rescue the V.I.P's trapped within it's virtual records.  However, unbeknownst to him, he is little more than real life cannon fodder, sent to die, so the V.I.P's could live.  Dragged through the worlds recorded in the files, he is now on the brink of exhaustion and the System is almost ready to absorb what remains of him and replace him in the physical world.  But just as he is due to complete his last mission, someone interferes...

title: 12 Seconds (#1 in Military series)
description:
After being caught in an explosion in Afghanistan, Jules is sent home with no memory of her time as a marine or the love she found overseas. 

Now, two years later, Julia is working in the local library, with an overprotective mother who would do anything to keep her from learning the truth.

But will a chance encounter with someone from her past make Julia remember who she truly is? 

And can she ever be the same person again? 


Just a few notes:

title: HMS Valediction
description:
[Book 2 of the ARC10 Trilogy]

Rampant addictions, psychotic breakdowns, and threats of mutiny keep Commander Janika Lorn up all night. Transporting two-thousand souls safely from a destroyed Earth to a new habitat aboard the refugee ship ARC10 has been a special kind of hell - especially while also hiding her illegal pregnancy from her commanding officer. She wonders if they should turn around and take their chances in the crumbling underground bunker city they abandoned, even with the hostile invading aliens still patrolling the sky. She wonders if they're capable of surviving the rest of the journey.

Because it seems like her troubles couldn't get any worse, and they've only been in space for three months.

As usual, Commander Janika Lorn is wrong. 

When she finally hits an all-time low in the confines of an alien prison, a botched rescue operation puts her life in the black-gloved hands of Captain Shin-Hyun Moon of the HMS Valediction - a notorious vagrant and patchwork monster who was stitched together with the eclectic skins of the galaxy. Despite being instant enemies, Lorn and Moon are forced to work together to salvage their separate missions that have gone totally awry. 



HMS Valediction is the sequel to 2017 Watty winner ARC10, the second installation of the ARC10 trilogy.

Cover art by the enormously talented @FayLane

title: Taming The Humans
description:
Danny is a female human from Wisconsin, USA. She was abused as a young girl and ran from home as soon as she turned 18. The aliens found her sleeping under a bridge with nothing but a blanket, a stuffed bear, and an uneaten granola bar. Everything else had either been stolen or sold for food. 

Dean is an old man cast out to the streets after losing his pension. He was a veteran of 30 years, fought in many wars for his country, and yet shunned by his community. 

Seline is a 21 year old stoner and shroom consumer. She lives at a campsite and relishes in being one with the nature around her. 

Nathaniel is a high class business man. He takes runs on the trail next to a campsite at the break of dawn before getting ready for a day in the office. 

Draboo found the poor petite thing under a bridge shivering in the night, asleep and clutching a small brown stuffed bear. He was baffled at how her colony would banish such a young girl, proof that humans were incapable of nurturing their own and caring for themselves. Draboo, with a heavy heart and tears threatening to fall for this fragile human, gently sprayed her with a sedative, scooped her up, and carried her to the awaiting ship. She would find a good home on his planet, he would make sure of it. 

He then found three other humans that needed rescuing and takes them to his ship where they will travel to the planet Grinnell to his shop and training facility. 

Jubilena is a pet trainer at Draboo's Human Shop and Adoption Agency. Frampton is a volunteer who helps socialize and calm the rescued humans. He brings his human, Krystal to help ease the humans into trusting us. 

Kitronas are humans. Tranas are an alien race who are three to four times larger than the average adult. Humans resemble their own race, but with skin tones that do not shimmer and manes that come in many colors. Tranas have control over the elements.

A surprise visitor to Sabrina's office turns out to be Miahn, sent to retrieve the Devons to deal with the disappearance of Maratobia, Tirqwin, and Khediva. As they investigate, they realize the disappearances are rooted in a tragedy from their past, and as they confront not one but two enemies, one of them might not make it back to Praxatillus alive....

authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!

title: The Lion King - The Bonds of Trust
description:
After losing her parents at a young age to a murderous lion and facing abuse from her mean spirited aunt, a young African-Romani woman named Shani runs away from her village and ends up wandering off in the savannah. After having a run in with three hyenas, she is ultimately rescued by a strong Lion King named, Mufasa. 

After having done something for one of his pride members, he returns the favor and takes her in. She gets to know his queen Sarabi and his young cub named Simba. During her time with Mufasa and his pride, she comes to realize that they have more of connection then they thought. After tragedy strikes once again, Shani and Simba are sent into exile and they run away into a jungle to be taken in by a meerkat named Timon and a warthog named Pumbaa. 

When they are forced to return to The Pridelands to face Mufasa's evil brother Scar, will Shani fight her fears to help Simba take his place as king and find out who she truly is within herself?

I only own Shani and the rest of my OCs.

The Lion King belongs to Disney.

title: Smash All Pots and Pans To Go to School

The former top engineering student Wei San transmigrated into an interstellar child who was deprived of education. By picking up garbage and turning waste into treasure, she finally saved a sum of money before the opening season of school and immediately signed up.

She planned to become a Mecha Engineer in the future. It was said that it can make a lot of money and was closely related to her own original specialization. Plan pass √

Unexpectedly, because of her greed for cheap tuition fees, Wei San reported to the wrong major and became a mecha individual soldier--those violent maniacs who licks blood all day

Wei·Gentle & Quiet·Impoverished·Engineer: "......"

However, the environment could not make her give in, and Wei San decided to learn by herself in her spare time.

During the training period of a certain competition, the media interviewed and photographed the individual soldiers of each school in turn, which was broadcast live on the whole interstellar network. title: Factory Inc.
description:
More than 500 years have passed since World war III, A war that changed everything.

Humanity has long since recovered from the war's effect. Many human lives were lost, in return, they also gained much more.

But the Scars of war remains. Monsters and Beasts roam the Earth, and many places remain deadly due to radiation. Still, humanity stood firm and was able to persist and even surpass their ancestors in terms of science and technology.

One day! A boy receives the greatest gift in the universe, in the form of a System that can produce factories. Now everything he needs is within his reach. He only needs to grasp this opportunity. But it won't be so easy, as he finds himself surrounded in a quagmire of conspiracies and attacks from powerful gods and demons that are trying to spread chaos in the universe.

Follow Arc in his adventures to uncover the secrets of the System and the universe, while creating a safe haven for him and his loved ones.

PS. I'm doing this by myself, and I'm no expert in English, so don't expect much. I'm just doing this for fun... if you have any suggestions let me know every bit of it helps.

title: The Alien
description:
"I could tell by the way he looked at me. He was afraid..."

Lilliana's interplanetary journey takes an unexpected turn when her ship crashes on a primitive planet.

Stranded and injured, she must keep a low profile to avoid alerting the locals, who are yet to discover space travel. Lilliana soon realizes that she can't survive on her own and desperately needs help until her brother arrives.

She is soon discovered, but the alien, Jarath, surprises her when he takes her in. Though they can only communicate through basic gestures, she feels drawn to him, but she is determined to never give her heart away again.

With others of Jarath's kind searching for her, the race is on. But who will get to her first - her brother, or the aliens out to do her harm?

Sparks fly in this romantic science fiction novelette.

© Susan McKenzie 2017. All rights reserved.

authorBio:
Sue is an Australian author who loves creating worlds of fantasy and science fiction with fascinating characters and slow-burn low-spice romance.
She loves stories that hit you in the feels.

She's not a typical author coffee addict - but chocolate? Now that's a different story. When she's not writing, she loves to paint, draw and play the guitar.

title: The Touch of Infection
description:
Carisa's been running for her life the past two years. Loosing her loved ones and anyone she grows close to. The apocalypse was caused by an alien raise coming to earth and proclaiming they'll fix the planet. Their way to 'fix' it being destroying humanity with a plague. However they didn't expect the human body to be as persistent as it is, the infection they spread mutating and making humans reanimate with a hunger for flesh. 

They thought they could contain it, control it even, but it's spreading faster than they thought. The world is dying faster than ever before. And Carisa only want to survive, to make it to the next day, bumping into an Alien she thought she'd be petrified. But upon further inspection... their not that much different that humans. Curiosity at its peek with both of them and so she gains a tail always creeping behind her. The aliens just won't let her go. 

Story is written on my free time so it has a lot of typos, sorry.

title: To Rescue a Villain
description:
Mary loved the villain from her favorite comic book series for years but always thought it was nothing more than admiration. It isn't until she lets herself imagine how thing's could have been if she was in his story that she finds herself mysteriously transported to his fictional world and standing a mere foot away from him.
                  
              As the determined girl tries to change her favorite character's fate, he slowly begins to fall for her and she has to decide if she wants to take the risk and start a relationship with him whilst knowing all the horrid things he could  do in the future.
                  
              While Mary tries to save her favorite villain and figure out what pulled her into this world, she begins to wonder if she has become a key player in this story. As Mary works alongside the main characters to uncover the mystery of their alien infested moon, she starts wishing these heroes and villains she has come to love were only two-dimensional.

I breathe stories. I dream them. If it were possible, I'd eat them, too. (I'm pretty sure they'd taste like cotton candy.) I can't escape them - they're everywhere! Which is why I write! I was born to bring the crazy worlds and people in my mind to life, and I love sharing them with as many people as I can.

I'm also the bestselling, award winning, internationally acclaimed author of over sixty titles and counting. I write speculative fiction in multiple subgenres of romance and fantasy, contemporary fiction, books for both teens and adults, and just about anything else I feel like writing. If I can imagine it, I can write it!

I live in the desert of southern Arizona with a pack of spoiled dogs and Tubbs, the Godfather cat who rules them all.

For a complete list of my books, you can visit my website or Amazon page!

I also like to take more time to fix some old stories to be a habit, too, and get back to the other ones later on. 9. Sometimes I change the listings around if I can do this one instead, it happens... Don't ask me why, it just comes to mind when it does 'I guess'... lol 10. I like to finish some of my stories. If it happens, I will do my best to finish it. So, there's no need to worry. 11. I will do the main ones little at a time to take breaks that will stay on here for sure that I haven't finished yet to get back to later; as well as others to follow on here in the future. 12. Last but not least. Some I do want to make and/or finish on here to go back and forth on.😁

title: Ascension
description:
There is no such thing as a good side and bad side in a war. We are both the good and bad side. It just depends on your perspective. At the end of the day when the sun goes down we are  still the murderers who took the lives of hundreds and sometimes thousands. We are still the ones who have orphaned children. And you call us saints but no, soldiers are murderers who hide behind patriotism and lies. 
                                                                                                                                                                         -Lorelei Jameson

WARNING THIS IS A SEQUEL. Go read Journey before you read Ascension.         

Lorelei and Indiana escape from Headquarters only to find out that the war is in full swing. even though the Colony is getting more and more recruitments everyday they still only have a fraction of the amount the Extorians have. 
They start to receive aid from a planet known as Orion A in the Orion Binary system. The people on Cambaar start to wonder if they really are on the planet of Cambaar. Someone is keeping secrets and they might decide the fate of the Colony. 
The plan to end the war just might work but it is the most controversial topic in history. The people of Cambaar split into two sides over the final battle. Lorelei still doesn't believe it will work.
As the war rages forward relationships unravel. Sanity is lost. And blood is spilt across the forbidding land. They finally begin to understand what it means when they hear  "The price of war isn't just blood".

5- nuclear war (6-17-19)

authorBio:
I live in the best country in the world with the best beaches including Surfers Paradise Beach which is in my story "Cyberfright Checkmate".
Please read some of my works. I write novellas and short stories. My genres are erotic romance, mystery, science fiction and paranormal.
If you follow me and if you ask me, I will read and comment on your stories.
SUGGESTION TO AUTHORS:  Finish your books before publishing. You may get more readers that way. I have been caught a few times where I have started reading a good story only to find it stops half way through with the reader having to wait a week or more for the next chapter, then another week for the chapter after that and so on. When this happens I usually abandon the book and never return to it. Now I won't read anything unless it has "Complete" after the title. So finish your book first, then publish the whole thing in one go, or at least over two or three days. If not this will be one reader who won't read it!

description:
Centuries after the Nuclear War, a rebellion is rising and Renna finds herself at the heart of a Civilization hiding many evils.

                                                                      *****

Centuries after the Nuclear War, the Earth is an uninhabitable tundra, leaving the Civilization as the lone island on which there is a chance for survival. title: Shadow In Your Mind [ARC 1- 5]
description:
All Wong Xue Guo ever wanted was her parent's attention on her. She had done all that she could do to get it, only for her attempts to be futile. Just when she was about to give up and just embrace the world of fiction to fill her heart, her mother suddenly changed a hundred and eighty degrees and acted like an affectionate mother that calls her 'baby'.

The change happened around the same time as the zombie outbreak at a shopping mall. That mall coincidentally was also the place for Wong Xue Guo's high school graduation party with her classmates.

Although happy to be showered with love and concern by her previously indifferent mother, Wong Xue Guo could not turn a blind eye to the hints of her mother's strangeness.

Why would her mother tell her to hide right before the zombie outbreak?

Why would her father know the zombie's weak point?

And who can tell her why her housewife mother could kill zombies with kitchen knives with ease?!

title: Book 5! Reader X Baki Characters            ~The Bottle Of Curse~
description:
At last...,its summer time!,Y/n is very excited that this year she will be spending it together with her loved ones in Tokyo.

After the trouble with the time machine and Pickle,Y/n still craves for adventure.She goes to the beach with her friends and as they are hanging around and having fun,she finds a bottle washed up on the shore with something like a map inside it,but no matter what she does,it doesn't open.

When she finally manages to open it,inside it she finds a treasure map,but despite the treasure map,she accidentally freed all the sealed dangerous mythical sea creatures kept in it for thousands of years, including a very dangerous spirit...

To stop the creatures that have now spread all across the sea from creating chaos,Y/n has to go on a long journey and find the unknown treasure drawn on the map,but in the process,she has to face many problems...

With the others help,they start invastigating about it and try to collect clues since there isn't much information drawn on the map.Y/n collects information and with Guevaru's best pirate ship,her and her friends sail into the seas to find it!

In the prosses of it all,she finds new...interests...

Will she find the treasure and get out of this journey unharmed?What awaits for her into the now dangerous seas..?

title: Prelude to Retribution
description:
Tyaal Veriss, a fighter pilot for the Maynerian Dynasty, is shot down and severely wounded on a mission, but his life is saved by Captain Taleinia Marisala. Unbeknownst to Veriss, Taleinia comes from a planet with a culture where women instantly fall for men who commit significant acts in their honor.

authorBio:
Welcome to my page! I love science fiction and space opera, and that is the genre I write in the most on here. Though I do have two novels set in the real world, "Pearls Before Swine" and "Wretches No More".

title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
description:
When a tornado rips through Kansas, Dorothy (Fairuza Balk) and her dog, Toto, are whisked away in their house to the magical land of Oz. They follow the Yellow Brick Road toward the Emerald City to meet the Wizard, and en route they meet a Scarecrow (Justin Case) that needs a brain, a Tin Woodsman (Deep Roy) missing a heart, and a Cowardly Lion (John Alexander) who wants courage. The wizard asks the group to bring him the broom of the Wicked Witch of the West (Fiona Victory) to earn his help.

This is based off other Oz adaptations, such as Return to Oz, The Wizard of Oz. All AI illustrations are credited to @brajo81 !.

You'll love accompanying Dorothy on this first thrilling adventure based on L. Frank Baum's "Oz" books! Dorothy (Fairuza Balk) finds herself in the Land of Oz ... and makes delightful new friends such as, the Scarecrow (Justin Case) that needs a brain, a Tin Woodsman (Deep Roy) missing a heart, and a Cowardly Lion (John Alexander) who wants courage. The wizard asks the group to bring him the broom of the Wicked Witch of the West (Fiona Victory) to earn his help. With every twist in the yellow brick road, you'll find awesome new surprises and special effects that will astound you!

title: Beyblade Burst Rise OC
description:
Legendary Blader Valt Aoi has been training the next generation of elite Bladers at Spain's BC Sol. One day, rookie Bladers Dante and Demi Koryu and Delta and Destiny Zakuro witness Valt unleashing his newly-evolved Gamma Bey, Sword Valtryek. To their surprise, Valtryek radiates a golden light as it rockets around the stadium. Inspired by the limitless possibilities of this "Hyper-Flux" state, Dante, Demi, Delta, and Destiny seek the same bond with their Beys.

The Koryus and their partners, Ace Dragon and Gleam Dragoness, set off for Japan, the birthplace of Beyblade. But the path to glory won't be easy; plenty of tough competitors and Gamma Beys stand in their way, among them some of the best to ever let it rip. The Koryu siblings soon realizes they'll have to do whatever it takes to deepen their bonds with Dragon and Dragoness.

Don't they have what it takes to overcome these challenges? And will they ever achieve Hyper-Flux? Here begins the story of the Koryus and their Beys rise to the peak of the Blading world.

title: Dust
description:
All the earth is torn asunder.

There used to be grass, and the sun used to be golden. Children played outside, climbing trees with smiles on their faces and grass stains on their knees. People worried about a million things that would soon be irrelevant, continuing without a clue of the disaster to come.

Centuries later, what little is left of humanity survives in a society constructed beneath the surface of a glass dome, the world outside converted to little more than a desert wasteland. Survival is a routine rather than an effort, and all rules are surpassed by only one: if you want to survive, you never leave the dome. There's nothing alive out there. The radiation that soaks the earth makes sure of that.

Until one day, someone finds a bloody, dust-covered handprint on the outside of the glass.

Nothing will ever be the same again.



Book 1 of the Burning Series

Highest ranking: #13 in Adventure on 03/04/16

title: Piece Simul ✔
description:
Russ, a former janitor, is now second-in-command on a mission to find a cure for The Storm. The Storm eradicated those sixty and older. There might be a cure, but not on Earth. After each newly discovered planet, a team finds their minds and bodies changing. They're haunted by their pasts, and by the fanatical Green-Eyed faction. Decades into their journey, they must decide if they can complete the mission parameters, or default to back-up protocol. 

This star-bound research team stumbles upon what it means to exist in the vastness of space, against the ticking clock of a dying planet.

simul /ˈsɪməl/ noun 1. a shortened form of simultaneous

title: The Night the Vampires Came
description:
Ailith has had a secret crush on popular girl Holly since high school. When vampires kill everyone they ever knew, will Ailith finally get a chance to tell Holly how she feels? Who is the little boy who keeps appearing in Ailith's dreams? More importantly, will Ailith survive the rainstorm that is turning the entire world into blood-drinking monsters?
***
Editor's Choice November 2020, August 2021 | Watty Paranormal Winner 2020
***
Ailith Ying is a college student whose family is turned into vampires during a toxic rainstorm. Her only hope of saving them is to find an elusive and rare medicine known as a Lumin pill. Unfortunately, she is kidnapped and taken to Miami by two of her friends who are on the run from the vampire horde. Soon, as the infection spreads across America, Ailith must find her way back to her family and save the world.

title: Starsnatcher - Trapped In An Alien World [COMPLETE]
description:
Imagine you were trapped. Not on a deserted island, but lightyears away from Earth on a distant moon. Then you might be Lucas Anderson.

It's the year 2037. Mankind has discovered two wormholes into foreign worlds; much to our misfortune.

Near the isolated town of Ernstburgh, two college students have just disappeared, likely due to the beings that came through the wormholes.

Seeking to escape his depressing day-to-day life, 20-year old Lucas Anderson decides to investigate the disappearances, only to become a victim himself, too.

Once he wakes up on a distant moon, he knows he must get back to Earth. On his quest, he meets several aliens and eventually the two college students. Together, they embark on an interstellar adventure of galactic proportions, seeking to understand the truth behind what's going on.

[-]

New chapters will be released every Sunday, if possible. Occasional bonus content is released on Tuesdays.

Credit goes to hridiv for this fantastic cover.

Wordcount of about 160,000 words (don't know the exact number).

authorBio:
Hello everyone! Thanks for checking out my account!

Wanna buy me a coffee? Any donation amount is appreciated more than you could ever know! https://ko-fi.com/mbruckner

My name is Miles, and I like to write fiction in my spare time. I write in many different genres, from horror to fantasy to science fiction, but I hope to touch on as many genres as I can over my writing career. I have tons of interests beyond just writing, and I love meeting others who share my hobbies (as well as those who can open me up to new ones!). Shoot me a message if you'd like to talk about anything at all, from writing to video games to movies to computer science (my major) to outer space and beyond! I'm honestly down to talk about anything you may have in mind - I doubt you could bore me with a topic (try me, I dare you). My dream as a writer, beyond simply reaching an audience who enjoys my work, is to receive some type of fan art inspired by one of my stories.

I'm not the greatest writer by a long shot, but I had a lot of help over the years by many kind people online. If you ever need any advice or tips, or even a quick read-through of something you wrote, in a judgement-free environment, feel free to send me a message and ask!

As this is currently just a hobby for me, anything you see posted on my account may not be edited down to its fullest potential. The most edited version of my writings may be saved for future purposes, such as to be sold in the form of a novel, unless I specify otherwise!

PLEASE, do not redistribute, sell, translate, modify, or otherwise use my works in any way without asking me first!

title: Drifting Dark
description:
Captain Helen McCarthy has successfully led her ship and crew across the chaotic war zone dividing the solar system on 57 uneventful routine supply missions.

This is the story of their 58th voyage.

Junior Mechanic Cassie is far from ready for her new assignment. Thrust into one unexpected crisis after another, she'll have to learn fast if she wants to make it through her first mission in one piece. Stuck on a ship where none of the usual rules seem to apply, she's going to have to learn to break a few.

Because there are no rules in war. And zero survivors is always a possibility.

title: The Maad Doctor [The Maad Series #1]
description:
On a night where everything changes, Don and Sky are on separate missions that take place at the same event. By the end of the night, the two become the talk of Virtue City without anyone knowing who they really are. And by the next day, they are the most wanted people in Sin City.
        
Every second that passes, someone new and desperate joins in on the bounty to catch them--dead or alive. So when the two cross paths and realize what the other has done, they embark on an adventure full of steam-powered gadgets and machinery, all in an attempt to stay alive for as long as possible. 

But what they don't know is: On that fateful night in Virtue City, their actions gave birth to The Maad Doctor.

title: The Horizon Strangers
description:
Sam was just a simple girl. Fresh out of college, she finally landed her dream job as a program manager in the heart of the city. Her life was on track-everything was falling into place. Or so she thought.

That all changed the day the sky opened.

An ominous object appeared on the horizon, throwing the world into chaos. Suddenly, the life Sam had carefully planned was shattered by the arrival of something unworldly. Dark, mysterious, and otherworldly beings descended upon Earth, changing everything she knew.

In the midst of this upheaval, Sam encounters Zevran, a stranger from a distant planet. He's unlike anything she's ever seen-dangerous, compelling, and yet, she can't deny the pull between them. But with his arrival comes a reality she never imagined: a world of alien technology, hidden agendas, and an ancient war brewing in the shadows.

Caught between two worlds, Sam faces an impossible choice-adapt to her new, terrifying reality or run from it. But Zevran holds secrets that could either save her or destroy everything she holds dear. As the invasion intensifies, she must decide where she stands.

Will she embrace her fate or flee from the unimaginable truth?

The Horizon Strangers is a gripping tale of love, danger, and survival. One thing is certain: Sam's life will never be the same. But in this new world, can she trust her heart-or will the stars tear them apart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Stacy! I'm a novice writer who's absolutely in love with storytelling. There's just something magical about weaving words together, creating worlds where anything can happen. While I'm still learning the ropes, my passion for adventures-whether they're out in the world or tucked away in my imagination-keeps me going.

I'm always curious and eager to explore new ideas, and I love sharing stories that make people feel like they're part of the journey. Whether it's a simple daydream or a thrilling adventure, I hope to write tales that spark excitement and wonder. I may be at the start of my writing journey, but I'm excited for where it'll take me-and I'd love to have you along for the ride!

title: The Haunted Way (Champions of the Crystal Book 5)
description:
Sabrina Devon has settled back into life on Praxatillus, with her brother Scotty recovered, her cousins embracing her, and Maratobia about to give birth to the long-awaited Inheritor. But when Homeworld summons her cousin Ford to deal with a sighting of Malvarak, she joins him on a dangerous mission that endangers not only their lives, but their very identities, and puts Scotty's loyalty to her in conflict with his duty to Praxatillus.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!

title: (CODE X) 5500 Rebellion
description:
"You hear that? It's the sound of everything ending"
We tend to explore the universe to find allies, but what would we do if we really do encounter extraterrestrial life? Are we the only ones searching for life other than ourselves in the universe? Imagine life itself, not living or dying but the DNA structure of a multitude of living organisms working together to form larger lifeforms like humans is a staircase. Many previous generations of cells out there in space have tried to become "Life" But if we find extraterrestrial life forms that mean there has already been a bacterial cell that has evolved before us meaning that we are not the leader on the staircase, and a supposed death wall could approach. 

Finding remains of alien life would mean that there were others who tried to find the staircase, but failed because of a fall in civilisation, the extinction of species.
"It means that the human race has a way smaller chance of existing for any longer than let's say a few million years,"
"What did you even find?"

An alien.

Humans become an endangered species. It's the fall of the human empire and the rise of Kastrians. But what stands as a connecting thread between Kastrians and humans, are X-DROIDs or man eaters. To kill these X-DROIDs, arise their arch-rivals  ANDROIDs or killing machines. 

And thus begins the war that lasts 5500 years.

"This war must stop or everything will die,"
"But how do I stop it?"
"Take the time machine. 
Go to the past, find me and kill me."

5500 Rebellion project ©2020

title: Wayfarers (Champions of the Crystal Book 1)
description:
"What, you wanna go back to Earth and just hope it turns out okay? Knowing all this is out here?"

Sabrina and Scotty Devon's summer trip took them further than they could have imagined. A chance encounter on a London street led to an honest-to-God alien abduction, a rescue, and a trip to the front lines of a planetary siege. Not sure whether to trust their rescuer or the elderly king wanting them to stay as companions to his long-lost daughter, the siblings find themselves forming an unlikely family for a princess learning to control her amazing powers, along with her reluctant tutor and his even more reluctant Wayship. But an ancient cold war threatens to tear their makeshift family apart...if their journey of discovery doesn't kill them first.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!

At Welton Academy, Lorelai Perry hides behind her top grades, masking the pain of a broken home. Steven Meeks has admired her from a distance, quietly drawn to the girl who seems unreachable. After a chance encounter, their lives intertwine through small moments-shared smiles, late-night talks, and silent glances. As they slowly open up to one another, unspoken feelings begin to surface. But will they find the courage to say what truly matters, or will their silence keep them apart?

Sometimes, the quietest moments say the most.

title: Delta: A Spy Novel
description:
♥	Astrid		♥
Gunshots. Karate moves. Flipping through languages so fast that my brain struggled to catch up. These had been as familiar to me in the six years I had been in training as a school bell or sound of a teacher's voice might be to anyone else. At sixteen, I had seen more death than I cared to talk about. But what could I say? That was what life as a teenage spy was. And as part of America's little-known espionage agency Delta, that was what I had become accustomed to.
But I couldn't have known that things were about to change. A new assignment came up, and though I was with people I had known for years, this one would change things so that my life would never be the same. A drug dealer, working undercover in France. People from my past, popping up in the most unexpected places. And the boy with the blue eyes, who could be completely for me or utterly against me; often, I didn't know which.
This was one assignment that would stay with me forever. But, of course, I didn't know that as I headed in...to pure Hell.
Welcome to Delta. Now that you're here, good luck getting out.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just a college student trying to PR in this race we call life.

Running, music, Harry Potter, and all things peanut butter are awesome. And Jesus rocks my world :)

My eventual goal is publication, but for now I'm content with writing when I should be studying. The support on here is unreal and one of the only reason I've kept writing for so long. Big thanks to all readers out there!

"There are people who go places and people who stay." ~ Tex, by SE Hinton
Which are you??

title: After Surviving The Apocalypse, I Built A City In Another World
description:
[Congratulations, Terranian survivor #99598, for activating the Universe Assistance System!]

Althea, along with the remaining 1% of the population of their home planet, stared at the holographic screen in front of them in confusion.

Their galaxy was apparently ending, and suddenly announcements from an alien system appeared in their heads, telling them they would be permanently transfered to another world.

The survivors were all very depressed. First they were forced to survive in a zombie apocalypse, and now they had to survive a new world altogether? 

It just so happened that Althea was one of the few people who got the Lord Token, the ticket to controlling a territory---a supposed safe haven for her people. 

Althea looked at her very large stomach and sighed at an unknown future.

Would she be able to build a good home for her children and fellowmen? 

And... would she and her husband find each other again after this disaster?
___

title: Crimson Echoes (Yanderes X Reader)
description:
In a world ravaged by radiation and war, humanity clings to survival in fortified strongholds, while deadly ghouls with ruby hearts roam the wasteland. These rubies, the source of power and protection for the last human bastions, are as valuable as they are dangerous to obtain. But survival comes at a cost-where strength and strategy are the only way to fight, and the line between predator and prey is razor-thin. Welcome to a world where echoes of crimson blood fuel both hope and destruction.

title: A Different Path
description:
A year ago, Karna had done the unthinkable when he had come to Abhimanyu's aid, refusing to take part in the slaughter of the brave teenager.  In that moment, history had changed forever.  Now, as the threat of another war looms over Hastinapur, Karna must return to the brothers who hate him, to the mother who rejected him and to the friend he betrayed.  A story of redemption, forgiveness, sacrifice and new beginnings.

title: He is not the beast
description:
Zhuo Yan traveled to the world of beastmen and became the beastman of the leopard tribe.
He is a sub-beastman with three major sins: lust, laziness, and gossip.
... If conditions permit, who doesn't like handsome men, who wants to work, and who doesn't like to eat melons?
Zhuo Yan, a single beastman, currently has no conditions.
Because winter is coming soon, I heard that sub-beastmen without beastman partners will not survive the winter.
Before the blizzard came, Zhuo Yan met a dying young beastman, the most famous white-haired boy in the tribe, with a different fur color, and he has not successfully transformed, and has lost the qualifications to be a beastman.
In this world, beastmen are absolute forces, hunting and defending.
Beasts that failed to evolve were more despised than him, the despised beast.
But...
the cub looked at him with furry and wet eyes.
It looked a lot like the silver gradient that the family used to raise.
Zhuo Yan gritted his teeth and took it back.
-Later
, the Leopard Tribe welcomed the first sub-beast leader, who sat with the most ferocious and brave beastman partner. The leader was smart and brave, and led the tribe to open up wasteland, plant, build, and raise livestock. The Leopard Tribe became one of the most famous and powerful tribes.
"He is not the despised beast."
-Small
drama:
The little beast that failed to transform, likes to sleep with his brother in his arms in winter and lick his brother's fur in the morning.
Zhuo Yan: ...The tongue with barbs is such a sweet burden.
Later one night, the little beast suddenly transformed while holding his brother.
Zhuo Yan: ! ! Me, me, me, me, go -
meeting at the lowest point, the two beasts hate each other.
If there are conditions, they will be lustful, lazy, and possessive, black-bellied, and inferior. Loyal dog top (super big size difference

title: The Female Lead is Looking at Me Differently (GL)
description:
Synopsis:

Wen Zhao transmigrated into a low-magic Xianxia novel, only to discover she'd become the cannon fodder second female lead who bullied the female lead, seduced the male lead, and was generally a green tea b*tch, lotus-flower-like antagonist.

In the original novel, she was the catalyst for misunderstandings between the male and female leads, a dedicated tool character who lived until the grand finale. In the end, the male and female leads ended up together, while she suffered the consequences.

To avoid a bad ending, Wen Zhao tried her best to cling to the female lead without being too out of character, hoping to safely exit the story.

Although she was still being required by the system to perform actions befitting a second female lead, Wen Zhao believed the female lead would eventually understand her sincere heart!

However, it seemed like the female lead was looking at her a bit strangely?

*

Male Lead: A Zhao, I suddenly realized that I might actually like you a little.

Wen Zhao: ???

She thought this was the biggest deviation from the plot, but then the female lead slowly approached.

Lowering her gaze slightly, the female lead, whose gaze was usually cold, revealed a hint of obsession and possessiveness. She walked up to Wen Zhao and smiled softly.

She asked softly, "A Zhao, between him and me, who do you choose?"

Wen Zhao: I choose you! I choose you!

>>>>>

Reading Guide (to be added):

1. Fu Yu and the male lead have a verbal engagement but it's not binding. Anyway, the male lead is just a cameo, and there won't be any scenes you worry about.
2. There is some angst in the second half, but the ending is sweet, sweet, sweet √

One-Sentence Summary: Thank you everyone, I'm with the female lead now.

Theme: Even when facing difficulties, one should strive to overcome them and have the determination to reverse their situation. Only through hard work can one achieve success. Victory and new surprises are waiting not far away.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Life is short and bitter, refrain from leaving regrets.

title: My Campus Cemetery
description:
The nightmare we all fear of has emerged into reality. The Covid-19 virus evolved in its third phase, reanimating the corpse and transforming the infected into zombies. Now a new normal is not proposed but enforced as the only option human kind has ever left... to survive from this endless hordes of the undead in this new holocaust.

Scientists, doctors, and all front-liners are now fighting not just for the cure, but also for the new threat of the undead. Sadly, as this incurable disease spreads worldwide, man tapped in to their darkest side of humanity, the selfishness which have brought the virus in the first place. Now, will their self-centered attitude save them? Or will it be the root for the humans' extinction?

Join in on the adventures of a student teacher and a freshman lady as we switch from each one's point of view as they try to coordinate with each other from a distance. Securing what they think of as the safest place to be... their campus.

title: Crossdressing To Survive An Apocalypse [BL]
description:
Zou Yue jumped to the side, dodging an extended claw of a growling zombie. 


A pair of warm hands gripped his small waist from behind and pulled him over to a sturdy chest. The same pair of hands slowly groped his chest.


"Brother fan w-what are you doing?!" Zou carefully looked up at him.


Fan Xui smirked mysteriously at him and removed the huge shades stylishly. A clear pair of eyes met Zou's challengingly. "since I saved you just now, why don't you give me a kiss?"


"you... you can see!!! Aren't you blind!!!" Zou Yue glanced in shock. He pushed himself for of his body.


Fan Xui laughed out loud, gently caressing Zou's long black hair. "are you gonna leave me now?," he continued groping his barely their chest through his girly tank top.


"Fuck yeah!! Let go you poser." he pushed him away and started shooting the zombies outside with renewed passion. Fan suddenly caught his wrist. "You bastard, what are you doing, let go of my hand. The zombies are coming!!!"


"Hmm okay," Fan Xui let go. He swiftly snapped a fluffy handcuff snugly on his wrist, tying them both together. "Now we are tied together for live and death,"


"FAN. XUI!! Get this off of me!" Zou growled at him, but the young man just laughed happily.


"Sigh, you are beautiful even when you are angry, dear," Fan Xui whispered and pulled him up for a passionate kiss. He gently bit those soft lips and moaned. "Delicious,"


Letting go, he slowly waved his hand towards the upcoming zombies and they are reduced to ashes.

title: Screw This
description:
Dying after moving was not on Yeong-Cheol's plans, nor was traveling to different worlds. Even worse suddenly the guy he's supposed to kill keeps flirting with him?

"...Yeah no screw this," he watches as the ML presents him with flowers and chocolate.
     "But I-" The ML pouts while shoving the two items in his hands.
"No buts, I'm supposed to kill you," he shakes his head, "How much of an idiot are you?"
     "I'm in love of course I'm an idiot!" The ML smiles at him while blushing.
"... right...ok yep screw this..." 

Welcome to my second story! I'm still nervous about writing but hey! Hope you guys enjoy it!
      *Warning* This is BL  v('-')v

title: Waymakers (Champions of the Crystal Book 9)
description:
Five years after the Kyan invasion of Praxatillus nearly succeeded, there is an uneasy feeling in the Realm that the worst of the war lies ahead. With the Guardian and combined Wayship/Praxatillus fleet still missing, Sabrina Devon has been trying to train the Inheritor to defend them all in her mother's absence. But when a massive Kyan troop ship appears in orbit without warning, it seems they have run out of time....
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!

title: Serendipity (Book 1 of the Dana Halliday series)
description:
Dana Halliday is a veterinarian nearing a personal crossroads.  Burned out at her job, recently divorced, and having lost her favorite dog, she longs for her life to change.  Little does she know, she is about to receive an out-of-this-world job offer from a long-absent friend, and her life will change more than she ever dreamed possible...

Now complete, and followed by the sequel Indentured!

**1st Place in Sci-Fi-The Moon Phases Awards 2019**
**3rd Place in Sci-Fi-The Brewing Flair Awards**
**3rd Place in Sci-Fi-The Black Cat Awards 2019**
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
(Formerly @bluemoongypsy)

If you're reading this, thanks for stopping by!

I've been writing for a long time, since...probably the third grade, when I asked my mom if I could write a book.  Good mom that she was, she said, "Of course you can!"  So I did.  If I recall correctly, it was about a magic land to which animals could flee and be happy without us stupid humans.  From there, I moved on to bad fanfiction, your standard post-apocalyptic dystopias, and probably pretentious satire. 

My current works are a series about a spacefaring veterinarian, a novella involving a magical black cat and a misplaced dragon, and some shorter odds and ends.  Someday, when time permits (!!), I would love to write a biting satirical novel, or historical fiction about an ancestor or two, or maybe a steampunk crime novel.

My two favorite authors are Stephen King and Jim Butcher.   I'll read almost anything though.  My all-time favorite books are To Kill A Mockingbird, and Watership Down. 

Like my main character in the Dana Halliday series, I'm a redheaded veterinarian in the Pacific Northwest.  Unlike Dana, I have never met anyone from another planet (that I know of).

~Kirstin~

title: Silent Eden
description:
Born into slavery as nothing better than a Subhuman, unable to speak, unable to read or write and unallowed to learn such things, she works hard for her master, the Divine Magician. 

Then one day, as she's trying to continue her hard work, Silent Eden makes a discovery that could change the way she views the entire world.

Zanthius has lived on his own since the death of his mother. As an Islander, he knows that the land he lives on is sacred, and that no Mainlanders are to step foot on the island. So when he finds the strange girl in the ruins of the Island, he doesn't know what to do. She doesn't speak the language--She doesn't speak at all! 

To find out where she comes from and to send her back are Zanthius' duties to his people. But is it worth it?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Lover of all things supernatural, paranormal, magical, crazy, beautiful and insane. Often found writing about any of these topics, mixed with adventure, mystery, horror and romantic affections. Sometimes found abusing the "read before you buy" bookstore policies with a stack of books by the chair.

Mother, Crafter, Artist, and Daydreamer.

All older stories are UNEDITED.

Comments and constructive criticism are welcome~

title: Wonders From Beyond the Sky
description:
An alien planet divided by politics and unrest faces a turning point when a Terran Federation starship suddenly appears in its skies, seeking peaceful first contact. On the ground, political factions vie for power, and a secret revolutionary movement watches with bated breath. Caught between diplomacy and danger, an insurgent and a Sunguard Captain must each make choices that will shape the fate of two civilizations. Torn between the stars and their struggles, the decisions they make could unite or destroy their worlds forever.

This story takes place in the Lords of the Stars shared universe. See my profile for other stories set in the same universe.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Mattias von Schantz is an author and the creator of the Lords of the Stars universe, a world he has been building and writing stories in for over 30 years. He is a computer scientist with an academic background in artificial intelligence and cognitive psychology. By day, he works as a software engineer, writing computer programs for a living.

Also, he's Swedish, but writes in English to share his stories with a wider audience, since not enough people in the world read his native language.

You can also listen to audiobooks of some of my stories on YouTube now!

title: Glimmer of Hope (Land of Tomorrow Book 1)
description:
Following a nuclear holocaust, Nathan Taylor and his family face grim choices in order to stay alive. Fleeing deadly radiation, plague and desperate men, Nathan, an army officer, leads his wife and their two teenage sons away from chaos and madness toward his ancestral home in Kentucky. 

Horrors lie in their path. From the prison struggling to maintain control of its inmates, to the desperadoes who enslave anyone who comes their way, even survival may cost Nathan his humanity...or that of his sons, Joshua and David. Nathan struggles to keep his family intact, but it requires making brutal choices. He wants to protect his sons, but knows they now must be deadly and cold at times.

Nathan's home has been spared from the worst of the destruction, but a larger conflict over scarce resources erupts. For the survivors to have any chance they will have to fight and the desperate journey has transformed young Joshua and David into men called upon to lead and sacrifice. Torn between harsh realities, and wanting to hold onto fleeting childhoods, they are often conflicted and angry about the roles thrust upon them. Much will depend on how Nathan and his sons respond to a madman and his military regime seeking to conquer the fledgling community they are helping to build.

GLIMMER OF HOPE is an epic tale of one family's endurance and triumph after tomorrow's apocalypse.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: To Be A Killer
description:
Book 3 in the in To Be A Runner series. If you have not read books 1 and 2, I seriously suggest you do that before continuing or you will be really confused.



Missing friends, a new enemy, a secretive company, and many new discoveries.

Yep, that sounds about right.

It's been four months since some of the Abel residents left our walls, and in our search, we've been fruitless.

Until now.

With the help of a new friend, we discover more about Diana and Comansys, and what's happened to our people. That's the main priority-finding our friends, finding Maxine, finding Caleb. 

Turns out there's a lot more about the apocalypse and how it started. There's more than we could have ever imagined. Each new clue leads to another story-another piece of the puzzle. I can only hope we figure it out before it's too late.

Because there are bad people out there, and sometimes we have to play by their rules instead of our own. And I'm merely a pawn in this game of chess-a pawn that every player of the game wants to either kill or own.

New friends, old friends, new discoveries, and pain. So much pain. And yet... so much joy. So much joy doing the things I never thought I'd do...

And I can't help but hate myself for feeling so good about doing such horrible things.








Disclaimer-I do not own Zombies, Run! Or it's characters. I only own the ones I created. This is my Runner Five's version of season three and what I think happened in between missions.

title: Hazbin Hotel
description:
The series follows Charlie Morningstar, the princess of Hell, as she sets about fulfilling her seemingly impossible dream of opening a hotel called "Hazbin Hotel", which aims to rehabilitate sinner demons. Due to overpopulation, Hell goes through an annual purge where angels, led by Adam, descend from Heaven and kill sinners. Charlie finds this upsetting, and wants to find a more peaceful solution to the overpopulation problem. Her goal is to have her clients "check out" from Hell as redeemed souls and be accepted into Heaven.

With the help of her devoted manager and girlfriend, Vaggie, a kind, caring and confident Indigo Middleton, and their reluctant first patron, pornographic film actor Angel Dust, she is determined to make her dream become a reality. But when her proposal on live television goes awry, her plan attracts the attention of the powerful "The Radio Demon", Alastor who, despite finding her belief in redemption laughable, wants to help Charlie run the hotel for his own amusement.

title: Golden Dragon Tang Wulin 4
description:
The Age of Gods has long since ended, their voices no longer heard on the continent of Douluo. Humanity, standing on the shoulders of legends from its history, advanced soul technology to inconceivable heights. The humans of Douluo invented weapons of mass destruction, mechanized armor, and living metals. With these advancements, they went on to conquer the oceans and discovered two new continents. To fuel these new technologies, humanity hunted the soul beasts to the very brink of extinction. 


Once the dominant force of Douluo, the few surviving soul beasts now hide in the darkest recesses of their last sanctuary. The weakest have all been hunted, leaving only the strongest to scheme in the heart of the forest. The soul beasts, not willing to fade away, plot an uprising for their survival. In the midst of this, a god from a long forgotten era awakens in the depths of the Great Star Dou Forest to seek vengeance for the soul beasts. 


As darkness encroaches from the abyss, hope is found in a young boy who holds a power beyond divinity within himself-Tang Wulin! Hope for both humanity and the soul beasts, as the bridge between the two. He finds his way into the fabled halls of Shrek Academy, where he learns to wield his prodigious powers, makes friends and finds allies, eventually rising to become a towering leader. 


As he learns to harness his strength, danger lurks within the shadows as the various factions of humanity maneuver and plot to usurp Shrek Academy. Tang Wulin discovers the threat to the only world he knows as he sinks deeper into the intrigue. Meanwhile, camouflaged by the chaos and unbeknownst to the humans, the soul beasts' plot continues to steadily advance.


To defend what he loves and reclaim what was lost, Tang Wulin must seek out the legacies of legends past and unlock the full might of the Golden Dragon King!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Email acc- rose.angcos@gmail.com

title: Elemorts
description:
*HIGHEST RANKINGS: #1 ACTION, THRILLER; #2 FANTASY; #4 MYSTERY; #5 ADVENTURE; #6 SCIENCEFICTION/SCIFI*


Something sinister is brewing on planet Karomoz - the central hub and heart of a galaxy with numerous hospitable planets. Rumors abound of experiments for creating the perfect soldiers, excavations for ancient relics, and the hoarding of fuel and supplies - deadly weapons included.

Twenty strangers - the Elemorts to-be - from twenty different home planets visit Karomoz, each with their own reasons and motivations, and each armed with a unique elemental power.

Once on Karomoz, their fates get intertwined in unlikely ways, and two factions are formed, locked in an ongoing battle for what each side believes in - a battle not of good versus evil but one of gray versus gray.


*FEATURED ON WATTPAD SCIENCEFICTION'S "HIDDEN GEMS FROM WATTPAD OUTREACH" READING LIST*

*FEATURED ON WATTPAD BEYONDSOL'S "SUNFLOWER SPACE OPERAS" READING LIST*

*FIRST PLACE IN SCIENCE FICTION IN THE 2018 TALENT AWARDS*

*COVER BY @shelbychdance*


If you are reading this story on any platform other than Wattpad, you are very likely to be at risk for a malware attack. If you wish to read this story in its original, safe form, please go to:

https://www.wattpad.com/story/111292481-elemorts.

Thank you.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am an introvert, and my hobbies are video gaming, listening to music, watching TV series, reading, and... writing!!!

I am a doctor and currently doing residency in Psychiatry, which has always been my passion. I am very interested in learning about human behavior and the motivations that lie behind it.

I LOVE the color red. Almost everything I buy is red! Two of my room's walls are painted red (one is teal, my second-favorite color, and another is white).

My love for cats probably trumps everything else (but tied with Elemorts). I used to have a pet cat named Fluffs, but I had to give her away.

I LOVE, LOVE, LOVE the Turkish drama series, Aşk-ı Memnu! I could talk about it forever, and I wish it would reach a wider audience. The realistic dialogues and performances live in my head rent-free.

I am a very logical person and do not believe in anything supernatural. Ironically enough, the genre I like the most in stories is fantasy, especially superpowers!

I am currently working on my novel, Elemorts. It's been on my mind since my earliest recollections of my childhood. The twenty main characters - the titular Elemorts - used to be stuffed toys I played with as a kid. Since high school, the Elemorts have evolved into human characters - well, not exactly human, but they look like humans, they don't live in this world, and they have powers. I always welcome feedback, and any comments mean a lot.

My favorite writers are George R. R. Martin, Jeff Kinney, Agatha Christie, and Sidney Sheldon.

My favorite book series are A Song of Ice and Fire and Diary of a Wimpy Kid - a wide range, as you can see. I could go on and on and on talking about either of them.

Did I mention one of my hobbies is video gaming? I have played many video game series, including Tomb Raider, Uncharted, The Last of Us, Ghost of Tsushima, Assassin's Creed, Grand Theft Auto, The Elder Scrolls, Far Cry, Splinter Cell, Bioshock, Age of Empires, Metal Gear Solid, Crysis, Call of Duty, and many more.

title: Liberation (Remnants of Men)
description:
When seventeen year-old Runner was sentenced to death for stealing a loaf of bread in MegaCity One, his dreams were literally at an end. But then he opts to sign up for the Remnants of Men, a government sanctioned search for a rumoured fresh water lake beyond a radiated wasteland. 
At first, it seemed like a second chance to a new life, the transformation from zero to hero. But after an encounter with a rabid gang of men suffering an acute insanity, he soon comes to understand that he is one of many discarded into the wasteland to study the cannibalistic effects of a new drug called the Sixth Sense. 

Olivia Patterson has had one too many doses of the Sixth Sense and owes a massive debt to a shadowy rebel and loan shark called Death-Throe.  Being the daughter of the City's dictator, she knows too well that the gallows awaits any who associates with the rebel. In an attempt to free herself, she acquires an asset in the form of Runner and finds herself always at the edge, for if he survives it means freedom for both, but if he dies...
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Summoning Against Fantasy
description:
It's a peaceful day on Earth, the sun is rising, and the moon is setting; few cities and towns have been victims of a phenomenon called 'transferred.'

In the Noxial Continent in the New World, Humanity has to face a new threat to their society. Whether they were enemies or not, they had to work together to face a new challenge in another world where magic is key to success. The creature looks like a dragon called 'Zenido' rules the sky. The threat of foreign nations brought us together, and we will show them who is the boss.

With the power of the human spirit, can they survive with all the resources they have? Or maybe they become slaves of the Empire of the New World.



Estimated Update every 2 weeks or less.

This story is lightly inspired by Summon Japan/Nihonkoku Shoukan. Most of the story is original but ideas just like Summon Japan.

title: The Last Philosopher
description:
11x featured wattpad story.

Before everything, it's assumed there was nothing, but what if there was no real difference between the two? Just two extreme philosophies from the first conflict.

The planet Huom has been under observation for longer than should technically be possible. The primary watcher, a bitter black hole, is excited to see that there is finally a proverbial Darkness at the end of the tunnel.

Meanwhile, on the planet, in the freezing mountains of Empris, Lyeasrakardsul, the oldest living sorcerer, suffers from devastating nightmares. At the same time, far away in the sandstone desert of Zenon, Herschel, a man filled to the brim with weird ideas is escaping a prison filled with strange old men.

What does all this have to do with arsehole Gods, hairy Dwarfs, frustrated Afreets, curious Knomes, lizard-women, and nude Áettar? Perhaps Nothing, perhaps Everything... but why can't it be both?

title: Anabasis of the Northern Sea
description:
In 1943, the Japanese Empire found itself squeezed between the military powers of the United States and the Soviet Union, feeling the pressure of their encroachment.

Across the Pacific Ocean in the United States, a massive naval expansion plan was being implemented based on the Two-Ocean Navy Act. Once all planned ships were completed, the total tonnage would reach approximately 1,3 million tons. Meanwhile, the Soviet Union was dispatching a colossal ship from Europe to East Asia - the Sovetsky Soyuz. It was the first super battleship commissioned by the Soviet Union.

Three years had passed since the end of the Second World War in Europe in July 1940. The conflict, which seemed to have subsided, was now once again poised to ignite, this time in the Far East.

RELEASE: 2024 (UP TO DATE)

title: Colliding with Fate (Published under Pop Fiction)
description:
Brielle thinks she's in love with KY, and so does half the population of girls around the world. What will happen when she's given a chance to be with him and his band Infinite Chase wherever they go? She'll have access 24/7. But that means pretending to be the Band Manager.

The Bet, Spin-off

authorBio:
Hi! I'm Kim. (:

I started writing when I was in high school, but they were just ideas and poems. I remember, during my college years, I stayed in front of the computer waiting for the comments and messages from my readers. It was a blissful experience.
Even though I only had few readers, I didn't stop writing. You see, if you really love writing, it shouldn't matter if you have thousands of readers or none. Learn to write for yourself. Back then, I used to write to escape from reality, and to live in my own world.
I learned that words have the power to inspire and encourage people, so now, I do my best to put a smile on my readers' faces and make them realize that there's hope for everyone.

Music helps me in creating scenarios and plot. Sometimes, I get lost in the melody, and that's when I usually get the idea for a story.

Writing gives me a feeling of euphoria. I'm naturally curious; I think that's one of the reasons why I write. All my stories are connected; from the short stories to the published books, and to the on-going stories.
And before I became a writer, I was a reader first. I'm a bibliophile.

There are times when I feel awed because my books (The Bet, Between Now & Ever After [Anthology], Maybe Forever [ilurvfallensee], and Colliding with Fate) have been published. The Bet was made into a film (Just The Way You Are [now available on Netflix]), and is translated and published in Indonesia.
It's amazing how God works. He fulfilled His promise to me, and I believe that He is just starting.
Because of God's faithfulness, and the people who support me, reality is finally better than fiction.
I know there are more bright things in the future. ;)

Wattpad is my safe haven, and my readers are my inspiration.*

You can find me here:

Twitter and Instagram: kimjvillanueva
Goodreads.com/ilurvbooks
Youtube.com/kimberlyjoy22

Thank you very much! =)

title: To Be A Survivor
description:
Book #2 in the To Be A Runner series. If you haven't read book #1 I suggest you do that before continuing.

Highest ranking #84 in Mystery/Thriller


A blown up Township, one sworn enemy, a huge annoying crush, still no name, and a chance to speak again.

Yep, that sounds about-wait, what? 


Abel is gone, the Major is back, and now we all have teamed up in trying to defeat the main enemy-the man who somehow knows how to make zombies blow up a township: Professor Van Ark.

We know he's got something going on, but what we know is just the tip of the iceberg. He's the reason the apocalypse began. He's the reason Abel Township is gone. He's the reason Maxine isn't with Paula. 

I'm going to stop at nothing to stop him and whatever it is he's planning. I will stop at nothing to find out answers, but there's one thing I have to remember...

Not all of us will make it out alive, and not all of us will make it out... unharmed.

New friends, traitors, deaths, experimentations-all of it. It's all something I'm going to have to face, and I can only hope that I'll be able to survive it.






Disclaimer: I do not own zombies run, or its characters. The only characters I own are the ones I've created. This is my Runner Five's view of season two with some things I like to imagine happened in between missions.

title: The Golden Queen
description:

No one is exempt from Pharaoh's decree and when she is mistakenly accused of looting sacred royal tombs, she has a choice: flee for her life or face Pharaoh's wrath. title: The Black Herons
description:
Optima. A nation of prosperity, peace, and control. As life goes on within the island's perimeter, so do the forces that keep the mysterious country in power.

The Black Herons, a team of agents working for an underground Optiman agency, are tasked by their nation's vice president to retrieve a relic linked to the country's first president. The prized artifact was given away to the American government decades ago, and the Optiman vice president is eager to have it back.

Viv West has been in this business for over twenty years alongside her partner, Fern Undergrove. The two co-founded the Black Herons long ago and have since seen a constant change in their roster.

Cato Rose, the team's weapons specialist, and Naomi Hale, the resident hacker, work alongside Viv and Fern through dozens of missions every year, yet these heists have never tired them. But their lives are about to take a turn, for better or worse.

For the herons, this task is no harder than all the other heists they have completed in the past. That is until the team of four is forced to train a new member. Enter Emaline Kit, a teenage agent with an attitude and attachment issues.

Despite a road of obstacles ahead of them, the Black Herons must prepare for anything that could lead them astray-even if these problems may involve the other members of their own agency.

New chapters updated every Friday!

title: Imprisoned to Love You [Edited]
description:
A flash of lightning is all it took to turn Takeo Ruka's life upside-down. She is thrown 400 years into the past, into a world of war and bloodshed, but not quite the past she's familiar with from history class. The war is brutal and those a part of it ruthless, particularly one who is feared far and wide for his cold, cruel ways.

Despite the sudden change in her life, Ruka settles into the slow, primeval lifestyle with the help of kind, warm-hearted people of a village. While everything seems plain and simple in the beginning, complications soon arise one after the other, rousing unsettling emotions and situations.

Offering a moment of unbiased concern and help to a stranger soon turns Ruka into a prisoner, locked away in frightening luxury she cannot escape from. When she's about to give up on ever being happy again, she sees a silver lining.

It is then that she realizes that some things are not just what they seem to be on the outside. With truths slowly uncovering, Ruka soon finds the place she wants to be in and the person she wants to be with. But the question is, is she strong enough to overcome the overwhelming obstacles thrown at her that threatens everything she wishes to gain?

~~~~~~~~~~~~

ORIGINAL STORY, PLOT AND CHARACTERS (C) Midnight_Lilac

good.
