title: The Mid Laner Belongs To The Jungler (ABO)
description:
Synopsis: Fu Yue aka 404 was crowned as a Rookie King and everyone had high hopes for his future.

Unfortunately, years passed and despite being called a World-class mid-laner, he never touched the trophy.

Regardless, Fu Yue was not discouraged and kept the mentality of 'there will always be next year'.

That's it until he was diagnosed with a wrist injury.

He could no longer keep up with the high-intensity training and his change from aggressive to passive playstyle greatly affected his team's performance.

He fell from a Great God to a mere Flower Vase.

But the last straw that broke the camel's back was when Fu Yue was ushered to the hospital while the World Final Competition was still in progress.

Facing the harsh reality, Fu Yue finally relented and stepped down from the stage at the age of 21.

However, on his way back from the hospital, he was hit by a car and lost consciousness.

After waking up, he found himself crossing into an ABO world.

And he was a Dominant Omega at that.

Various dog-blood fanfictions crossed his mind and Fu Yue mentally braced himself for the worst.

Unexpectedly, he instead became a pampered second young master of the wealthy Fu family blessed with a loving family, money, fame, and a healthy body.

Knowing that all of these didn't belong to him, Fu Yue would always remind himself not to be greedy.

However, his resolve was shaken after he met Silence, a well-sought-after player in the Jungle position from Tian Meng.

After receiving his family's support, Fu Yue ultimately decided to step into the spotlight again.

A terrifying Nanako linkage was then born and swept the canyon like a hurricane.

After winning the World Trophy, the host asked Wei Chen what he thought of his rookie mid laner.

The usually cold and unapproachable captain had a gentle smile on his face.

Wei Chen: "My fated partner."

The huge crowd went wild and the internet exploded that day.

The cover was drawn by my little sister, her Twitter ID is @Pineapplerr

title: Earth, After ✔️
description:
Some fates are worse than death--survival is one of them. 

In the two hundred years since humanity left the Earth's surface to live in the sky, life on the ground faded to a myth, a tragic memory from which they severed themselves to survive. They floated above continents turned to sand and lands swallowed by the seas, watched storm after storm rage against their cities and their monuments until they broke apart the last vestiges of civilization in penance for generations of human greed. 

As a lightning harvester charged with flying her ship into these storms for energy, Raina has seen more of the planet than most. She has spent her entire life soaring above its craters and scars, studying the gaping wounds of human devastation, as she honed her skills and became the youngest captain in storm-chaser history. 

Her ship has flown for generations. Her skills are unparalleled. 

But none of that matters the day they go down.

~

Praise for Earth, After: 

"I'm so not ready for this ending. I will reread this for sure. It's honestly my favourite work on wattpad ever, and among my best reads in general, it's insane. I love your creativity!"

"Sometimes tearing my eyes away from the page is torture. Gosh...!!!!"

"This is literally a movie - the images are so clear!"

"oh my god... it has been such a long adventure [...] Youve dried up your surviving characters until the very last drop before giving the end, and my, Im speechless. Out of this world."

~

title: shiver (FEATURED) | ✓
description:
**CURRENTLY A FEATURED STORY** 
highest ranking: #11 in Science fiction

❝true happiness is only achieved without freedom.

There is a girl who wakes to a world that she was supposed to protect. Instead, she fights it.

There is a man who is cursed with the ability to dream.

A glass city is their cage, a city filled to the brim with unanimity and order, a paradise on an earth laid to waste by an artificial snowstorm. Sunlight filters through the glass buildings and through glass walls, pierces glass floors. It illuminates the city square when it is strongest at noon, surrounded by a huddled mass of citizens, all as perfect as the city they inhabit. And they all think: everything is as it should be.

And it is. 
Or, it was.

title: Utopia War
description:
Humanity emerges from the aftermath of the technological singularity having conquered scarcity, disease, poverty, aging, death, and, or so they thought, even war. With the aid of artificial intelligence and uplifted animals they have founded a virtual Utopia among the stars where people work only for personal development, satisfaction, or selflessly for the benefit of others.

An attempt to help another space-faring species has unexpected consequences that threatens to engulf a whole region of space, and the Human Consensus is forced to intervene. When the small conflict grows into an existential threat to their entire civilization, humanity is forced for the first time to ask the question: can Utopia survive total war?

I will be posting this story on RoyalRoad.com and this is one of many ridiculous hoops they want me to jump through.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm going to stop talking about what I'm going to write next and, in so doing, stop constantly making a liar out of myself. If I promise I'm going to write something it's probably a lie. I don't want to spoil Memento or anything but just don't believe my lies.

Nobody ever reads the really good stuff on my profile, so if you trust my judgement you should read Utopia War if you like optimism or City of Sinister Angles if you like pessimism.

I'm fond of strange fiction, that odd umbrella category from the days of the pulps that was eventually broken up into science fiction, fantasy, et al. I also love tiny highly specific genres like wuxia, gothic-punk or weird westerns. My own writing tends towards either science fiction or wuxia (and my sci-fi skews comic) but I've been known to wet my beak in fantasy.

I do critique stories by request but I am pedantic and mean, not necessarily in that order. I'm the man you come to when you're willing to have your feelings hurt in order to improve your writing, not the man you come to when you want your ego stroked or for a backdoor way to get extra reads.

I'm also always interested in reading wuxia stories, so feel free to recommend any (even your own). Please have an understanding of what the genre entails first, though.

Holy crap, The Second To Last Human Alive is currently (as I write this, not necessarily as you read it) number 6 in science fiction. For the record the preceding sentence was written forever ago. It's basically a memorial at this point. Don't touch it, it might crumble.

title: Captured and Captivated
description:
HARPER

On the run. Abducted. Rescued by the sexiest alien in the universe.

One moment I was falling asleep under the stars in the open trunk of my pickup.  The next I was abducted by aliens.

Terrifying creatures dragged me into their spaceship and locked me in a cage. They ran tests on me.  Growled, clawed, and hissed at me when I fought back. Escape is my only option, but how can I when the odds are so stacked against me?

SARHEN

She was the most beautiful thing I had ever seen... and she needed my help.

Being an Augment isn't easy. Every sentient species in the galaxy wants me dead, and half the time I think they've got the right idea. Still, cyborgs don't die easily and always fight for what matters most.

Enter the little human into my world. From the moment I saw her I knew that she was mine. The problem? She wanted freedom and I couldn't let her have it. I rescue her and suddenly I've put a price on both our heads. Between vengeful lizardmen, dangerous rivals, and the computer in my head telling me I told you so, will I find a way to get us out of this mess? Better yet, will I ever be able to convince my perfect little human that there's no place safer in the universe than right by my side?

title: Taken Into The Galaxy
description:
Ophelia finally came back after her parents sent her to a planet for young women to learn how to be are part of high society, but she isn't home for long until the Galaxies villain takes her away. He is not what it seems and neither is the planet she is from.

****

Adrik took her to dance before he left her to go track down a person that had food for her to eat.
The doors swung open wide and a group of armored masked men came storming in. Everyone stood very still frozen in shock. The men walked around the crowd. Two of them saw Ophelia and walked over to her. They looked at her then at each other then back at her. The one on her left nodded and picked her up and threw her over his shoulder. 
"No let me go!" She screamed. Panic started to set in. She was back. She couldn't be taken away from Adrik again. The grip on her tightened. She thrashed. She couldn't believe this was happening to her. 
They took her onto a simi large craft. Out of the corner of her eye in the shadows on Adrik property she saw a man in all black wearing armor watching as they put her on board. He gave her the creeps.

title: ElnorseFall
description:
Cloverlyne never thought she'd travel to an alien galaxy, let alone meet other alien beings. No one was allowed to leave The Realms, but her people had no choice. 

Her home galaxy- The Realms, was supposed to be a perfect paradise for the humans that had traveled there from the first planet. It was their empire among the stars, and the special energy surrounding the galaxy gave them abilities beyond the imagination. While some from her galaxy chose to change themselves to survive on their chosen planets, others changed the planet to fit their own needs. In the end, they'd evolved to become more than just human. And nothing could destroy their paradise... except themselves

Cloverlyne hadn't known the peaceful days of the Realms before it simmered on the break of war. Being forced to protect the planet she knew as home, she traveled aboard her brother's ship to a forbidden galaxy where the Realmers met beings from beyond their worlds for the first time. But when the aliens start questioning the Realmers purpose in their galaxy, and traitors are discovered, Cloverlyne will have to help finish a war she didn't start, or lose the paradise the Realms once was forever. 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This is book one of the ElnorseFall trilogy.

title: Silver Reign
description:
THE IRON EMPIRE SAGA CONTINUES!

Something watches from on high. A relic from a bygone age, it has waited patiently for decades.

Now... it is awake.

After the destruction of the Firmament, Jackson Quinn and his friends are on the run, with nobody left to trust - or so they believe. 

With the help of a mysterious new benefactor and dangerous new allies, they find themselves back in the fight, in an all-out war against the corporate powers that be.

But Jackson is not the only hero on the rise.

Having narrowly escaped an attempt on his life, Taewon Park is dead, as far as anyone else is concerned. Separated from his squadmates, he'll fight to uncover the deadly secrets at the heart of the Iron War - even if it costs him everything.

The sins of the old vanguard will come to light as the greatest threat of all finally steps out of the shadows, and nothing will ever be the same.

Silver Reign.
Coming soon.

authorBio:
Hello, world! My name's Brennan!
I'm an engineering student from the Atlantic coast of Canada with a restless imagination and a passion for science fiction! Somewhere along the line, I decided to write my ideas down.
I may not be very active as of late, but I'm still writing outside of Wattpad whenever I can! My most popular novel, "Iron Empire", has just been published in paperback and ebook on Amazon, and its sequel, "Silver Reign", is in the planning stage! Another project of mine, "300 Feet Above", is currently on hold, but its first act is available on Wattpad!
If you want to talk about novel ideas, help proofread my unreleased drafts or simply chat, send me a message!

title: The Only Favourite Ugly Husband
description:
Jiang Zhen crossed into ancient times and became the old bachelor eldest Jiang who was neglected by the whole family in the village of Jiang Xihu in Hexi Village.

He was born into a good family and Jiang Laoda is busy in the year but can't eat a full meal. Two younger brothers can marry a wife, but he is starved to death... Jiang Zhen feels unbearable.

Don't want to feed me? OK, I kill the chicken myself.
Don't you give me a glimpse of food? It doesn't matter, the door of the granary will be opened as soon as it goes down.

Want to tell me that I am not filial? Ok, I immediately took the knife into the county to slash people, and let the county grandfather grab all of us.

Jiang Zhen took the attire of the family's best products and became a tyrant in the village. He also saw the "ugly" ger who could not get married in the village.
Future father-in-law: "Jiang Zhen is always wandering around our house. Isn't it necessary to grab our house?"

The future mother-in-law: "What to do, Jin Geer must not beat him!"

Zhao Jinge's face is hot... Dad, the wild rabbit that I got back today is what he gave...
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mune'stahr and Pylott:  HELLMARROW,  a tale of the Ventriculum
description:
"MUNE'STAHR and PYLOTT: HELLMARROW" is an epic tale of interstellar/cross-dimensional adventure featuring RIKTONN MUNE'STAHR and KESHURA PYLOTT, former Territorial Expanse SpecOps Troop officers in the Hegemonic Emperium's Extraplanetary High Frontier Extrasolar Naval Fleet.  Following the catastrophic events of the Great Cosmic Revocation, that being the return to the Teshiwahurian Homeworld of all Naval Space forces from assignments in the World-Father's far-flung galactic empire, Mune'stahr and Pylott, separated from their naval units, are wrenched from the dimensions of normal Einsteinian SpaceTime to the bizarre cosmic corridor between dimensions known as "The Ventriculum".  During a dangerous time of violent internal strife within the World-Father's crumbling interplanetary empire, the two space-armored SpecOps Troop veterans become biologically-bonded with a gigantic, sentient, alien ship called "The Glide", a spherical vessel that follows the programming of its own governing artificial intelligence, known as "Neesharim", on a mysterious mission to police the interdimensional gateways against sorcerers, alien dictators and their armies, space demons and other non-human threats scheming to enslave the Multiverse.  Marooned in a colossal, intelligent shiftship that traverses a seemingly endless, omnidirectional fractal metaflow between universes, Mune'stahr and Pylott fight for ultimate Justice and for the control their own fates..."
*********************************************************************************
Cover Art by the legendary John Conrad Berkey,  copyright © John Berkey / www. johnberkey. com
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Having been published in several print magazines and online journals, his most recent stories center  on the saga of a distant planet, home to "The Withered Land". 

At the heart of an eons-old star system, it is the Last Place in Creation. Under dual suns, one a red giant and the other a blue dwarf, it is a world of Fallen Kings, nomadic mutant tribes, alien monsters and haunted, dead cities.  It is a place where Time is broken.

This is the place the Knight D'Spayr calls home and, in order, these are its stories...

1) D'Spayr, A Knight in the Withered Land
2) The Traveler in Red: Warlords of the Withered Land
3) The Withered Land, The Empire Falls: Hell's Avatar
4) The Withered Land: Dragons and Marauders
5) Mune'stahr and Pylott: Hellmarrow, a tale of The Ventriculum
6) The Withered Land, The Empire Falls: Abyssium

title: Edge of Reality [Elvis]
description:
Is she really there? Is she not? Is she just a figment of his imagination, or is he living an eerie dream?

Throughout all the stages of Elvis's life, starting in his late teens, he notices a rather mysterious, beautiful girl following him around. No one knows where she came from. Some say she is a ghost since she appears and disappears almost instantly, and only shows up once every year or so. Some say she's a time traveler. And to some, a stalker or just a crazy fan. This intrigues Elvis, but also confuses him profusely at the same time. What is she up to? Who is she? WHAT is she? And how does she appear everywhere he goes? At least, he THINKS he sees her. Despite his begging, she refuses to tell him her secret. This, as well as his love for her, drives him nearly to madness. Will he be able to figure her out before it's too late?
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
I'm a native New Yorker.  I read mostly fantasy, sci-fi, mystery and the occasional LGBTQIA+ romance novel. I'm over six decades old, so I've seen a thing or two. I've been writing off and on for 30 years or more. I'm also what's termed a 'geezer gamer' - RPGs and tactics and humorous video games. I've an abiding interest in international folklore, especially Irish and English.

Fun fact: I spoke at the United Nations NGO Youth Commitee on Nuclear Disarmament, representing Gay & Lesbian Youth of New York, way back in 1982. (Guess there's an FBI file on me somewhere, lol.)

WORKS IN PROGRESS:

Good Old Boys - a mystery/thriller/romance - murder most foul in a Mississippi Military Academy. Good Boys are often bad.

Winging It - A school shooting in Texas (USA) rocks the foundations of heaven itself. It's up to the last 3 resident Archangels to locate the missing Trinity and bring stability - along with hope - back to Heaven.  Convincing 6-year-old shooting victim Esperanza to become an angel may take a miracle, though.

You Must Read This - The most dangerous thing on Earth is...a book? When a mysterious book shows up around the world, it causes civilization to collapse, spreading war and chaos in an alternative Earth. It's up to two humans, a stray cat and a copy of the book to bring hope and sanity back.

The Toymaker Murders - Some ancient evil is murdering the toymakers of St. Nicholas. Is it a Dark Elf plot, or a nefarious plan of the sinister Gift Exchanger? It's up to Sunil Dey, Captain of the NoPo police to put the Mastermind on ice!

title: Beyblade Burst Surge OC
description:
From high atop the Blading world reign the Blading Legends, a select group of Bladers who set the standard to which all other hopefuls aspire. No challenger yet has succeeded in breaking through their ranks.

A legend among legends, Valt Aoi hosts an exhibition match featuring a revolutionary class of Bey: "Lightning Beys". Inspired by the battle, four unknown brothers and sisters, Hyuga, Hikaru, Hinata, and Hikari Hizashi, issue a challenge: armed with their own Lightning Beys Hippogriff, Hyrus, Hyperion and Helios, this unlikely quadruple is going to topple Beyblade's ruling elite.

As the Hizashi brothers and sisters' challenge envelops the world's Blading legends, a new tournament is born to determine who among them is truly the best. In the middle of this mayhem, there lurks a unique Blader shrouded in mystery.

Will Hikaru, Hinata, Hikari, and Hyuga be the spark that ignites a Blading revolution? With their solar Beys in hand, the brothers and sisters are ready to begin their own legend of growth and adventure.

title: Solar Gear
description:
1# Gundam (28.03.24)


In the year 5021, humanity now lives across the solar system divided into eight nations that live in peace 

That is until a strange occurrence transpires when a meteor shoots out of the sun.

Wanting to investigate, the eight nations have the intergovernmental organization know as the United Space Research And Peace Union, or U.S.R.A.P.U for short to investigate with giant mech's known as Gears to guard them.

On the meteor, they find a mech encased in stone which when they tried to activate would kill the pilots by melting then vaporizing them.

Taking the mech back to their HQ for further research, the group sent from U.S R.A.P.U to research the meteor was attacked by an organization that managed to kidnap the leaders of the world and hold the whole solar system hostage.

With the only hope being that mysterious mech, will the research group survive? And if so, what will they do about the eight taken hostage?

title: Through Fire and Water
description:
* THIS IS A COPYRIGHTED STORY OF MINE, MIDNIGHT_LILAC, PUBLISHED ON WATTPAD. IF YOU FIND IT ON ANY OTHER WEBSITE, IT HAS BEEN COPIED/REPUBLISHED WITHOUT MY CONSENT AND YOU ARE LIKELY AT A RISK OF A MALWARE ATTACK. IF YOU WISH TO READ THIS STORY IN ITS ORIGINAL, SAFE FORM, PLEASE GO TO WATTPAD *

From a life of pleasant luxury and heart racing adventure, Yukihara Izumi is unexpectedly thrown into a world of poisonous malice and turmoil. For a not-so-average teenage girl of the modern world, fighting and shady work aren't all that new or surprising. However, similar situations in the Feudal Era are ruthlessly torturous, battering and definitely something anyone would wish to never experience, not even one as steadfast as Izumi. But she soon settles into the rough life with the Feudal Capital's downtown civilians.

Not so surprisingly, things aren't always as simple as they seem to be and don't remain so forever either. It took just one unexpected encounter with an unexpected stranger in dire need of help to turn Izumi's life upside down. Dragged into the dark depths of lies, insidious plots and dangerous people in a place where nothing is what it appears to be, it is purely survival of the fittest. The coldest, cruellest and most merciless Emperor to have ever dictated the Empire is not the only one she has to face but also his vicious and obscure vassals that have an eagle's eye on her every move.

It has always been easy for Izumi to keep up her inherent strength and determination no matter how dire the situation and that's what she plans on doing even after being thrown into a world of mayhem. But perhaps things can get a lot more complicated and out of hand when deeper emotions are involved - curiosity, deadly desire and suffocating possessiveness.

~~~~~~~~~~

ORIGINAL STORY, PLOT AND CHARACTERS (C) Midnight_Lilac

title: OBLIVIOUS
description:
Noah Grey awakens to a world wiped clean by a global flood and reseeded with new life, but not all of it is good. 

When Noah wakes up on a space ark and discovers Earth has recovered from a global ocean, he meets Eve and learns about their mission to repopulate a planet where the reseeding didn't go according to plan. With Abraham guiding them from the space ark, they begin a new life safe in their habitat. They must come to terms with the relationship they are supposed to have and their growing attraction to each other. They also battle the overwhelming urge to venture outside and explore a world that is more vile than they could ever imagine. The temptation is real, one they can't deny or resist. 

Vile Planet Book One

title: A Way of Honor (Champions of the Crystal Book 2)
description:
King Baldaran of Praxatillus is dead, and Maratobia, his only surviving child, must become Queen as well as Guardian of the Great Crystal. Her companions, Sabrina and Scotty Devon of Earth and Wayfarers Tirqwin and Khediva, accompany her home, only to find themselves embroiled in an investigation of regicide and a plot against Maratobia. But is it political or personal? It will take all their strength-and loyalty to each other-to stop their unknown enemy, deal with the revelation of Tirqwin and Maratobia's link, and face a possible war between Praxatillus and the Wayfarer Homeworld.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love characters--the complicated, confused, well-meaning ones doing their best to get through the day, even when that day  turns out to include aliens! For me, stories come from characters interacting with each other with their different goals and agendas and how those intersect.

I've always been fascinated by families and the numerous ways they can be formed, and that's a consistent theme in my work. Though families of all kinds are a source of love and support, I've found they can also be a rich source of drama.

My online writing started with fanfic for The Mentalist, with a focus on romance and murder mysteries. If you're interested, you can find me as Idan on fanfiction.net. But science fiction was my first love, and my original work always seems to go back to that. Though there's romance and murder mystery in that too!

title: Runaway World
description:
During the final decades of the twenty first century, a rogue brown dwarf star passed through the solar system and its gravity threw the Earth out of orbit around the sun.
     Two hundred years later, when the atmosphere has finished freezing onto the surface, explorers from the last refuge of humanity venture out to see what's become of their world. Things looks bleak. Mankind faces a future of huddling in whatever warm refuges it can make for itself until the Earth's core goes cold, but then a discovery is made. An opportunity exists for mankind to leave the planet and find its destiny among the stars, but to do so requires an all or nothing gamble and losing would mean the end of the human race. Some want to take the gamble. Others don't, and so conflict and violence breaks out as the survey teams explore a planet transformed out of all recognition...

authorBio:
My name is Ian Reeve and I am a Groundsman and greenkeeper for the local council. Apart from novel writing, my hobbies include painting Warhammer miniatures, building wooden model boats and watching evolution take place in simulation on my tablet. I also grow carnivorous plants and have a self contained terrarium in which a colony of copepods and other pond creatures have been living, completely cut off from the rest of the world, for about five years. I call it Biosphere Three.

title: The Last Vault
description:
In a future where Earth has been "restored" to a pristine natural state, humanity has been exiled to orbiting stations and distant colonies. The wealthy elites, known derisively as the Toff, have claimed Earth's beauty as their own private trophy, dismantling every human-made structure and hiding Earth's legacy under lock and key. Forbidden and off-limits to all but a select few, the planet has become a myth, a dream, and for some, an obsession.

Callen is a deliveryman scraping by in the underbelly of Earth 2, a gleaming satellite that serves as both a counterweight to Earth's space elevator and a paradise for the Toff. His odd jobs bring him close to their world but never let him touch it. One job takes him to the Terminal Village, a medieval-style settlement at the base of the space elevator, where he learns of a tantalizing rumor: a hidden vault deep in the Rocky Mountains, filled with priceless relics from Earth's past.

Driven by desperation and a growing defiance against the Toff's control, Callen begins piecing together fragments of truth about the vault. To reach it, he must navigate Earth's untouched wilderness, avoid detection, and unravel the secrets the elites have buried. But the deeper he delves, the more dangerous his journey becomes-and the more he realizes the vault's treasures might hold more than wealth. They could hold humanity's forgotten history... or its final undoing.

In this gripping blend of dystopian adventure and treasure-hunting intrigue, The Last Vault explores the meaning of ownership, legacy, and the lengths we'll go to reclaim what was lost. Perfect for fans of speculative fiction and high-stakes heists, this is a story of forbidden worlds and the resilience of those who refuse to be forgotten.

title: Peace and Harmony (ZachBot x Reader Wild Kratts fanfic)
description:
(Desclaimer) Before you read the story; I just wanted to say that all rights belong to PBSKids and the Kratt Brothers, this was no sponsor, it is all just for the people who love this specific character from the show. Thank you! (Team-EWP Blurple-Galaxy, A.K.A. Lyliana)

You were walking outside your house on a lovely summer break. The people chatted about in your neighborhood street, the birds sang melodies, the sky was clear, and some squirrels hunted for some acorns.
This summer was a going to be a busy holiday, you're parents had a lot of plans for the vacation. you all mingled about seeing some animals at the zoo or maybe go on a trip to any country, and your dreams came true. After a long ride from what seemed like a marathon, your parents unpacked the car and made some tea in the cabin, you laid on the cozy couch and (like you always did) texted your friends on your iPhone.

At evening, you gazed at the sunset admiring the golden colors of the sky until they faded into a stary blue and black sky.
suddenly, there were kids (your age) peeping out of the grass/bushes in red shirts, it was strange how they were dressed the same color but you didn't care, you gave them a friendly wave until a strange sound that sounded like technology and mechanical moans came from there bodies, they acted pretty odd for kids, suddenly they transformed into hardware robots with a cake shaped body, a dome shaped head that looked like an army tank, and a pipe for a mouth, they grabbed you by the arms one also held your mouth shut and took you into what looked like an Airship?

title: U.N.E.
description:
The year is 2043 and the nations of the world find themselves almost powerless against an unknown enemy known as Unknown Entities, or U.N.E.'s. The Worlds best weapon against these hideous creatures from space are the giant Mech's and their pilots who stand on the front lines  and fight a never ending stream of U.N.E.'s to protect their lands, nations, and friends from harm.
Two young pilots from very different worlds come together at a secret weapons facility as the next generation of Mech's are ready to hit the front line. One is a young British pilot born and raised in combat who is haunted by horrible memories, while the other is an American pilot who has never seen combat but has never found anything or anyone that can best her. Can these two young officers set aside their differences and pride and do what needs to be done? Or will they falter when it matters most?

authorBio:
Hello there! Thanks for stopping by and checking out my profile and possibly my stories. I hope you enjoy what I write.

For those who know me already, I would like to say thanks for following me and continuing to read and comment on my stories. I just have a few things I would like to post here as there are a lot of questions that have already been answered before. So before anyone goes asking a question, check this to make sure I haven't already gotten to it.

1) For those wondering about the Eternal series: I am starting over again from the beginning! To those that read up until chapter two of book three, I am sorry to say this but you will have to wait a little bit until I get back there. For various reasons I felt the need to rewrite it from the start and you should know that it will not be entirely the same story. The plot will remain mostly intact, but certain events and characters will change. So even if you have already read it, give it another go. I'm sure you will see the differences.

2) Defiance is also currently in the middle of a rewrite. It was one of my favorite stories to write and I honestly hope to get it published one day. So on that thought I doubt I will post it here. Sorry.

3) I try to keep the updates as regular as possible, but sometimes the real world doesn't like me very much. Just recently I lost my laptop because of an idiot move (I dropped it like a toddler) and had to wait a couple of weeks to get it replaced. So please bear in mind that sometimes I just cannot get new content out when you might want it. However, that does not mean I have stopped. Feel free to message me for an update if the book you like hasn't been updated in a little while and ask for an ETA on it. That usually gets me into motion if I am able to.

For any other questions feel free to post down below or send me a private message. Don't forget to vote if you like what you are reading and follow me if you want to know when new updates are out.

-Captius

title: Astronomicon 1: Inception Point (Finished)
description:
Three Spacecraft, two-hundred-and-forty colonists, twenty-five trillion miles and a discovery that changes everything.
      
"Astronomicon: Inception Point" follows the human race's intrepid first steps into interstellar space, a colonisation mission to Proxima Centauri. The colossal distance and harsh environment are not all that stands between them and survival.
      
This first volume in the epic Astronomicon series is the story of their desperate adventures and the political machinations that are unfolding back on Earth, which threaten to end space exploration permanently. With colonies on Mars and a thriving mining community around Jupiter, will everyone want to come home?

-------------------------------------------------------

This is a complete rewrite from scratch of the first novel in the Astronomicon series. It's effectively the same story with many of the same characters (as it must fit with book 2 obviously) but there's LOTS of new stuff, the Elysian spacecraft has been completely redesigned and there are a few new twists added. The science has been hugely improved, the pacing tightened up and I've worked more on character development.

Please comment on any chapters you like (or don't like!). I'm particularly interested to hear how this new version compares to the original. And don't forget, if you DON'T like a chapter, please DON'T vote for it!

Books #1, #2 and #3 are out on Amazon. If you would like to support my writing, PLEASE, PLEASE, PLEASE leave a review there!!!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a lifelong fan of sci-fi but enjoy comedy, thrillers, mystery & more, if the writing's good. My own works rarely fit into a single genre as I like to keep my sci-fi human. That means there's going to be some drama, comedy, action & a dose of mystery too.

PLEASE comment on my chapters as you read. I love feedback and always try to respond. Feedback has led to many improvements to my books. Listening to my readers is a great way to improve.

My main works are the Astronomicon (https://Astronomicon.co.uk ) series of sci-fi novels (Search for my name or Astronomicon on Amazon). The series charts the progress of the human race from first interstellar exploration, through political upheavals, subterfuge, first contact, interstellar wars & the reason for our existence.

title: It Had To Be You
description:
Jess is a tomboy and runs her own landscaping business and she loves it. Her best friend is the complete opposite, glamorous and beautiful, and as usual Jess is dragged along in her wake. But in the background is where she's happiest. 
Despite all this, she lives in fear of her past coming back to haunt her, the daughter of a pious vicar, she rarely visits her home, either physically or mentally. 
As she wins a huge work contract and plans to expand her business she really feels that the world is her oyster. 
Nothing can disrupt that. Can it?

For centuries the intelligent animal kin of Wildhearth have lived in peace together but as their technology advances with dangerous rapidity their world is heading for a new conflict more brutal than ever before.

Foxkin hacker Jett has come into possession of a mysterious data drive that brings death to anyone who dares to penetrate its contents. Fleeing the rabid pursuit of a squad of elite wolfkin enforcers she desperately seeks allies among the tangled alleyways and hidden tunnels of Wildhearth. title: Power Play (Book 2)
description:
Brandon Stamp is abducted, experimented on, and given super powers. He discovers he is a pawn in a power struggle between groups who want to use him and his abilities for their own ends. His wife is missing, his friends may be dead, and he is looking for answers... whether he gets them or not, we will find out together!

This is a "choose your own adventure" style story, where readers vote to determine what happens next at the end of each chapter. Even if a chapter has closed for voting, feel free to leave any comments or thoughts you have. I'm making this up as I go along, so all input is welcome.

New chapters are posted about once a week (or so).

Read book one, "Power Shift" here: http://www.wattpad.com/story/6594672-power-shift
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Ideas are my passion, and I love helping people spread theirs in interesting ways.

I’ve run my own software company, performed improvisational comedy, and worked at Intel for nine years in a whole slew of technical and management roles. I now work in digital marketing, run some speaking events in Phoenix, and have a prank/flash mob group to help keep things interesting.

I've always loved to write, and have dabbled mainly in screenplays and short stories, with a brief side trip into writing for a sketch comedy troupe here in town.

Because of that love of writing and ideas, when ebooks started transforming the publishing world I couldn’t resist jumping in to teach authors how to launch their careers in the world of indie publishing.

I'm on Wattpad to explore this great community and work on my own writing discipline. My main work is an ongoing "choose your own adventure" style story where I ask readers to help me figure out what happens next. It's definitely keeping me on my toes, and I hope you enjoy it.

Cheers!

title: Reborn in the Interstellar World as Cannon Fodder
description:
Ye Mo crossed over and unexpectedly found herself in an interstellar novel, but not just any character, she become a cannon fodder with the name Ye Mo, who was also a useless waste. Being poor was understandable and she could even accept being cannon fodder, but why was she unmarried and pregnant? What kind of mess was this? But who could tell her that the Yu Mo in the book was not pregnant with the male lead's child? Why was it different for her? Whose child was in her belly? Taking care of the child was not a problem for her, but what kind of nutrition supplement was this? Why was it so hard to drink? The people here seemed a little too pitiful, didn't they?
Fortunately, she had her own space and a farm. With delicious food in hand, she wouldn't have to worry about eating and drinking! Going on an interstellar adventure with her child, well, she liked it very much!

title: Why Is There An Alien Princess In My Room? (ONC 2023 - Alien Romance - Complete)
description:
Tristan is a Quiz Bowl star. Vyrsa is from the stars. But is their interstellar romance written in the stars?

***

Following a successful heist on a rival planet, Princess Vyrsa just needs to step through the Portal of Wishes to be brought straight back to her home planet Isola. But when Vyrsa steps through the portal, she finds herself on Earth, a primitive planet in a forgotten corner of the universe, with no means to return home.

After having spent the night studying for an upcoming Astronomy test, galaxies, planets, and asteroids are on Tristan Conway's mind as he drifts into dreams. So he's unfazed when a strange glittering woman suddenly appears in his dorm room, convinced she's nothing but a figment of his imagination. When he finds her in his kitchen the next morning, eating his textbooks and befriending his cat, he's not so sure anymore.

With no fancy alien tech at her disposal, Vyrsa will need Tristan's help to return to her faraway home planet. Ecstatic to be part of a plot reminiscent of the space movies he loves, Tristan throws himself wholeheartedly into the mission.

After studies of possible fuel sources turn into Netflix binging beside her endearing host, Vyrsa's resolve to leave weakens. Maybe she'll just stay with Tristan a little bit longer... Surely nothing bad could come from it?

Unless the owners of the artifact she stole figure out where she went and decides to obliterate the whole planet where she's hiding just to punish her, of course.

***
This is an ONC Novella using prompt #18: You step through a magical portal thinking it's the way back home, but what you find isn't what you expected.

This story is completed.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Apocalypse
description:
'I turned around and saw a creeper standing directly behind me, tilting his head to take a bite of my neck.
It's breath was putrid, their crooked teeth stained orange from the feeding of animals.
I grabbed my knife out of my boot and sliced it's throat.
It stumbled back and came at me again.
I poised the knife in my hand and forced it into its bloodshot eye.
Blood pooled out of its socket as it fell to the ground.'

Arizona is living in a world of ruin and wreckage in the wake of a zombie apocalypse. It seems there is no hope for having a normal family someday. People she loves are dying left and right and she doesn't know what to do as they are consumed by the virus. Until her life turns around for the better when she encounters somebody in the forest. The world crumbles down around her, will she ever come out of the rubble alive? And with the ones she loves?

title: The Light - 2nd Novel in the Shadow Series

Vai Ma'amaloa is 17 years old, and his father has just accepted the position of Chief Science Officer aboard the G.E.V. Shadow, a retrofitted warship tasked with exploring the unknown reaches of the galaxy.

Now, Vai will have to come to terms with leaving his old life behind.  As he forges new relationships aboard the Shadow, and tries to settle into his new life among its occupants, he will be confronted with dangers and mysteries he never imagined.

title: Fade Eternal | ONC 2023
description:
Fade is on an elevator in space, and he doesn't know how he got there. 

The last thing he remembers is stumbling out of his 2023 grad party. He's a trainweck of a human with zero skills or talents, and it's very clear he has no business being in space, or in an elevator full of heavily armed people.

As it turns out, they're professional space cleaners responsible for removing space problems. They've all been given a mission to figure out why a research station went dark. Fade is informed that yes, he is part of the team, and actually, he's the guy in charge!

If Fade is going to have the slightest chance of surviving this, he's going to have to do his best to fake it till he makes it. That is, if his own secrets don't get him first.

ONC 2023
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there. Thanks for dropping by!

Here, you will find long stories with loads of action, adventure and unnecessary humor, as well as a dash of fantasy or sci-fi for extra spice. There is no swearing and very little romance in my books, as I tend to write about family and friendships. I like to explore how people can rise past incredible adversity to become a better version of themselves.

I'm currently working on a few writing projects, but for now, the Eliona series is  updated twice a week. Updates for other stories will happen as I can.

As does every author, I love hearing what you think, so leave a comment or message if you'd like.  I don't bite, I promise! I love writing and I love chatting about writing.

HOWEVER - please don't message me with read requests. I barely have enough time to write, never mind read everyone's stories. Also, please don't self-promote on my page and in my books.  That's not cool, and I'll be removing those comments/posts as I see them. Thanks for understanding. ^_^

@ToriHope-  A wonderful friend who's been endlessly encouraging and is the reason I eventually ended up on Wattpad. She makes beautiful covers, and has amazingly creative and unique ideas in her books.

title: Dogman in space!

authorBio:
I'm Lem, a father of two with a love for writing which started as an itch in desperate need of a scratch, but has grown into a bonfire slowly consuming me. I write because I fear what would happen if I don't, I fear the flames might eradicate my very existence if left unchecked. I write because I'm a writer.

I love my wife, my sons, Sci-Fi, fantasy, and gaming. I have stories about each.

The Gifted: First Testament is a paranormal urban fantasy about a man at war with his insecurities and demons hell-bent on spreading their corruption.  Romance/Action/Monsters/Demons

Tales from the Bright Waste are a series of stories set in a bleak future where light is man's only salvation because the monsters are real, but not always on the outside. This includes Light, Glorious Light and its Interquel Roar Lioness. Roar.
Monsters/Romance/Post-Apocalypse/LGBTQIA

Eagle X is a series about mercenaries navigating  space, and trying to turn a buck while evading the authorities, and the shadow government out for their blood.
Space Travel/Aliens/Robots/Action

Burning Road is a dark fantasy riff on the classic boy and girl from different sides of the train tracks except Miminda is from the world of monsters and Khouri is a monster hunter from our world.  Its full of adventure, danger, fun, and misery.
Monsters/Adventure/Action

The Executioner's Playlist is an urban paranormal story about an enforcer for the toughest gangster in New York who steps on the wrong toes and unleashes havoc upon the city.
Urban/Paranormal/Action

The Lords of the Night series takes place in an alternate universe where the monsters of myth and legend live alongside us in secret. This dark world is full of stories including Raving Moon and Frosting & Fur.
Darkfantasy/Paranormal/werewolf/vampire/ContemporaryLit

I have image boards on Pinterest for all of these

You can find me on TikTok and Instagram

title: Alternate Version of Cyborg's Arc
description:
In the first Teen Titans episode of Season 3's main arc "Deception," there was a scene where Jinx was implied to fall for Cyborg. In the following episode "Wavelength," Bumblebee comfirmed that the crush was mutual. Unfortunately, this relationship was never further explored for the rest of the arc or series, and was largely forgotten until it reappeared in other forms of Teen Titans media (namely Teen Titans Go! and that "lost" Teen Titans episode...). Now it is time to figure out "what if?" What if Cyborg and Jinx continued their romance in Season 3? How would it impact themselves, the HIVE Academy, Brother Blood, the Titans, and Titans East? Would Jinx become good? Find out in this alternate version of Cyborg's arc I made. This picks up where "Wavelength" left off.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Grimm Games
description:
A young woman must compete in a deadly televised competition, Grimm Games, to ensure her twin sister survives.

Season 1 of Grimm Games 

*****               

When twenty-year-old social activist Kam Wendall discovers her name among the contestants of the deadly television competition Grimm Games, she's stunned to realize her estranged twin sister, Millie, has stolen her identity to compete. 

Determined to save her sister, Kam enters the contest. At a secret and isolated location, they compete against others through nightmarish sets, perilous escape rooms, and sinister puzzles, and must outsmart the sadistic Grimm entities stalking them. 

Amidst the twisted challenges, can Kam and Millie rebuild their fractured trust all while evading the diabolical forces at play? And would even that be enough to help them survive the Grimm Games and emerge victorious?

***

"Oh, I understand." I didn't blink as I spoke. "But the only way I'm ever stepping foot inside your set is if you force me."

"Our contestants are volunteers," Ms. Holle went on. "We've always run the games that way and forever will. We're not accustomed to forcing anyone to partake, and that opportunity will be extended to you too."

authorBio:
I spent most of my childhood living inside my imagination, dreaming worlds and filling them with characters. I still do that today...just on paper!

I live on Cape Cod, land of sun, sea and perpetual tourists. When I am not writing, you can find me pulling weeds from my vegetable garden, stirring up a batch of strawberry jam in my kitchen or daydreaming about my next set of characters.

SILO is a YA Dystopian/ post-apocalyptic story I co-authored with Lindsay Currie. In addition to Silo, we have published three other works together: CREED, a YA Psychological Horror (Flux/ Llewellyn 11/14), SWEET MADNESS, a YA Historical Fiction about Lizzie Borden (Merit Press 9/15) and HARDWIRED, a YA Sci-fi (Flux/ Llewellyn 11/15)

To find out more about our co-authored works and solo projects, please visit our websites www.trishaleaver.com and www.lindsaycurrie.com

title: Capricious - The Lightning Crew Chronicles
description:
The universe holds no secrets for Captain Allan Roy and his crew of space scavengers. They have traveled to most occupied territories and to the confines of the Rim. Or at least, that's what he thought until the day they land on a remote planet called R-607 for what was supposed to be an easy job. In the remnants of an abandoned scientific expedition, they find a teenage girl, Kala, surviving alone. Rescuing orphans isn't on Allan's resume but the hell with it, it will not take too much of a detour to drop her off on the next civilized planet. So they take her on board of their ship, La Capricieuse, not suspecting that it will be the start of their greatest adventure. Kala is a never-seen-before mutant. And thanks to La Capricieuse, she is now free to roam the Milky Way. 

CAPRICIOUS is an action-packed space opera that will leave you asking for more.


PRAISE FOR CAPRICIOUS 

'Capricious will always hold a special place in my heart.'
@NewFrontiers

The plot, the drama, the quirky dialogues, the character development, everything was absolutely smashing. Each character has been done justice, and I have absolutely fallen in love with this book.'
 @JackBlack76

'The Cajun tradition is that if you're satisfied leave a little on your plate to show you're done. But if you clean your plate, you want some more! My plate is spotless. I'm ready for more. GREAT BOOK.  I LOVE IT!'

It's a story of a simple girl who crossed her time line without her interference, without her knowledge( * not time travelling, just changed timelines*)  I bet you love this story. ☺

When she open her eyes , she woke up at a strange place...

She is from 21 st century ( current) . This a technological world, every thing is based on technology.. 
How will she travel  in the different time line that too her time line chaged to ancient ..and how she will face problems with that culture and people.. 

She trust in God.. Particularly Lord Krishna. Exact word to mentioned is obsessed with or purely or deeply in love with Lord Krishna.. 

How and what her expressions, her reaction, her emotions, her mindset and her heart when she met with Lord Krishna are shown in this story... 
. 
. 
. 
How she mingle with people and how she get her love? 

What's the reason behind her changed timeline? 
What's the reason behind this mysterical travel? 

Who is yuktha? Who is Krishna saanika? What is the relationship between yuktha, saanika and Krishna? 

What? Lord Krishna had been in pain, broken hearted? Why? 

Is there any story behind Lord Krishna's broken heart? 

Is she the reason, isn't she? 

Will she able to get back to her actual time line? 

If yes? What happened then? 
If no, whats the reason? 

U will know the answer to all these questions in this story.. ! 

And one last thing
English is not my mother tongue. so  please forgive mi if I did any grammatical mistakes

**All those characters are my imagination .. Nothing to do with real life people**

Thank you
Urs mi..🥰😘

title: Farming Food Tycoon
description:
Yu Qingze traveled to another world, where there were no women, only brothers and men, and he was saved by a dumb brother.

Dumb brother can't speak and still looks broken, and the pregnant moles on his eyebrows are dull and no one wants to marry.

Yu Qingze, who had tasted the warmth and warmth of human relations in the past life, did not dislike them at all, and gave them a look: The ancient people who had no vision, Le Geer was kind-hearted, skillful, capable and virtuous, and there will be times you envy in the future!

With his good cooking skills, earning money, raising a family, having a few babies, and guarding the people who love and love himself, this is the most important thing for Yu Qingze in his rebirth.

title: Raven Knight
description:
It's the year 2309 and the question of whether we are alone in the universe is finally answered; an answer which ends in a full-scale war.

Desperate to become a hero, Jason Scharn enrolls in the United Solar Military to push back these alien invaders. But as the war progresses and his career soars, two things become apparent. Is the sacrifice to those close to him necessary and is the enemy this evil entity that propaganda suggests?

As more colleagues and friends die around him and key figures start to disappear, questions start to emerge that only he can answer. Why did they attack us? Did they start this war? Who is my true enemy?

#Mystique Circle Awards 2023 - Science Fiction 1st Place

title: West of Nothing
description:
The next big thing may already be crawling around your attic.

When a sorority prank with a microbot lands him in hot water, university student Mason Donnelly is recruited to work on a secret project at a remote research facility. As the newest member of a team of brilliant misfits, he must reverse engineer a new class of robot with capabilities beyond anything previously thought possible. But the robot may have an agenda of its own...

authorBio:
NaN, or "not a number," is a database error caused by invalid input into a mathematical calculation, such as when you try to compute numeric pi with apple strudel.

So what is knotanumber? Knotanumber is what you get when you start with a pimply, asthma-ridden, Bible belt-on, Atari-binging, Asimov-reading, never-been-kissed nerd and, through the application of epigenetic lifestyle factors and Pokemon pellets, transform him into a gently aged, distance-running, veggie-eating, anti-evangelical, badass middle manager-who is still a nerd.

title: After Earth's Fall | ✔ UNDERGOING CONSTRUCTION
description:
"Humanity's pride and greed will be the death of us" 

In 2025 B.E.F that saying couldn't have been more than true.

After a devastating nuclear explosion had scorched one side of the world, people were forced to leave their home planet to Mars. A few millenniums after the global crisis, an ambitious girl, Nila, aspires to go to Earth like the rest of her colleagues. Though, when she arrives, it's not what she had expected and suspects something much sinister is going on. 

|HIGHEST RANK: #5 in Science Fiction|

title: Protector [Ethubs]
description:
Synopsis:

The Moss Kingdom was always known as the weakest kingdom. Any of the other kingdoms could destroy it at any moment. Knowing that, the Moss King hosts a tournament to find the strongest warrior in his kingdom so they can become his personal guard and protect him.

After arriving at the Moss Kingdom by chance, a nomadic traveler wins the tournament hosted by the king himself. He tries to fulfill his newfound position as the king's personal protector, though his job grows much harder after a meeting goes horribly wrong and the king makes himself an enemy of the kingdom by the coast.

title: The Game Before the Fall
description:
Ardent Friend has already witnessed the Fall. The cities of Earth torn apart and those that remain forced to hide in dungeons for safety. What started as a joyous merging of worlds ended in nightmares as Rift Walkers, the enemies of all life, ravaged all they could find. The bone white abominations picked the world apart and at the end of it all, Ardent dies failing to find the hope to turn things around.
When his eyes open however, Ardent discovers he has been sent back to a time before the Fall. With a second chance, Ardent swears to make things right, to prepare the world before it becomes too late. To do that, he must become stronger and head back to the reality where everything began. Back to the time when the world of Areithia was all just a game.

title: Matters Of The Heart.
description:
Kelsey Thomas is one of the best CSI's in the world known not only for her keen eye and sharp brain but also for her beauty. She is wanted on every CSI team in the country. But she only wants to be on one the best of the best. Gil Grissom's team. So what will happen when Gil Grissom, the Grave Shift supervisor in Las Vegas, calls her to come in to help with a Serial Killer known as the Keeper of Hearts. It has always been Kelsey's dream to work with Gil Grissom he was the reason she became a CSI. So what will happen in The City that never sleeps? Will something more happen while Grissom and Kelsey search for their killer? What will happen when Kelsey starts to fall for her mentor? Will he feel the same way? What will Grissom do when he finds of the Keeper of Hearts next victim is closer than he could ever imagine? Read and find out...

authorBio:
This is Stevie Bond, you might recognize me from...anywhere! But behind all that, I am just one of many writers with too much time and a slight case of witty humor and varied references.

I mostly write reader stories on here with harems, lemons and one-pairs. I tend to write whatever I wish, when I have an idea in my head. But of course, all ideas and suggestions are considered before I make a decision on them.

As for stories with lemon content, I do my best to put boundaries around so that I don't cross too many lines. However, as a British fanfic writer, I follow the UK's age of consent. I can understand if that is seen as a grey area, but I don't wish to dive deep into that, and just take it for what it is.

When it comes to comments, I'll try to read them all. But only positive or constructive reviews get replied, negative ones with no suggestions for next time will be ignored. (No one's forcing you to read my stories, right?)

For I devote myself to one rule, write what you wish for and don't pay attention to those who try to bring you down. After all, fanfiction is like art, it can be subjective.

That being said, I do have two rules on my stories.

One is that if you're going to do a bit of role playing in a story of mine, try to NOT overdo it, it's so that my stories don't get bloated with unneeded comments.

And two, PLEASE try not to discuss too much in the comments that might count as something else that leads to spoiler territory. I don't wish to have a swarm of notifications that are not relevant to my stories.

I much prefer to keep things neat and tidy, you see.

That is all for now. ;)

PS: I have an AO3 place, just in case: https://archiveofourown.org/users/StevieBond

authorBio:
Wait! Before you continue browsing profiles or go on to look at my books I have a question. Food for thought if you will. I want to ask what drives your life? What gets you up in the morning? What causes you to continue existence on this world? We live a limited life, a few measly years in the comparison of time, to do something, to change the world, to help that one person, but in the end, we will all die and time will continue, seemingly without worry of what happens. So I ask you, what makes you do what you do?

My Answer: God, for what else is there.

Hello! If you've gotten this far I hope I made you think. If you want to talk more about this, send a message, I don't have an enormous amount of time on my hands but I like to talk. But anyway, onto things about me.

My name is Caleb McLean. I'm a recently published author of the book the Silver Dragon! If you want to take a look I have the rough copy here on wattpad, and if you want to purchase one yourself have a look at Amazon or Booktopia! Any support is welcome :) And hopefully I will have more published in the future.

Currently I'm twenty one and in my third year of university (Creative writing!). I'm a proud Australian, and often have to deal with 40 degree Celsius days in summer (104 degrees Fahrenheit for you Americans out there) and fiercely enjoy a good game of volleyball or hockey.

I love to travel, and have been to New Zealand and driven through the mountains (One of the coolest places I have ever seen) and have also been to the left hand corner of Russia, Saint Petersburg, on a mission trip, which is one of the best experiences of my entire life.

I have a passion for writing and reading. My favourite books are The Inheritance Cycle by Christopha Poalini, as well as the Wings of Fire by Tui T. Sutherland. As you can probably tell by my profile I love dragons and everything about them, and that is what you will find in most of my stories.

Love you all!

Pennator^^

title: When We Were Human
description:
Dahlia has lived in our universe as an immortal for centuries. She has a soft spot for this universe - all the good and all the bad - and has made the best of an admittedly bad situation. Her universe? It...went through some things, but who cares, when ours is so inviting? title: Another chance at the apocalypse
description:
*Warning this is a BL if you don't want to read a BL then please move along*

Landon woke up gasping for air clutching my chest. 'Where in hell am I' He thinks as he look around his apartment in astonishment. 'I should be dead now. I was torn apart by those zombies, so why I back in my apartment?' He thought. He looks over on his bed side table and grabs his phone that was charging it read 8:45 pm March 21, 20XX. 'What is going on I was suddenly thrown back in time?' He thought. It's a whole 2 and half years till the end of the world. Maybe everything was just a dream, maybe there won't be an apocalypse, but maybe there will be.

P.S. this is kind of like a light  novel and for the setting of this book it kind of like if America and China had a f*cked up baby. So a setting doesn't exist I didn't even bother to put a year but it's more or less in modern times. 

P.P.S. I'm new at writing and if anyone has any suggestions on how this book (thing) should go please leave a comment, and I'm always editing this so it will be the best it can be.

title: Comet The Hedgehog and the Freedom Fighters!
description:
Roughly 15 years have passed since the day, Sonic the hedgehog and his friends had defeated the End and saved the world.

Eggman, gaining a new understanding of life now having his own little family, decided to call a truce with Sonic, saying that if he stopped creating machines to take over the world, he may be forgiven of his crimes and may live a peaceful life with his daughter, sage. Sonic agrees and he himself eventually settling down with Amy Rose and having a baby boy named Alex "Comet" the hedgehog.

The young fifteen-year-old eventually stumbled upon a strange shop with a stranger man who curses Comet and sends him away to another planet.

Not too long after the boy meets a Dragon girl named Lilac. The two get into quite the adventure when they meet Lord Brevon and his army of forces trying to take over Avalice!

 Two speedsters and new friends along the way? Sounds like fun don't miss it!

Sonic the hedgehog is owned by Sega

title: The Descent
description:
After Denton foils a terrorist attack at an Intergalactic sporting event, he finds himself racing to save his homeworld from a plot of betrayal and revenge.
 
                                                                      *****
 
When Denton Staxx, a special agent with the Orbital Security Services, discovers the Intergalactic Olympic Games have been targeted by a terrorist attack, he rushes to Earth to try and stop the event before it's too late. But what he discovers on earth is far worse than he imagined, and Denton is quickly pulled into a galaxy-wide conspiracy that takes him from one solar system to another in the search for a mastermind that will stop at nothing to get his revenge on the richest man in the universe -- regardless of the innocent people who die along the way.

[[Wattys' Shortlisted]]
[[1st place, Month Elimination Awards, Sci-Fi Category]]
[[Best Plot Development, Iced Tea Summer Bash Awards]]
[[Best Adventure Scifi Story, The Ooorah's SciFi Awards]]
[[1st place, Rebel Awards, Sci-fi Category]]

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wattpad Featured Author
Wattys 2018 Shortlisted
Highest Rank: #1 in Science Fiction
Former Wattpad Ambassador (Data team)
Former Wattpad Paid Stories Participant
Former Wattpad Star

I've been reading books since I was a teenager, spending hours upon hours on everything from Stephen King, Tom Clancy, Ken Follett, Robert Ludlum to Orson Scott Card, Isaac Asimov, Greg Bear, Dan Brown and so on. My favorite genres are science fiction and adventure/thriller type books. Historical fiction, such as Pillars of the Earth, is also very fascinating.

Outside of reading science fiction anytime I can, I love science in general and specifically in those areas that tie into science fiction. I'm also an avid reader of history. My own writing tends to lean towards science fiction. I have participated in several Nanowrimo's (2007 and 2015 winner) and also the 3-Day Novel Writing Contest. My purpose here on Wattpad is to get some of my writing out to the public for feedback, so I can figure out what's good and what's not.

I also love to draw, primarily pencil and colored pencil. I've also been doing web design for many years and I love programming as well. Throughout the years I have dabbled in everything from basic on the C64 to Assembly and AMOS on the Amiga to PASCAL and more recently, VBA, Javascript, PHP and HTML5.

The common thread: I like to let my imagination play and create things.

**** Note: Currently, I'm not taking on any reading requests. My schedule is just too busy at the moment to be able to devote the proper amount of time and feedback to a story. ****

Support my writing at:
https://www.patreon.com/talltechtales

I blog about tech, fiction, and my own personal interests at http://www.talltechtales.com.

You can also find me on Twitter on:
https://www.twitter.com/techieinak
http://www.pinterest.com/techieinak
https://www.instagram.com/talltechtales

title: Unbecoming Humans
description:
This is the completely rewritten second edition of Unbecoming Humans. It's bigger, it's gayer, it's everything the first edition deserved to be. 

Please note that this rewrite is currently in progress. The end of the current rewritten chapters will be marked. 

With civilization on the brink of collapse,  Aria's parents built Eden to be the cradle of the next evolution of humanity, but survival at Eden is far from guaranteed. Aria has been little more than a puppet in her parents' games of genetic experimentation and control over the next iteration of humanity for almost as long as she can remember. 

When Aria meets Nima, the latest in a long line of victims lured to Eden by the promise of safety, a spark rekindles her cold heart. Aria can't sit idly by while Nima becomes her parents' next prey. The two must find a way to survive Eden's deadly experiments, or risk the greatest love they've ever known.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Brianna Kienitz (aka Rian Ó Rós), pronouns she/her, started out as an avid reader of lesbian fiction. When reading no longer sated her appetite, she turned to writing the stories she craved. Brianna believes a good story should make you feel every moment deeply, whether it be laughing until it hurts, crying yourself dry, or screaming with unbridled rage. Her Wattpad works have been widely read and have received multiple awards from the Wattpad community.

Her debut novel, Off Pitch, was named Wattpad LGBT Book of the Month in March 2017. Her young adult series, Unbecoming Humans, and her paranormal romance, Don't Call Me Jennifer, are ongoing.

Brianna lives in Montana, USA and enjoys LARPing, dancing, studying Irish culture, and taking on the world with her girlfriend. Love you, sport. 😋
Profile art by Maggie Derrick

title: Autonomous
description:
Technology is progress, forever evolving and reaching new heights for increased capacity and capabilities. Without technology, humanity would be forever trapped in the stone age, using flint spears rather than full metal jacket projectiles.

A nation embraces the ideas of technology and innovation, reaching large heights of automation in industry and military. However, following unknown circumstances, their entire continent is found to be displaced and surrounded by many countries that are inferior in their technological capacity, instead embracing a concept completely alien.

Magic.

Which is more powerful? Magic or technology? That will be determined followed the upcoming events, as this nation showcases and unleashed it's technological marvels and ideals upon this magic filled world.

title: Big Data: A Startup Thriller Novel
description:
If you think artificial intelligence is dangerous, then you don't know the real threat to humanity's future...
  
Luna Valencia is the founder of the hottest artificial intelligence startup in history. She's about to become incredibly rich and powerful. But just when she's about to take her company public, her world begins to fall apart. 
  
On the day of her startup's IPO, a stock exchange shooter plummets Luna into a downward spiral toward a threat more menacing than she ever imagined possible. Faced with losing her company, her entire world, Luna searches for answers to a series of terrifying accusations. Failing to uncover the truth could destroy her company... but success would get her killed. 
  
Big Data is a fresh approach to the artificial intelligence sci-fi thriller. If you like fast-paced action, heart-stopping tension, and tech-filled worlds set in the near future, then you'll love Lucas Carlson's latest novel. 

Read Big Data to discover the AI twist today!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Lucas Carlson is a bestselling novelist. He takes his first-hand experiences as an entrepreneur and computer programmer, and turns them into thrillers that pack a punch and are hard to put down.

His writing has often been compared to Michael Crichton, Joseph Finder, Harlan Coben and Blake Crouch. They deal with technology and business themes and how they affect society.

Carlson lives in San Diego with his family.

title: The Dead Fleet (Juggernaut #3)
description:
Tales from the Juggernaut #3.

The dead keep their secrets.

Having narrowly escaped Typhon on Parador, Tila, Ellie and Malachi have a new clue in their search for the truth behind the colony mission, and a new destination: The Dead Fleet.

Drifting around the remote system of Praxis, the dead fleet is a graveyard in space, home of the final battle of the civil war. A labyrinth of ghosts hiding a deadly secret of its own.

When everything is on the line, will their best be enough?

Tila and her friends are outnumbered, unprepared and oblivious to the dangers before them. 

And none of them are prepared for the revelations to come.

* * * * *
The Dead Fleet is the third instalment in the exciting Tales from the Juggernaut.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey :)

I've always been a fan of action and adventure stories, and science fiction and fantasy books, movies and TV shows. My first book, The Juggernaut, grew from a seed planted fifteen years ago, about a city in space built from the wrecks of hundreds of spaceships.

I believe heroes should always beat villains, think music provides the greatest inspiration, and I write to tell the stories I want to live.

I'm based in the UK in London,  but divide my time between the UK (old England) and the USA (New England).

My main series, which is also being released commercially, is the science fiction adventure TALES FROM THE JUGGERNAUT. Book three in the series; THE DEAD FLEET, was released 20th June 2021. Book 4, FAR HORIZON, is well underway, with the complete first half of the novel available on Wattpad earl November.

Wattpad is also home to two other complete first draft novels. The fantasy adventure ARDEN, and the science fiction/religious thriller DAUGHTERS OF EVE.

My books are available to buy from my own website http://www.peteradixon.com/store/

Use the exclusive code WATTPAD for 30% off everything in the store.

title: Faith (Book Two)
description:
Faith has been cursed with a voice so beautiful, she has to stay silent. She wasn't born with it, rather she was transformed into a walking weapon at the ripe age of ten years old. After barely escaping with her life, she ends back up in the foster care system she was ripped out of. Now her only goal isto graduate and escape the country, but everything goes awry when she moves across the country to live with a new foster family, the Kurning's. With the fear of her past breathing down her neck, Faith does everything she can to protect the people that are slowly becoming her family. No matter what it takes, she won't let the people that ruined her old life, destroyher new family.

authorBio:
Hi, My name is Swaha. So where should I start describing myself? *Thinking* Ok let me give some pointers about myself.
1) I am Patriotic. I am crazy about India and Indian stuff.
2)I am interested in Hindu myths and Indian history. *Thanks her Dadaji, Dadi and Nani for this*
4)I am Bengali but interested in other cultures of India.*Thanks her parents for giving me a closed but exposed environment*
5)I am simple and straightforward. (Which irritates my parents to some extent and surprises others, when they meet for the first time)
6)I am a self-confessed Chatter-box. (One of my mother's friend, used to say I don't talk at all. Well, she realized that was not true. *Surprised*)
7)I would prefer watching Indian shows, web series, and movies than Hollywood or International tv shows on tv.(Actually, I don't feel interested in watching the English tv shows as they are not as grand and dramatic as their Indian counterpart)
8)I believe in gods to some extent, but I haven't become a bhakt yet. It will take time to reach that level.
9)I love to make friends. But I am bad at taking it to the next level that is BFF.*Remembers the stories of Krishna-Arjun, or Krishna-Sudama friendship. Always asks Krishna to come and become her true friend.*
10)I am bad at expressing my feelings to others.*Imagines Krishna talking to her and helping her out with her feelings*
11)I have a child-like personality. At times my comments don't make sense or might seem rude to other people, but I never intend to hurt any one's feelings knowingly or unknowingly. 
11)My Hobbies are:
-Watching tv and movies(I can watch anything but I have my own preferences)
-Dancing
-Singing and listening to music(From any part of India, K-pop music sounds like Indian music to me.)
-Writing stories(Inspirations are Movies, tv, Hindu Myths, and Books)
-Reading books(Fantasy, Indian history, Hindu Myths, Detective Novels, Mystery, Adventurous or any genre that interest me and keeps my interest in it)

title: The ghost system
description:
In a post apocalyptic world where power is the only thing that means anything, those unfortunate enough to be weak suffer fates worse than death. The bottom echelon of society that Rhys belongs to knows this more than anyone. However, It was through a series of unfortunate/fortunate events that Rhys was forced to go on an otherworldly raid to gather and appraise treasures. title: Whisper
description:
What would you do if you knew the answer to everything and anything? 
Not just simple answers to simple questions, but any question about the past, the present, and even the future.

Who was the first female astronaut in space? 
Valentina Tereshkova
Where was the first dinosaur fossil found?
Sussex, England
How old are you Miss Wang? 
8 years old, 11 months, 3 weeks, and 1 day. 
What are your parents' full names? 
Jinhai Johnathan Wang and Chunhua Charlotte Hu. 
What are my parents' full names? 
William Peter Jefferson and Rosemary Wendy West. 
What was my 2 second childhood pet? 
A black sable ferret. 
What was its name? 
Pepper. 

Director Jefferson smiled, though still a little bit skeptical, he was almost sure that this little girl had a gift. Of course further research will truly determine if she has a gift, and if she doesn't she'll be dropped. 

"I'll happily help Clarise, Mr. Wang." Director Jefferson stuck his hand out to Mr. Wang who was looking out the window, not at the director nor his daughter. Clearing his throat, Director Jefferson pulled back his hand and knelt down to little Clarise's eye level, "Are you ready to come with me?" 

With all her bags packed and all the proper paperwork sorted out, Clarise was free to go with Director Jefferson. To go BEYOND.

title: His Experiment [FIRST EDIT]
description:
The world took a turn for the better. There were less problems, less diseases, and less to worry about. Or that's what He told her.      
Experiment Arcelia 14786 was His favorite. She was so vital to the Lab she inhabited that they painted her door blue instead of the sterile white that plastered everything else. She knew all the passcodes and looked down submissively. She was the perfect experiment because of Him.        
But when He brings in a new experiment from the Outside called Experiment Varian, she finds herself experiencing change whether she likes it or not. And it's all because of Experiment Varian, the only other one to accept the Red Virus Trial besides Arcelia herself.       
Unlike the passive Arcelia, Varian isn't going to let the Lab take him down.

title: JAMIESTORY
description:
When 8-year-old Jamie stumbles upon a strange machine, a single interaction changes her life-she emerges as a girl with no explanation. Struggling to adjust, Jamie becomes obsessed with uncovering the truth about the machine. As she digs deeper, she uncovers cryptic clues, hidden conspiracies, and whispers of others who were changed before her. title: Bytes of the Matrix
description:
In a world where reality is dictated by invisible codes and unseen control, Jyn knows something is off. After discovering a cryptic program embedded in her phone-one that holds far more power than just tracking her steps-she's thrust into a race against time to uncover the truth behind the digital coin and the new world order. With society oblivious and distracted, Jyn and her small group of misfit rebels must decide: escape the system, or take it over.

But as they dig deeper, the lines between real and artificial begin to blur, and Jyn's every move is shadowed by Cyri, an AI assistant who may know more about her than she does herself. Reality glitches, old tech offers clues, and trust becomes a weapon in a world where nothing is what it seems.

Can Jyn wake the world up before it's too late, or has the system already rewritten her fate?
