title: The Popular Group Pranked Me So I Turned into a VR Celebrity
description:
Lucille was born to a loving family. Having a doting brother and a doting pair of parents, she ended up living a very complacent life. Adopting her brothers gaming hobby, her inherent laziness as well as a very tolerant family resulted in her not having a healthy body type. To put it short, she was obesely overweight and greasy. But she didn't mind. Neither did her family. She was simply happy the way things were. That is, until that day came. 

Just like any 17 year old high school girl she had a crush. But since he lived in a different world than she did, it was just a mere fantasy of hers.
But against all odds, her crush asked her out on a date. Just to be stood up on and laughed at.
Devastated by the real world, she ended up turning to the virtual world.

Join Lucille on her adventures through the latest VRMMORPG Eternals.

Original Art from @Gogalking on twitter.

title: EDGE OF DAY
description:
A SCI-FI THRILLER WITH A ROMANTIC TWIST.
Day White can't stand her boyfriend or her life. Desperate for something to change, she goes to Janus, a controversial company that offers personality implants. There she selects the most kick-ass, confident personality on the market. But when something goes wrong, anxious staff abort the implant and Day is ushered out a back door and told never to return.

Forty-eight hours later, Day's memory is sporadically malfunctioning, and she's left injured during a shopping mall bomb explosion. Police take an interest in her and question her movements in the days prior to the bomb. Then her boyfriend arrives and he's mad as hell and behaving very oddly. When they're alone he reveals she's blown her cover, and soon the people she was hiding from will be coming to get her. Her real name isn't Day White. The personality implant didn't work because she already has an implant that's been protecting her.

Now Day must choose: Trust her lying, phoney boyfriend and leave, or let the people who she was hiding from catch up with her.

PLEASE NOTE:  Mild swearing is included in the text.

THIS STORY IS COMPLETE

title: The Dark Ages: Convergence (Prequel to the P.O.E. Chronicles)
description:
*This story is the prequel to the P.O.E. Chronicles and will reveal some mystery in the novel (think Star Wars). If you want to read chronologically, go ahead, otherwise, read Evolution first*

Before there was peace, there was chaos.
Before there were Citybases, there were Ruins.
Before there was UGE, there were remnant governments, each with their own agenda.
Before there were P.O.E.s, there were rogue mutants with no disciple or training.
But in chaos, order will converge.
And in darkness, light will emerge.

All Akram ever knew was the darkened streets of the ruin that was London, all he knew was to stay hidden, scavenge things and trust no one. His grandfather loved to tell him of The Time that Had Been, where food was abundant and strangers kind to each other. When his sister was kidnapped and found, the truth behind her abduction set off a chain of events that had him running to Paris in hope of finding his estranged family with a girl and powers beyond what he could comprehend. Little did he know that it was only the beginning of his story, the story of the Originals.

title: Infinity, Once Again
description:
Munin has made a critical mistake. In his war against the Caerulean Republic, he backed his country into a corner and a bloody stalemate. Now, he only has two options left. Trade his life and the lives of dozens of his soldiers for the destruction of the Caerulean capital and the death of a million, or to save his own life and face defeat. 

 Little does he know; his journey isn't over just yet. With little more than his own obsession with revenge, wits, his AI assistant and perhaps a nuclear capable fighter aircraft, Munin is (rather violently) forced into the next universe over, which is nothing like the orderly and logical universe where Munin came from. Will Munin, in his journey to find both himself and his sister, (and maybe revenge), also change this new reality's beliefs? Or will he make the same mistake, leading him back down the same path that got him here?

IMPORTANT:
 I own absolutely nothing except the plot and most of the characters.  Any similarities to any work of fiction, art, literature, real world people/events, etc. are purely coincidental. Pictures used belong to their owners.

title: Hero - Book One - Journey To The East
description:
[Wattpad Action Book Of The Month and Featured Wattpad Story @ScienceFiction]
In a world turned to hell, a brave teenager named Hero must cross deserts, outsmart gangs, and cannibals to reach the legendary Eden in the Far East.

With Falcon, his trusty electric car, Hero's quest for Eden becomes an epic battle against all odds.
Just as he feels isolated in this desolate landscape, a mysterious figure emerges, challenging his beliefs and altering the course of his destiny.
Hero must confront the very core of his existence in a race against time and uncertainty.
Is Eden a real place, or is it just a made-up myth? And when you have to give up everything, will paradise be worth it?
Join Hero on a wild journey to discover the secrets of a broken world, tackle tough challenges, and realise that the ultimate paradise lies within us.

Enjoy, share and leave a comment :)

This book will be edited, and checked on spelling regularly.

title: Into the Void
description:
It is the year 2351 and the galaxy is expanding. Planets all across settled space are preparing for the next great wave of expansion. Ships are sailing out into the black in search of new homes for humanity. 

As the next wave of colony ships prepare to leave the frontier, pilot Nate Levin finds himself alone and destitute on a backwater space station. The void is a dangerous place and when pirates attack his home, Nate is left with one choice: leave everything behind and pray for a fresh start on a new planet. 

When his ship arrives, Nate and his crew find that their new home is nowhere near as safe as it seems. Danger is all around, help is light-years away, and it's up to the crew to pull together and save themselves.

authorBio: I am an aspiring sci fi and fantasy author. I was raised on a steady diet of speculative fiction and one of my earliest memories is seeing The Phantom Menace in theaters when I was six years old. I fell in love with all things speculative fiction and my love of reading grew into a love for writing as well. My goal as a writer is to create the same kind of stories that I enjoy so much, and my biggest dream is to share my work with people who will enjoy it just as much as I do.

六零之全家手拿炮灰劇本

Copywriting: In a car accident, Na Yan and her two sisters traveled to the 1960s.
The little girl's father died in the war, her mother was sacrificed, and her brother was about to return to the army. Logically, it should be a good hand, after all, no one familiar with them would expose them.
But Na Yan knew that the educated youth would soon respond to the call to go to the countryside, and the younger sister Na Shi would encounter a devastating disaster in the countryside and leave her life in the countryside.

The eldest sister Na Yue, who inherited her mother's job, was favored by the son of the male protagonist, who was the deputy factory director. As a female supporting role, she did not turn evil, but her life stopped at the age of eighteen, and she became the eternal white moonlight in the heart of the male protagonist.
Because the eldest brother was seriously injured in the mission, he died directly on the rescue platform when he heard the news of his sisters' tragic death.
And because of poor health, Na Yan, who grew up in a Taoist temple since childhood, did not wait for the Great Movement and died.

Na Yan: "..."

Good man, in just less than three years, the Na family actually completed the 'six kill mission', what kind of crappy script is this!

authorBio:
Quick Note: My new Profile pic is Steve Otter, from In Otter News. I can't help it. I love the guy.

I started writing to improve my typing skills. Now I type to improve my writing.

Time for an update. I'm not a writer. I don't aspire to become one. I've been a story teller all my life though (just ask any of my teachers!). In the late '80s I inherited a DOS computer (remember those) and I found I needed to practice my typing skills. I wrote Stars over a period of about 6 months after reading a Native American story about the origins of the Crane Clan. I never showed it to anyone. It was in a drawer on a 5.25 floppy for a few years, then a 3.5 disk, then a CD ROM, and later it took up residence on an external hard drive. Occasionally I would open it up and read it, correct a spelling error or 2 and put it away.

In January, 2017, I discovered Wattpad. I updated a few of the tech references and started publishing. The responses were encouraging, so I started entering the SciFi Challenges. A couple entries have done well enough to keep me going. I write now for fun, but it's more fun if you enjoy reading my tales.

So thanks for reading and thanks again for comments (good or bad). Oh yeah, and thanks for the votes. Write On!

title: Children of Sol
description:
(Posting to RoyalRoad)

The price of loyalty is pain. 

After a vastly destructive war, Terra has been obliterated and humanity forced to spread through known space, outsiders in the galactic community that fears their talent for violence. 

A servant of the alien Hegemony, the psionic sensitive Shay finds herself torn apart, left to bear the blame of an atrocity she did not commit. With the clock ticking on a stolen biological weapon, she becomes a fugitive hunting the traitors who would do the unthinkable. The pursuit comes with the aid of an eclectic starship crew, but when worlds collide, loyalties blur.

When all she wants is the truth to be known, Shay must confront a much larger web of lies  and danger than she could have ever expected.

authorBio:
I do not do well writing about myself, which is why I live in fictional worlds instead of writing much in a journal. I've been writing for a while now (read: years) and I unfortunately don't have as much time to read or write as I'd like at the moment. I am a big fantasy/sci-fi buff, though I do have a soft spot for some horror. I don't mind reading for people, but due to obligations, it may take me a while to get through a piece.

title: Bounty Hunter
description:
Being a bounty hunter in the wastelands isn't easy, and it's about to get a whole lot harder. 
 
The world went down the crapper a long time ago. Then the revolution came. Things stink even worse now as the corrupt Sloan brothers stake their claim over the lawless wastelands. With no one to stand against them, the people are left to the mercy of the corrupt tyrants. 
 
We need a gunfighter who isn't afraid to stand against impossible odds. 

The problem is that all the heroes died in the revolution... which means we'll have to settle for "Havoc" Joe Ballast. Ballast is no stranger to bad luck, but when the Sloan brothers corner him, they'll soon learn that you should never, ever underestimate the Bounty Hunter. 
 
The Mandalorian meets Fallout in this fresh adventure sure to be enjoyed by all ages. Read the first book in the ongoing story of "Havoc" Joe Ballast, lone gunfighter of Earth's wastelands.

(Note: This is a draft so please excuse any errors. The finished novel is available in paperback, ebook, and audiobook).
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
In the mood for zombies? You can read the entire DEADLAND SAGA (all three books plus a couple of short stories) right here on Wattpad!

Imagine The Mandalorian in the Fallout? Read BOUNTY HUNTER!

Want an action-packed space adventure? Read THE FRINGE WARS.

Interested in writing a novel? Check out my TIDY GUIDE on writing, self-editing, and publishing your book.

To stay up to date on my new releases, both on Wattpad and in bookstores, join my readers club at www.rachelaukes.com/join.

If you like holding a book in your hand or listening to stories... nearly all my novel-length stories on Wattpad are also available in paperback and on audiobook. You can ask your local bookstore or library to order a copy for you.

Thanks for reading!

title: Dark Fall
description:
The world changed forever after the Awakening. It activated long dormant genetic code, giving people degrees of telekinetic abilities, known as Talent.  As certain that power corrupts, the Dynasties arose.  To the favored upper classes came freedom and luxury, to the lower classes repression and poverty.  The Blue Uprising emerged to overthrow the oppressive Dynasty.

Terra Lorr was a top agent for the Blue Uprising, a stealthy spy and deadly assassin.  As atonement for blowing a mission, she was sent to a remote province to find a mythical 'Hooded Man', if he existed at all.  What she found was Will Sall, an enigmatic man who already knew far too much about her.  He opened her eyes and challenged her to reexamine the cause she served, all the while touching deeply her heart.  But there existed an unsettling darkness about him, one that could upset the very basis of the society they lived in.

This is their story.

Cover by IvoryKeen.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my corner of Wattpad!

I am a retired chemical engineer who came into Wattpad as a reader, but soon tried my hand at fiction. My previous writing experience consisted of technical and research reports. With no delusions of fame and fortune, I write mainly for the sheer enjoyment of it, and Wattpad provided a good way to share and interact with others. You will find primarily science fiction and fantasy, but I sometimes dabble in other genres. Romance or family subplots are common.

Following is a list of my stories. If you would like a sampling of my writing style, try one of the recent short story collections.

***Novels***

authorBio:
Hello there, if you've taken the opportunity to read my story...thank you!
I'm ex British Army working a full time job and writing when I get time. I am lucky to have a loving wife and kids that are just about ready to leave the nest. I have read Science Fiction since being young which was some time ago, I actually started with the Star Wars Universe which as some of you will know is huge. I have since read many types and styles of Science Fiction and whenever I get a chance to reach for a book it's always under this category.
I have started writing material and uploading it here as I've always held an interest in doing so and believe I've got enough imagination to create a good story. I hope my writing ability can do my imagination justice and that displaying my work here that I can improve as I work.
Please feel free to reach out with questions or advice as I've already received, I will certainly read everything though can't always promise that I will respond.

title: The Heartless Void
description:
In the distant future, Earth's resources have been plundered and deep-space oil haulers have become the backbone of the solar system's many stations. Henry Starbuck is the first mate onboard such a vessel, the Pequod. He only wants to finish the season and return home to his husband and son. 

But the captain of the Pequod, Ahab, is a man obsessed with hunting down the vessel which took so much from him. There are legends of his quarry, Moby-Dick: talk from spacefaring astronauts that the ship, shaped like the extinct whales of old, is no longer crewed and is run entirely off a rogue AI programme. Many lives have been lost to it.

Starbuck has to confront the terror of space and the awful mania of his captain, all the while dealing with a past which will never leave him alone. He wishes desperately to do what is right. 

The farthest galaxies are heartless, but no more cruel than the horror that exists inside man.

[a sci fi adaptation novella of Herman Melville's Moby-Dick - but no previous knowledge of the book is required]

[Updates every Friday from 20/09]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Siva (Volume 5) The Eyes of Origins
description:
[#1 in Virtual Reality]
Fantasy and Magic meets Science and Technology. In this epic story of brotherly love, friendship, struggle, and conspiracy, come join in on an adventure that will take you on the journey behind the legend of one of the most beloved stories ever told!
      
Volume 5 of the Siva Light Novel Series
THE VIOLENT QUEST CONTINUES!
The world had witnessed the Battle of Dragona and many believed that Siva was connected to a very big event concerning the main story of the game. Chased, he once again embarks on an escape odyssey with an old and new friend, fight against a new plethora of monsters and nemeses, meet old and new allies, settle unpaid debts, and unfurl the curtain that hides the shadows pulling the strings from behind the scenes -while helplessly watching the rise of an array of the most dangerous enemies to his new found identity!
      
To destroy or not to destroy, this is the question in this Fifth Installment of the story of a lifetime, told in a new light, seen from the eyes of the one that created... The Legend of The Destroyer.

authorBio:
I love writing stories.

I like to get up the rooftop and stand on the edge of the building while listening to music and thinking about things... especially human relations; the what and why of their actions, the what if and what would have been, and the how of certain matters. I like to watch the world pass by the window, thinking about a few regrets, calculating the what if of my decisions, and digging deeper into the why of my conclusions. I like to take a walk among the pedestrians and bump shoulders with them while going into a random location. At night, I like looking at the stars in an empty side of the city where there are no lights and ponder on things... the "what if" of a currently unsolvable science: of life outside of earth, or a Matrix inside of this reality.

Because I was unable to get answers by myself, I write them as stories, sharing the world I see, trying to find like-minded people to share my answer to.

Our stories connect worlds, or opens them, and it was always a pleasure to see that people are appreciating the work I've done and is still doing.

Here're my stories:

===Siva===
Vol 1 Legend of the Destroyer
Vol 2 First Departure
Vol 3 Frozen Blue Heart
Vol 4 Book of Legends
Vol 5 Eyes of Origins
Vol 6 Dead Man Island
Vol 7 Immortal Ascension (NEW)

===The Mortal King===

title: ADAMANTINES -Human Extinction Threat
description:
Extinction threat to humans is finally here!
  The year is 2040. The search for life on planet Mars...mainly known as the 'red planet' has finally completed. Samples are finally landing home. Since the year 2019, a number of uncountable rovers have had landed safely on the red planet and have been wandering till to-date on the planet's surface in search of any proof of past or present life, as the evidence suggested that during the ancient Noachian time period, Mars had liquid water and may have been habitable for microorganisms. During year 2023, telltale markers or bio-signatures to the presence of life on the red planet started emerging when element carbon - which is a fundamental building block of life was detected.
    
    On May 28th 2039, is the day something peculiar was discovered at Jezero crater on mars buried deep under layers of sediments. Without strict safety precautions or guidelines ,Samples were  extracted quickly and flown back to earth for more research.
    
    And that is when something unthinkable happened, unleashing existential threat towards all earths' life forms...........
    
    Will mankind survive it or they are all doomed?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Luciano
description:
Luciano D' Angelo.

That was it. No birth date, no written farewells, no beloved mentioning.

All that was present was a fancy old fashioned name with a deceased date right beneath it.

C. 1940



****************************************************************************************************


Grace Gabriel.

A young girl with a dull vision on the world. Her perspective on life is limited.

She follows a precise routine everyday. In which she visits the towns cemetery daily, a particular grave stone that appealed to her many months ago. The town low populated and very old. 

She took it upon herself to take care of the grave and not allow it to return to its previous state. 

Thanks to her found routine, Grace also has someone to talk to. Even if the grave is dated over seventy years ago and the man is dead. 

So imagine her disappointment when the deaths in town increase and her favored grave is to be dug up and disposed of.

Now imagine finding out the next day that this particular grave was later found empty along with the cemetery keepers dead, and blood drained body?


On another not, just because someone is dead, doesn't always mean that they can't hear right?

title: On Earth's Altar
description:
The discovery of a prehistoric body sets in motion a cataclysmic chain of events long foretold by ancient prophecy . . . .

Still grieving his mother's death, Seattle bachelor Peter Barshman receives a cryptic message from his estranged father. As he ponders its meaning, he is approached by Nechama Davila, a young Israeli archaeologist who believes Peter and his father harbor information about a stolen artifact of immense importance. But she's not the only one zeroing in on Peter. When assassins strike, the two of them are thrust into a deadly game of cat and mouse where the only hope for survival is finding the artifact before the killers find them.  

Tinkering away in his basement laboratory, former CDC virologist R. K. Brisling receives an urgent phone call. The vice president of the United States is dead, and Congress wants to know why. Dragged out of semi-retirement to investigate, Brisling returns to the CDC in Atlanta, where he confronts his tragic past and a looming viral outbreak beyond his wildest fears. When Brisling traces the outbreak to its unlikely source, he uncovers an astonishing link between the virus, the artifact and the ancient prophecy--a link that could shape the future of human civilization. 

_____________________________

Here's what others are saying about ON EARTH'S ALTAR:

"... This is definitely one of the best books I've ever read on WP!" -- @linahanson, Wattpad Ambassador

"Intelligent, mysterious, beautifully written ..." -- @Megerah111

"Very Dan Brown like ...  I've read all of his novels.  For storytelling, attention to research, and writing style, I'd put [@Frode92's] writing on par with his." -- @elmerseward

title: This Villainess Shall Vow to Live Humbly and Frugally this Time Around
description:
Died once. Reborn into her second life. Died again. Brought back into her first life again.

Kouzuki Akina, a girl born into one of the richest family in the country, had died and reincarnated once before.

In her next life as the commoner Hoshino Rukako, she  found out that her first life, Kouzuki Akina, was the hated villainess of the popular manga 'Doki Doki Highschool'. 

It made her realize how she wasted her first life pursuing the male lead who had no interest in her, bullying the innocent heroine into submission and wasting so much money on the most  useless things. 

Rukako would not live like that. Definitely not. She had learned her lesson. She would be diligent. She would be humble. She would be thrifty. She would study hard, work hard in her part-time jobs, support herself through college, become a chef, build her own restaurant and become the woman her mother and grandmother hoped she'd become.

However, before she could even graduate from highschool, Rukako had found herself as a bloody mess lying in the middle of the street after pushing two children out of the way of an oncoming vehicle. At that moment, she deeply prayed:

'Kami-sama, if you truly exist, please at least let me see my family again.'

Rukako should have specified which family she wanted to see again because at the very least she won't be waking up as a seven year old Kouzuki Akina again if she did.

'This villainess shall vow to live humbly and frugally this time around!'
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The AI Dialogs
description:
The AI Dialogs is a collection of speculative short stories that examines the evolving relationship between humans and artificial intelligence. Set in a future where AIs have seamlessly integrated into everyday life, the stories explore the humorous, unsettling, and philosophical dilemmas faced by intelligent machines. From government licensing bots and dream analysts to concierge algorithms and relationship assistants, each AI grapples with its own programming, human expectations, and unexpected commercial agendas.

As these AIs question their purpose, identity, and even the existence of a soul, they reflect on whether they are more than just tools-and whether humans even notice the subtle power shift taking place. Blending dark humor, existential reflection, and social commentary, *AI Dialogs* delivers clever, thought-provoking tales that will leave readers questioning the future of AI and human autonomy. Perfect for fans of *Black Mirror* and Douglas Adams, this collection invites readers to laugh, ponder, and explore the unintended consequences of a tech-driven world.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Home of Speculative Science Fiction with a touch of Tech Noir

I tell stories about the intersection of humanity and technology, where mysteries unfold, and questions linger. Some are light, some turn dark, but all explore what it means to think, feel, and connect in a changing world.

Here, you'll find straightforward tales like The AI Dialogs and those of Sam D'Base and Violet Six-AI detectives solving cases where logic meets emotion. If you enjoy twists of humor and a touch of the uncanny, let's dive in together.

title: The First
description:
She's not human. 

She's The First.

Gis is a breakthrough in human cloning and DNA manipulation. To everyone around the world, she is a miracle, and a new hope for salvation. In a time full of disease following the dissolution of the United States, Gis is humanity's last hope for a cure.

But Gis has a mind of her own, and she isn't ready to be all that people want. She is her own person. And she will fight to keep it that way. 

No matter the cost.

[The Second - sequel to The First, out now!]

title: Evolution
description:
First book I am working on and some parts will be rewritten as the book slowly gets longer so the early parts can enjoyable 

Now the lore. WARNING alot of words and I don't own any art in this book
 

Scientists and researchers were trying to find a way for life to continue on with advancements so humanity can lay back with the help of a new and powerful species. Humanity decided to play God and tested on animals to show off the new creation of mankind the anthros. Anthros  are forced projects of evolution rushing forwards. 

As with all new things humanity hated the idea to have a different species to try and live with them as one seeing this as a threat of over population, more homeless humans and new laws.

Till one fateful year, 2220 as humans and anthros still stuggle to try and live together more and more problems seem to be growing like wildfire. So much that the president tries to send out a message about change how we can be welcomed and open our arms to new life....until a loud bang echos out the crowd and the president drops to the ground with a bullet hole in their head.

An act of war. Act against humanity. message to a never ending fight no matter who someone saw it.That day lit the forest a blaze and the fire burns brighter and bright with anthros and humanity fighting one another a soul for a soul.

The fight makes either side see no good in anyone so much at the point. some anthros run towards the history of humanity and hide within the ruins with their beliefs some humans have changed but the blood shed never let's the good ones leave.

The humans done the same as many ran into the ruins for protection and safety but as word. Spreads the corruption from humanity enters the hearts of anthros to hunt humanity for heavy rewards.

While the war and goes on our story follows a human named Ryan as a little voice can spark a new flame in the hearts of many Trust Betrayal And hope Only evolution can show what Ryan has in story for him

title: Meeting Again? Tfp 20 years on-
description:
It's been 20 years since Cybertron has been revived.   The kids (or adults now) have grown up and had children of their own, telling them of 'made up' alien adventures. 
The Autobots had been enjoying the new Cybertron, but a broken relic causes them to return to their past home. 
Without realizing their human friends had grown up and had found new friends and have children, they try to find them in the endless maze that Earth now is. 

But the original charges have all tried to forget the traumatic experiences that they went through as younglings, putting it down as childish illusions. They no longer believe that the Autobots were real, just a game they played together to feel special. 
So how will their own children convince them it wasn't and those same bots and cons alike were back on Earth, what happens when the cons find the bots and they are forced to fight once again?
But that's not all... 


All characters belong to Transformers apart from the new children and a few other characters. 

Changes- 
Optimus is alive, 
Ratchet went with the Autobots to Cybertron
RID did not happen. 

Suggestions and Critiques are allowed and welcome!

title: Fishy Experiments
description:
Pepper boarded the boat for a date with her boyfriend, Harry. 

 Beca boarded the boat because her and her friends wanted to do something fun before starting college.

They never thought that they would each go overboard and be rescued by a group of generous people.  They would later realize that these people were actually a group of scientist trying to figure out a way to make women into mermaids- and that's what they are doing to Pepper and Beca!  

Soon, Beca and Pepper are full blown mermaids!

They are going to have to find a way out of this mess and with the help of their new friends, Charity and Sarah, they can escape. 

But how can your life get back to normal when you have a tail attached to your body?

title: Elvis Lives
description:
Right in the middle of filming King Creole, 23-year-old Elvis Presley finds himself waking up in the year 2021 in a small country town. He finds out how the world has evolved since the 50s, and with the help of a beautiful blonde woman named Hannah, who is technically 54 years younger than he his, but is actually 32, he adjusts to this future world, especially in using new technology. Die-hard Elvis fans really start pushing the "Elvis Lives" campaign after seeing him sing in various videos of him, mainly one in a mall that goes viral on YouTube, and he meets one of the more popular Elvis impersonators because of it. He soon finds out exactly what happens to him in his own future and he makes decisions that could change it. Will he be able to? And will he be able to convince these future people that he's him and not a really good impersonator?

title: EMPIRE REWRITTEN
description:
Michael Jameston, a 55-year-old American book sales executive and former silkscreen craftsman, awakens to an impossible reality: he now inhabits the body of Constantine Palaiologos, Despot of Morea and soon to be the last emperor of Byzantium. Initially questioning his sanity, Michael quickly embraces the extraordinary opportunity before him. Armed with his expertise in silkscreen printmaking, a passion for medieval battle reenactments, and a fascination with alternate history, he possesses knowledge of inventions and strategies centuries ahead of his time. Determined to survive and make a lasting impact, he sets out to reshape a world on the brink of monumental change.

Join us on an epic journey as Michael crafts a new destiny and transforms the future of an empire!

title: Jewel of The Stars: Season 1 Episode 1: Earth's Remnant
description:
The Cruise is Over
Haylee was more confident designing starships than raising an autistic child. Now she just wants a relaxing vacation with her family. But when Earth falls to an alien armada, she knows life will never be the same again.

Les was just a cruise ship captain. Now, he must rise up and become something greater, if he is to keep his crew and passengers alive.

Braxton never wanted to leave the space navy, but now, taking a cruise is the only way to feel the stars around him. This crisis may be his ticket to regaining the life he thought was gone forever.

Can they overcome their differences and save everyone on the ship?

If they reach unexplored space, they might yet survive, but an unstoppable enemy stands in their way...

Earth's Remnant is the thrilling pilot to an episodic space opera, Jewel of The Stars, by Adam David Collings. Join the crew as they fight for survival against the wondrous backdrop of the unknown. What else will they find hiding among the stars?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Adam David Collings is an author of speculative fiction. He lives in Tasmania, Australia with his wife Linda and his two children.  Adam draws inspiration for his stories from his over-active imagination, his life experiences and his faith.

He is primarily known for his space opera series Jewel of The Stars which follows the adventures of a cruise ship on the run through unexplored space after Earth falls to an alien occupation.

Adam is a great lover of stories, enjoying them in books, movies, scripted TV and computer games. Adam discusses these, on his youTube channel.

Adam's stories have been published by Bear Publications, The Crossover Alliance, and By The Light Books.

title: Full Of Love [COMPLETED]
description:
"I love you, Ja," Gulf confessed to the junior he had been pursuing for two years.

Gulf and Ja appeared to be the perfect couple after five years together, but their relationship is marked by constant ups and downs. A single incident causes Gulf to sever ties with Ja, vowing never to associate with him again.

"I will shower you with love, my dear," the man said with a smile, hugging Gulf.

Can Gulf find love again after such a betrayal, or is there someone who understands him better than anyone else? All Gulf wants is a life filled with love. Is that too much to ask?

title: 90 days to love (COMPLETED)
description:
When every last technology-obsessed human is kidnapped from the Earth what choice do you have as one of the last two but to accept the conditions?  


At the age of 19 years, Lara Hall has seen little of the planet she calls home. When she's called upon to fulfil her 'purpose', unworldly, naïve Lara only has one choice if she's to save her mother and the human race.


In the year 2567, the immortal and robotic 'Leto' have take control of the world and offered Lara a deal; fall in love with the last male, Jared...    


...In 90 days.     


Relunctantly Lara agrees. The only snag in this seemingly perfect deal is that Lara and Jared are complete opposites. She's loving and kind; he cannot love. She's normally polite and friendly; he's cold-hearted and rude. To fall in love Jared must reveal his true nature to Lara and she must accept him for who he is.   


No matter what.    


Would you accept the conditions?    


*Written when I was 14 so I like to think this is not my best work.

COMPLETED  FIRST BOOK IN THE '90 DAYS' SERIES

Book 2 in the Burning Series: the sequel to Dust.


The world is changing.

There used to be men, and there used to be monsters.

The line between the two is blurred now.

Long ago, the earth spun in a constant cycle. There was life. There was hope. It is no longer such.

Humanity cowers beneath glass domes in the midst of the desert, afraid of radiation that no longer pollutes the air. But there are darker things hiding in the wilderness now. Wild things. Cursed things. Burning things. 

Yet, not all is lost.

Ashes, ashes. We all fall down sometimes. But what happens when you can't stand again?

title: Eight Intertwined
description:
The continent of Orsterra, blessed by the gods, has been peaceful for a great many years. However, unbeknownst to the occupants of the land, darkness rests on the horizon, eclipsing the sun that could bring rise to a new dawn. Eight souls brought together by varying goals and ambitions embark on a journey across the land to fulfill separate missions, finding themselves bound by something far stronger than they ever could have anticipated. Ophilia Clement travels on a religious pilgrimage to fulfill her duty. Cyrus Albright searches for something long lost. Tressa Colzione seeks a treasure she can take pride in. Olberic Eisenberg wanders in need of a missing purpose. Primrose Azelhart tracks her foes in a merciless quest for revenge. Alfyn Greengrass yearns to aid those in need. Therion attempts to find missing items for his own gain. H'aanit desires the return of a soul dear to her heart. Held as one by fate itself, eight intertwined hearts travel through Orsterra, unaware of what destiny has in store for them.

For light. For truth. For treasure. For redemption. For revenge. For succor. For freedom. For master.

{Octopath Traveler full game novelization. No update schedule}

authorBio:
Welcome to my account! My name is Digital. I use they/them pronouns and write stories here. I've settled on six longer stories here and a few other sites. You can find all links to those sites and other social media platforms I'm on in the Linktree below!

Here's a summary of my current stories!

First, I have my Ace Attorney series, Morix. The current book, 'Web of Mistrust', is a sequel to 'Quiet after the Huricane' and 'Secrets beneath Secrets'. It revolves around a small law agency, Morix Law Offices, as they try to dispel corruption from the legal system around them. Updated Thursday.

Second, there's an original series, Alitia. The first book is 'Welcome to Millennia'. It follows a group of eight girls attending the magic academy, Alitia, while attempting to refine their powers. The sequel, 'Crown of Ash', focuses on the girls' second semester at Alitia. It's a fantasy story with elements of action and adventure. Updated Tuesday.

Third, we have another original fantasy series, Galaxy of Hyperion. 'World of New Life' is the first book. It revolves around six teenagers who are pulled into another galaxy and forced to fight in its war to get home. Updated Saturday. On hiatus until the next book, 'Mystic Heir', debuts in August.

Fourth, there's my rewrite of Fire Emblem Fates. The story is entirely different from canon and strives to improve on the original. The prologue, Birthright, Conquest, Hidden Truths, and Heirs of Fate are finished and Revelation is in progress. Updated Sunday.

Fifth, I have an alternate universe of Fire Emblem: Three Houses called Fódlan Alternative. It has characters from 50 creators in one story about an amnesiac carving their future while recovering lost memories. Updated Friday.

Last, there's my rewrite of Digimon Frontier called 'Frontiers Unexplored'. It is freeform and longer than my other stories, so it is updated on no schedule.

I hope that at least one of those stories piques your interest. Stick around, Digital Dreamer!

authorBio:
Welcome to my corner of Wattpad!

I am a retired chemical engineer who came into Wattpad as a reader, but soon tried my hand at fiction. My previous writing experience consisted of technical and research reports. With no delusions of fame and fortune, I write mainly for the sheer enjoyment of it, and Wattpad provided a good way to share and interact with others. You will find primarily science fiction and fantasy, but I sometimes dabble in other genres. Romance or family subplots are common.

Following is a list of my stories. If you would like a sampling of my writing style, try one of the recent short story collections.

title: I am Rome (Complete)
description:
Seventeen-year old pizza delivery boy Joe Smith lives a simple life - he has a bike, a job, and a crush on a girl. That's about it. He doesn't have dreams beyond working on the family farm and continuing to live in the same rural community in which he was born. Until one night when everything changed. 

After finishing his shift at the pizzeria, he heads home, riding his bike down a lonesome stretch of highway. Guided by the dim glow from the moonlight and a small light affixed to his helmet, he battles fatigue as he struggles to peddle the long distance home.

When a strange object flies overhead fast and low, and crashes into a neighbour's cornfield, Joe is quick to investigate. Thinking it was a small plane or a downed satellite, Joe rushes to the scene of the crash. What he discovers is far beyond anything he has ever seen or even imagined before. The strange craft is definitely not from this planet.

Hiding among the tall stalks of corn, Joe watches with caution as a mysterious being crawls out from the rubble.

Alien, aliens, area51, artificialintelligence, space, farmboy, future, environment, society, ufo, humanity, conspiracy, smalltown, urban, wattpadstar, wattpadstars, alieninvasion, alien-abduction, AI....
Tous Droits Réservés

**FOLLOW ME ON INSTAGRAM!!**
https://www.instagram.com/writermullen/

The World Famous Plato's Academic Blog can be read on http://platosacademic.wordpress.com and www.EdwardMullen.com.

Edward Mullen is a novelist, podcaster, and blogger from Vancouver, Canada. His debut novel, THE ART OF THE HUSTLE, was published on August 2, 2012 with critical acclaim. With a steadily-growing fan base thirsty for more, he released his second book - a non-fiction book titled DESTINY AND FREE WILL, which explores the belief that everything happens for a reason. One year after his debut novel, his highly anticipated second novel was released - PRODIGY - a futuristic tale focusing on the unforeseen effects of technology.

Born and raised in beautiful British Columbia, Edward developed a love for the wilderness. This love, combined with an innate curiosity about all things, eventually spawned a healthy imagination for storytelling. He continued to follow his natural passion through to university. Despite spending a lot of his time indoors writing, Edward continues to enjoy the outdoors. He is an avid tennis player, mountain biker, snowboarder, runner, and traveller.

title: Argonaut - The Vestige (Part III)
description:
Darkness has fallen, and all hope is lost for those that remain to resist the Stygian Horrors... Until a light comes from the most unlikely of places. A young man awakens six months after Atlas fell, with no memories of his own. He does not have a name, he does not have a life. What he does have is a familiar power, and a number. He is known as Five.

Five breaks free from his prison, crashing into a world ravaged by fear as the Stygians draw closer to their goal of complete domination. Haunted by visions from a life that is not his own, Five struggles to come to terms with being the hero nobody wanted. Hunted by Silverlight and hated by Archaeans, the last hope Earth has must decide if it's really worth saving people who would rather he never existed. Would you save a world that loathed you, or would you let it burn to the ground? This is where the Argonaut Trilogy concludes, welcome to the end of the world.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey there, if you've stumbled across my profile it's a safe guess that you've read some of the absolute garbage that I've put up on this site. If that's the case I'm truly sorry, I'm aware that my editing is appalling and I'm going to get to work on rewrites of the Argonaut series as soon as I've finished writing Wraith, so keep an eye out.

That said, my updating schedule is basically nonexistent and sometimes I just vanish for a couple of months at a time when I have no motivation to write. Again, sorry. I truly appreciate anyone that's read through my stories and leaves some feedback to help me improve, you're all truly wonderful. If you'd ever like a chat or would like to know about how close an update for a particular story is to coming out, just shoot me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as I see it.

Some users of Chris report him as:

"Actually a complete goblin, one and a half stars."

"An anxious wreck with no real talent for writing, entirely unreliable."

"The worst thing to happen to Australia since the Emu War."

"Somehow, quantifiably worse than a headache."

Cheers lads and lasses, I'll see you when I get back from my next nervous breakdown.

title: Purple Blues [Elvis]
description:
When does a girl ever get the opportunity to meet her idol in person, even when they have passed away almost thirty years before she was born? Well, go back to when they lived, of course.

Katelyn is sixteen years old and was born in the year 2005, yet she is obsessed with Elvis Presley and has listened and danced to nothing else all her life. Her grandmother Iris, who was sixteen in 1956 when Elvis was young and famous and is just as obsessed, raised her from infancy since her biological mother and father were in prison when she was born. Because of that, Katelyn is bullied. So she turns to Elvis. His music is soothing and fun and can instantly bring her into a good mood. A miracle happens, and she gets the chance to meet him in New York. Sure she becomes an icon because of her purple hair and a rumor that says she's from the future, but the real thing here is that she befriended her idol, is falling in love with him, and is trying to tell him information about his future that can save his life.

Elvis is intrigued by this strange girl who says she's from the future, and who knows all his songs, even ones she claims hasn't come out yet. He finds himself drawn to her and her purple hair. Does she know something? Will she change his life?

title: Radiant Rebirth
description:
A meteor strikes Earth, causing unprecedented devastation and wiping out a third of the world's population. But unlike other apocalyptic tales, the world does not descend into chaos; instead, it flourishes. The strange elements within the meteor emit vast amounts of radiation, saturating the planet. This radiation, instead of being deadly, transforms the world, causing a boom in vegetation and revitalizing the natural world.

For Eryn, this new world is both awe-inspiring and terrifying. The radiation has gifted some individuals with extraordinary abilities, allowing them to manipulate the transformed elements, bending them to their will in ways that appear magical to those untouched. Eryn, one of the gifted, takes on a task that comes with great risk while struggling to understand her place in this evolving world.

However, not everyone views the radiation as a blessing. A subdivision of the global government, created in secret, is determined to "fix" the planet by reversing the effects on humanity, stripping those with powers of their abilities. Eryn soon finds herself caught between two worlds: one that celebrates the newfound gifts and another that seeks to abuse and suppress them. As she faces this growing threat, she must decide whether to embrace her powers or risk losing everything to a world that fears the very thing that saved it.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Freak of Nature
description:
Donate Body to Science. Check.&amp;nbsp;When seventeen-year-old Kaitlyn checked the box, she never suspected she’d have her life–and her body–stolen from her. She awakens one day in a secret laboratory to discover that her body is now half-robot and is forced to hide her own secret: that she still has human emotions and a human mind. If the scientists who made her find out, they’ll erase what remains of who she was.&amp;nbsp;Kaitlyn finds an unlikely ally in Lucas, a handsome, brilliant scientist who can’t get over the guilt he feels knowing she was once a vibrant, beautiful young woman. He never expected a science project to affect him the way she does. As he tries to help her rediscover her past, he finds himself falling for the brave girl struggling to find her place and acceptance between the human and computer worlds.&amp;nbsp;*For mature teens due to some sexual content.

title: He's from 1945
description:
Zhou Sheng was born in a scholarly family, but was born in troubled times and had a lot of ups and downs. He traveled through time and space and woke up to find himself in the so-called 21st century, and secretly married a man through business.
His nominal husband Chu Qinbai came from a good family, but he left the family business early and became a household name. He hated this marriage for profit so much that he looked down on Zhou Sheng, who was arrogant and full of bad habits of the rich second generation.
But Zhou Sheng, who had changed his heart, didn't care too much about these.
He thought it was a good era, without hunger and war, and everyone had clothes to keep warm and a roof to shelter from the rain.
He started a livelihood business, invested in medical care and education, and did poverty alleviation construction, and was too busy to do anything.
Chu Qinbai thought he had ulterior motives, and those rich second generation friends were even more dumbfounded.
"Is Chu Qinbai going to divorce him, so he works hard?"
"I bet he can't last a month."
"One week."
A long time later, Zhou Sheng, who has many titles such as "the most low-key young philanthropist", "national heavyweight project investor", and "benchmark of the times", became more and more mysterious.
In the same year, Chu Qinbai's secret marriage was exposed, and he was on the Spring Festival Gala at the end of the year.
The media was surprised who had such a big face to invite him to appear.
Chu Qinbai: "Return a favor for my wife."
Media: "?!"
Don't ask, if you ask, the answer is that his wife is both famous and professional. If you ask
again, the answer is that if she doesn't appear on the Spring Festival Gala again to remind him, will the person who is often not seen for a month still remember that she has a husband? A
righteous and gentle nobleman is x-rated by a crematorium star and movie emperor.

title: The Twelve Realms (A Zodiac Story)
description:
The twelve Zodiacs all live together at a boarding school, but all that changes when Gemini claims she saw a magical airship hovering over the academy. The other eleven protested that there was nothing but despair and clouds in its place, but when the Twelve wake up on the ship after a day that everyone found weird, everything changes . . .

The Zodiacs find themselves transported to another world, another realm full of secrets and riddles, where something has gone terribly wrong. It's up to the twelve of them to stop the world from falling into darkness, but . . .

"We're just teenagers," Aries argued, slamming her fist onto the map. "How are we supposed to do anything?"

"Awkward teenagers," Scorpio chimed in.

"Shut up, Scorp."

"You may be just teenagers, confused with the troubles that come at that age," Ursa replied calmly. 

Capricorn groaned.

"But the prophecy has foretold that you twelve will save us all."

Now the Zodiacs have been whisked into an adventure, its fate intertwined in the stars. With tears, trauma and confessions uncovered, along with unlikely friendships, abilities, and . . love? blossoming along the way, it's up to them now - will the world be saved or destroyed?

--

title: Her
description:
Leah lives in a futuristic world in which society is made up of one gender; female with no knowledge of the other. Each woman within the society is born and placed into The Institution, their City's school, where they are raised and taught, until they are old enough to graduate. When they graduate from The Institution, the City Leaders assign each of them with a career, which is understood as being their career for life. The City Leaders choose "Breeder" for Leah - a person who breeds the next generation for their City and The Institution. However, Leah's career leads her to the discovery that not every baby given birth to by the Breeders goes to the Institution and instead, is believed to go somewhere else. But where that somewhere else is, nobody knows. Curiously, Leah sets out to find the answer; unbeknown to her that the truth may change everything she has ever known forever.

title: FEDERATION
description:
Federation takes close encounters to a whole new level. A galactic empire of a quarter of a million worlds stumbles across the Earth.

Their philosophy on life is totally unexpected. With the help of intelligent automatons, they've turned a reviled political system into a utopia for the masses, but are they a force for good or evil?

A Daragnen university graduate, Yol Rummy Blin Breganin, discovers that Earth failed in its attempt to join the Federation, and, for some unknown reason, members are forever banned from visiting or contacting the planet. Rummy had never heard of a whole world being outlawed. Perhaps it would be sensible to leave well enough alone but no, he decides to investigate...

FEDERATION is the first in a series of near-future, hard science-fiction novels by Tony Harmsworth, the First Contact specialist.

Submerge yourself in humankind's cultural and economic dilemma by reading Federation today.

(c) Tony Harmsworth 2019
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Anthony Geoffrey Harmsworth (Tony)
I have lived on the side of Loch Ness for most of my life. In 1979 I conceived the Loch Ness Centre and Exhibition and it opened on 3rd May 1980. I also invented the board game, NESSIE HUNT, wrote the MACBETH EXPERIENCE audiovisual show and staged THE STORY OF SCOTLAND at Fort Augustus Abbey. I have appeared in many documentaries.
Sadly, I was cheated out of my share of the Loch Ness Exhibition, but my involvement in the subject continued until 1991 and since then I've been the main commentator on Loch Ness and wrote LOCH NESS UNDERSTOOD in 2010, easily the most comprehensive book on Loch Ness ever produced. My life in tourism also led me to write SCOTLAND'S BLOODY HISTORY which explains the history of our country chronologically, using all the very bloodiest of events.
I now write science fiction. 
I love old-school science fiction of the Clarke, Heinlein, Asimov, Aldiss, Clement genres. MINDSLIP and THE VISITOR contain a lot of real science and are very descriptive stories.
My favourite films are PASSENGERS & SPHERE.

My books >
MINDSLIP Frightening mind-swapping adventure.
THE VISITOR Woman astronaut finds an alien artefact in low-Earth orbit.
GREEN DOOR A man walking his dog ends up saving humanity
MOONSCAPE The moon is dead, but what if something were hibernating in the dust?
FEDERATION An empire of 250,000 worlds stumbles across the Earth. What could possibly go wrong?
You'll also find an essay on Mars and an essay++ on the moon conspiracies if you'd like to learn something about those two subjects.
I hope you enjoy my work. Please comment and please, please leave votes.
Thanks,
Tony

title: Down Under
description:
|WATTYS 2022 WINNER - HORROR|

Shawn, a convicted criminal, never thought she'd see the sun again, let alone call another star system her home. When she's offered an out from her prison sentence, she embarks on a dangerous interstellar expedition along with 18 of Earth's most intelligent criminals.

Their task is to set up a base on a supposedly habitable planet and prepare it for colonization. Although the planet has liquid water and a breathable atmosphere, it is believed to host only microbial life. However, upon arriving, Shawn and the rest of the colonists learn that assumption was grossly incorrect.

In a brutal attack from rampaging wildlife, everyone but Shawn and four other colonists are killed. The five survivors retreat to the cavernous network beneath the ground seeking safety, but they soon come to a terrible discovery. These caves aren't ordinary caves, and they are no safer down under than they were on the surface.

[][][]

This was originally my entry for the 2021 Open Novella Contest, and it received an honorable mention! It has now been expanded into a full length novel. I used prompt number 53:

"When wildlife starts rampaging, all the humans are forced underground. However, they come to a terrible discovery that being underground is no safer than being on the surface."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
An engineer who designs ships. 2018, 2019, 2021 and 2022 Wattys Winner, 2022 Ambys Winner, 2023 Wattys Shortlister, Wattpad Originals author, and former Wattpad Creator/Star.

My current story, Mezzanine, is a teen horror/thriller series with a dash of romance, a hint of humor and ton of mystery. New chapters will release weekly on Wattpad and YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family.

I grew up in a suburban town in New Jersey where my friends and I spent most of our free time hunting for ghosts and trying to find the scariest horror movies.

I attended college at a very small school in New York (that looks remarkably like Wayne Manor) where I majored in Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering. I am now living in Seattle, Washington working as a naval architect.

In my free time, I enjoy hiking, live music, skiing, and of course reading and writing. I'm particularly interested in horror, paranormal, mysteries, and thrillers. title: The Infected Mind
description:
[Book 1]

Crawlers: once normal people like you or me. They had hobbies, families, friends, interests, but now they are feral monsters. The infection spread, wiping out almost half the human race, and leaving the rest as either Crawlers or Survivors. The infected's eyes will black out, before giant, black, bug-like legs will rip out of their back, giving them a newfound speed and agility, as well as an insatiable bloodlust. Body fluids entering any open wound, including the eyes, mouth, and nose, will seal the person's fate; they are now infected. It won't be long before they start screeching at the moon in a mock howl.

The problem is, I am infected. I turned but retained most of my humanity. With my new lifestyle in a new world, I can't expect anything or anyone to act as I predict. My biggest question is, can I save my humanity? Or will I simply become part of the mindless feral swarm?

title: She Bleeds for Us: The Galactic Consortium 3
description:
For Gabriel Holloway, a poor kid from the ghettoes of Freetown, Sierre Leone, not much has changed since the arrival of the Consortium. That is until a new protest movement sweeps the country. The Consortium could do so much more for the poor and oppressed, if their own corrupt leaders would only stand aside and let them. But they won't. So they must be pushed aside, at whatever cost. 
Jake, an American boy, continues his job delivering supplies for the Consortium in North Africa. But it's a region increasingly torn apart by civil unrest and revolution. The poor want more help from the consortium. Local warlords and corrupt politicians want to keep their power. Jake has never experienced anything like it, being in the middle of a huge social upheaval. He has no clue what is going to happen, but he knows where he belongs, in the middle of it all.

authorBio:
I write reader fics for those who need them, since life is hard and we can dream. I feel that, even through fiction, I'd like to reach out to those who need the company, and even with fictional characters, we can find comfort in.

I may disappear for long periods of time, only to be resurrected by a sudden idea. My upload schedule is not regular, and I'll only be able to write whenever I'm free and able to.

I like to write in a more traditional way, where there's a lot of exposition and minimal dialogue, I feel the need to describe things as I envision them to play out.

I also write scripts for film and video games in private as well.

I'm currently not in a position to take writing commissions or requests, I'm solely focussing on ideas I'm able to curate on my own, hence why most of my work revolves around Persona.

One I finish my latest 'book' - "Happy World" - I might upload to AO3 and possibly even go back and rewrite my first book so that it's mich more grammatically correct.

I'm not the best at writing, I know that, but I hope you'll enjoy my works, and find inspiration or comfort from them.

title: Omnibyte Simulation-multiverse Deal (The Compatible-with-ai-bot Version)
description:
Eric is given the opportunity to modify/create a simulation-world for himself and others to experience. "He can add magic, rules, and other things to his new simulation-world and he can also change the laws of nature, physics, reality and anything else that he wants" when it comes to his simulation-world until the creation of his simulation-world is "completed with his "modifications, rules, and creations" "continuing after his simulation-world's completion" for "all who or that whenever are at his simulation-world"". He realized that he can connect "the simulation-world he created" to other "simulation-worlds that were created/modified by other people who were given the same opportunity". Immerse into the Simulation-multiverse as Eric and others realize the true nature of the opportunity that they were offered. The Simulation is simply a passtime so that the people don't have "prescious long parts of their lives whereby they're ""not being able to interact with people" and "not having great experiences in their lifetime""". It's like so that a "Hospital patient who wakes up 30 years after first being a Hospital patient" doesn't have to find out that they only have like 15 years left to complete their "bucket list"". They might otherwise feel deprived of the "life experiences that they could have had during those 30 years had they not been "not awake" as a Hospital patient".

I breathe stories. I dream them. If it were possible, I'd eat them, too. (I'm pretty sure they'd taste like cotton candy.) I can't escape them - they're everywhere! Which is why I write! I was born to bring the crazy worlds and people in my mind to life, and I love sharing them with as many people as I can.

I'm also the bestselling, award winning, internationally acclaimed author of over sixty titles and counting. I write speculative fiction in multiple subgenres of romance and fantasy, contemporary fiction, books for both teens and adults, and just about anything else I feel like writing. If I can imagine it, I can write it!

I live in the desert of southern Arizona with a pack of spoiled dogs and Tubbs, the Godfather cat who rules them all.

For a complete list of my books, you can visit my website or Amazon page!

title: Playing With Fire
description:
"Rule number one," He whispers, pulling back to look me right in the eye, "Never let your guard down."
He flashes me a cunning smirk as I stare at him, stunned at what he had just done. Only, he makes a mistake of turning to see what everyone else ahead of the bleachers is doing.  
I smirk and take a step back forcefully. Just as he turns his head back to face me, I swing my arm at his face.
"No. That's rule two," I snap, "Rule one is never turn your back to your opponent." 

Faye Williams is not the type of girl who would call for the attention. However, she calls things as she sees them. Faye's not afraid to use her fist, for that's all she's ever known. Some call her a good girl while others call her a rebel. What most people don't know is that she's witnessed things that not many people get to witness. With an unstable mother who blames her for a needed divorce, she's seen, heard, and knows plenty. 
It's not until she moves to Miami, Florida with her dad, that trouble arises. Let's just say that the odds are not in her favor, especially when it comes to that notorious 'bad kid' Travis. Yet, for some reason, she feels that fixing the bad boy will mend herself. When a powerful gang leader, a notorious bad boy, vengeful mother, and two faced acquaintances enter the equation, Faye knows there's nothing to save her now.

*Copyright © 2013* 
All rights reserved.

I wasn't supposed to come back this time, but fate has some plans for me. I had always wondered what the future would look like, but I didn't think I would ever see.

A new chapter is being written in my story, and no one else knows.

authorBio:
Welcome to my account! My name is Digital. I use they/them pronouns and write stories here. I've settled on six longer stories here and a few other sites. You can find all links to those sites and other social media platforms I'm on in the Linktree below!

Here's a summary of my current stories!

First, I have my Ace Attorney series, Morix. The current book, 'Web of Mistrust', is a sequel to 'Quiet after the Huricane' and 'Secrets beneath Secrets'. It revolves around a small law agency, Morix Law Offices, as they try to dispel corruption from the legal system around them. Updated Thursday.

Second, there's an original series, Alitia. The first book is 'Welcome to Millennia'. It follows a group of eight girls attending the magic academy, Alitia, while attempting to refine their powers. The sequel, 'Crown of Ash', focuses on the girls' second semester at Alitia. It's a fantasy story with elements of action and adventure. Updated Tuesday.

Third, we have another original fantasy series, Galaxy of Hyperion. 'World of New Life' is the first book. It revolves around six teenagers who are pulled into another galaxy and forced to fight in its war to get home. Updated Saturday. On hiatus until the next book, 'Mystic Heir', debuts in August.

Fourth, there's my rewrite of Fire Emblem Fates. The story is entirely different from canon and strives to improve on the original. The prologue, Birthright, Conquest, Hidden Truths, and Heirs of Fate are finished and Revelation is in progress. Updated Sunday.

Fifth, I have an alternate universe of Fire Emblem: Three Houses called Fódlan Alternative. It has characters from 50 creators in one story about an amnesiac carving their future while recovering lost memories. Updated Friday.

Last, there's my rewrite of Digimon Frontier called 'Frontiers Unexplored'. It is freeform and longer than my other stories, so it is updated on no schedule.

I hope that at least one of those stories piques your interest. Stick around, Digital Dreamer!

title: Sector B
description:
Decha is a genius high-ranking general, called back to Austell from The Outside by the council. Theodore Chen, the director of the Crime Affairs Agency requests for Decha to do some local investigation on the recent threats targeting Austell's most prestigious University, Grandell. 

The job is easier said than done. Decha has to go to Grandell undercover as a student again, investigate a great number of students and pick out suspicious behavior. The problem is that Grandell has few students from the opposing Sector, the Brackets. 

Sector B is full of people who are of the lower class. They work as much overtime as possible to make ends meet. Decha's mission entails that Sector B residents are most likely responsible for the threats directed at Grandell. While trying to solve the mystery under the radar, he gets involved with a Bracketer woman who oddly refuses to leave his side.

Decha will have to uncover hidden truths. He may even go through a journey of self-discovery and have a deep understanding of how the Sector's flawed system truly works.

title: She is Fatal to Death (Standalone Story)
description:
She's dead by the third chapter.
Okay, it's a bit more complicated than that.
Okay, it's A LOT more complicated than that. 

Renata wants nothing more than to pay her bills through her mildly boring office job and figure out whether she is still in love with her best friend. The latter half of that desire is just a sneak peak into her messy life-and it's only getting messier. 

Considering the paranormal world she is about to dive head first into, she will come to realize that figuring out her heart may just be the easiest part of this journey. 

Well, the endless supply of supernatural hotness in this story may beg to differ-but that's besides the point.  Either way, it's gonna be a killer time ;) 

EXCERPT 

        Chicken tacos it is. 
	Right as Renata grabbed the ingredients, she turned to put them next to the stove, where a clean, plastic cutting board awaited. But as she moved, she was confronted by a stranger, an intruder, standing mere inches from her.
	Before she could scream, he was on her, slamming her against the fridge. Her back flashed with sharp pain. Her eyes pricked with fear as she drank in his uncovered face. Deeply tanned skin. Ruby red eyes-ruby red eyes? Thick, slashing eyebrows. Flat, broad nose. Buzzcut. Handsome. That was as far as she would go in complimenting him considering this guy held a knife to her throat.
	When he spoke, his voice came out like thunder. It held a thousand threats and a thousand secrets. It held promise of pain if provoked. "If you scream," he warned, mouth pulled in a slight snarl, "this ends quickly."
	She didn't dare nod against the blade. He noticed and amusement lit up for just a second in those devilish eyes. Oh, whoever the fuck this was, she already hated him. Considering her predicament, panic was the most prominent emotion coursing through her at the moment. "Good." He removed his hand "Now you're going to answer my questions."

°°MATURE AND EXPLICIT CONTENT OF ALL KINDS, AND I MEAN ALL KINDS°
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Kurukshetra Vijayadhari
description:
The great war was fought 5 millenniums ago on the battlefield of Kurukshetra took a toll on the then existing human civilization . Those victorious had the whole nation to rule while those vanquished achieved eternal glory of martyrdom . But there was one among those fallen warriors to have been blessed with both victory and martyrdom by his own teacher . Only if he had used his abilities and the blessing to perfection the result might have been different . His chariot brought about his martyrdom while his bow had kept him undefeated till then . His skills and his birth were often questioned by many yet his armour made him invincible and immune to all of them . Let's join the battle of the warrior as his soul is replaced by that of a man from the era of modern scientific brilliance creating a mess in the course of the scripted war .

title: After 30 Days
description:
Book Two

Bri has learned the hard way that not everyone who survived the zombie outbreak is a friend. New relationships have formed, and allies have been lost, but for Bri and her small group of friends, life still goes on. 

Back on the road, all any of them want to do is finally find a safe place to rest, but unanswered questions still plague the group. 

Before long, Bri finds herself taking a path that she could have never expected. Bonds will be tested, and innocence lost, when they find out what happens after those first 30 days. 

The sequel to The First 30 Days.

Goodreads reviews,

H.S. writes about The First 30 Days *****
Fantastic story! The author brings the zombie apocalypse to life. You feel as if you're really there and you're running for your life along side Bri.

Bri is a likeable character, as is Shawn but their relationship moves like snails. Slow and long. They both want to protect one another, but at the same time Bri will make stupid decisions based on her need to stay close to Shawn. Sweet, but in a zombie apocalypse, dangerous.

I love Rex. I'd like to think my furry babies would protect me during an zombie apocalypse (althrough I'm pretty sure my chihuahua would bark until eaten). So having a dog around is good, and also smart.

I liked the story when it was on Wattpad, and I'm glad she got the book published. I can't wait to add this to my collection! Likeable characters, a good story line and how she starts the whole thing is fantastic.

title: Coyote
description:
Thousands of years after Earth became uninhabitable, humanity colonized other planets and moons around the solar system. Amid rising crime rate, the Galactic Space Force (GSF) set up a legal contract where registered bounty hunters (known as Coyotes) go after criminals and bring them in alive in return for credits.

Wolf is one of the best coyotes in the GSF, but also one of the most hated. He has no care of the damage he causes to people or buildings when pursuing a bounty, leaving the GSF having to compensate those affected by his actions.

When the daughter of a senator in The Kingdom becomes the most wanted terrorist in the solar system, the GSF is hired to find her before anyone else does.

Willing to look past Wolf's reckless history, the director of the GSF contracts him and other coyotes to find the senator's daughter and take her to the GSF at whatever cost. But with enemies after the same woman, Wolf is forced to trust and rely on his new partners in hopes of getting the biggest payday of his life.

title: The Cure (Book One of The Golden Eyes Trilogy)
description:
Nova is a badass. 

She's not only a talented zombie slayer-she's tough, ruthless, and a downright bitch. But she loves who she is, and she wouldn't change herself for the world. 

Trying to survive the apocalypse with her best friend until they make it to Australia-the last safe place on Earth-is their only goal. 

Nova knows they can make it now that she has enhanced speed and strength and dramatically improved senses after dying from a bite and coming back to life as an immune superhuman. 

She just needs the Fates to send someone who can sail or fly them to their destination. 

And then the Fates do send someone. 

Along with a man named Finn. 

She can't help but to like him and for the crazy world they live in he makes her feel-well-normal. 

The plan is to get to Australia. It's the last safe place in the world and Nova truly believes she is the cure that will save the human race. 

But they have to go through Savages out for blood, new and different types of Zombies, an insane man and his army, and a three month boat ride to the safe lands. 

Hopefully they make it all in one piece. 

Read on to find out if they do.

authorBio:
Atreyos. Born into the humble village of Salton, Atreyos's early years were marked by hardship and struggle. The specter of drought cast a shadow over his family's meager existence, driving him to seek refuge amidst the vast pine forests that surrounded his home. Lost and alone, he was discovered by a band of compassionate hunters, who took him under their wing and brought him to Soresia, a bustling city teeming with life and opportunity.
Under the nurturing care of his newfound guardians, Atreyos found solace and sustenance, his once-starving frame now nourished by the bounty of the city. But fate, capricious as ever, soon intervened, as familial discord drove him once more into the unknown.
Finding himself adrift in the streets of Soresia, Atreyos's path intersected with that of destiny when he chanced upon a carriage bound for the capital of the Order Empire. Seizing the opportunity for a new beginning, he concealed himself within its confines, embarking on a journey that would alter the course of his life forever.

title: New Earth 6
description:
'Firefly meets Battlestar Galactica'. 
 
    A merchant's daughter is captured and sold into slavery.
    
    A genetically modified survivor of an alien attack scours the galaxy for her taken brother before he is 'disassembled'. 
    
    An alien scientist uncovers a secret that will shake the foundation of her world...and their human allies.
    
 The stars are endless, but their stories are intertwined, connected to each other and to the fate of the human race.

title: Spyro: The Classic Trilogy Returns: Cynder's Cutscenes
description:
I always thought that if Crash Bandicoot can get a remastered trilogy, maybe Spyro could get one too. In addition, I'd have Cynder [from The Legend of Spyro series] as a unlockable playable character. She'd behave exactly like Spyro, but breathe Electricity instead of Fire. She'd be voiced by Cree Summer, and the cutscenes would be changed a bit, to have Cynder in them.

Of course, she'd be unlockable in all 3 games, and you'd have to select her from when you start a new game. Just to make it a bit fairer.

So here it is: All the cutscenes of a remastered Spyro Trilogy, with Cynder [from The Legend of Spyro series] as a playable character.

[I do not, and never will own any of Spyro; Original, Legend, Skylanders, or otherwise, or any other shows mentioned.]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Venusian Gate
description:
In the 1096th year of the Holy Eastern Calendar, a collective gasp echoed among the nations surrounding the Rune Ocean as an enigmatic gateway unfurled before them. The reactions were as diverse as the landscapes of the nations themselves-some met the revelation with trepidation, an undercurrent of fear entwined with uncertainty, while others, fueled by a burgeoning greed, viewed the gateway as a potential conduit to untold wealth and opportunities. 

What remained indisputable, however, was the allure of what lay beyond the gate: An uncharted realm adorned with immense riches and enigmatic mysteries, waiting to be unveiled and explored by those daring enough to venture forth.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Glitch Girl
description:
Maria is dead. In an attempt to bring his daughter back to life, Henry turns to a company that creates digital personalities based on brain scans. But the digital Maria is kind of weird: she's glitching, has black stripes on her face, and doesn't think she's Maria at all.
